highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET is around INR 111780 - INR 360240.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Electronics Engineering syllabus same across all colleges?
faqs.answer:
The Electronics Engineering syllabus for the BTech degree is not the same across all colleges. Every college prefers to follow an individual coursework module that includes both theory classes and practical lab work. While core subjects and fundamental concepts might be similar, the structure, electives offered, and laboratory and project work are different.
You can check the detailed syllabus for the course on the respective college websites that you're targeting to get a clearer picture.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 361 students were admitted at Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET and 436 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 436 students 155 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 7 students opted for higher studies. A total of 375 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIETand 439 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 439 students 160 were placed with median salary of INR 450000 and 11 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 10 students were admitted at Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET and 9 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 9 students 7 were placed with median salary of INR 350000. A total of 30 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIETand 25 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 25 students 13 were placed with median salary of INR 400000.

faqs.answer: A:    Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 3.5 LPA to MBA/PGDM students.
faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET to MBA/PGDM students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,11,780 to 7,44,444.

faqs.answer: A:    Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET are Automobile Engineering, Biotechnology Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cyber Security.
faqs.question: What specializations do Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET offer in their courses?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of vidya vikas institute of engineering and technology.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for computer science students here. For other branches, 2 to 3 companies will come with a maximum package of 3 to 4 LPA. The university provides an internship for every student in the final year under the NSDC internship, which provides five certificates at the end of the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about facilities and infrastructure, there are no special facilities available in this college. Wi-Fi is not available for students, and labs are okay to work. In classrooms, there is only one smart board for each department. There is no canteen here, and hostel fees are high but strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good infrastructure and facilities but bad placements.

review_content.Placements: As I know, very few students got placement. Between 2-3 lakhs per annum was the average package. There were only local companies attending our college. About 20-25% of students got internships in companies like Kirloskar Electric Company and Apar Industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is too good; the college is really spacious. Even the hostel has strict rules and better safety for students. There are so many libraries with almost all the books available, and every classroom has a smart TV.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the hostel facilities and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Students should have above 65% to get placed. The highest package offered is 8 LPA, the lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and Technotree. Around 75% of students got internships in Infosys etc. The top roles offered by our course are related to OS, IoT etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are labs, classrooms and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is very poor, and the quality of food in the mess and canteen is the worst. There are no medical facilities, sports and games in our hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This is an average college with average placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students are placed. Some of the placements are done and also the placements are done only for the students who scored the highest marks. Some of the students are sent back to the home if college does not encourage their performance.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no Wi-Fi in this college. There are average laboratories in the classrooms. The classrooms are fine with the iron, benches, and the library is also good. The library has many books, journals, and many other general knowledge books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is great.

review_content.Placements: Above 75% of students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the minimum salary package offered is 4 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, L&T, HP, and Dell visit our college to hire students from our course. About 50% of students from our course got an internship in the above-mentioned companies. For whatever the students are interested in, they are free to have it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food we get is 100 times better than the outside food. We get good quality of meal every day. I do not know about the hostel. My friends who stayed in the hostel are satisfied with the infrastructure of the college hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Vidiya vikas college review.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of our batch student is placed successfully. This college is affiliated with Visvesaraya Technological University. The fees for the course is approximate around 1.05-1.15. The Placement for this course is in Multi-National Companies like Aris Global, Bosch Ltd, Infosys, Infotech. The Role is From Manager Upto HR Manager in any field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college are outstanding. The Wi-Fi is high tec lab, classrooms and a library are available on the campus. There are so many indoor games and other entertainment programmes are conducted on campus. The hostel facility is very nice and the rooms are in good condition.

admission_process.title: Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET admissionis a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. The institute considers exam scores for certain courses, while merit achieved in the last qualifying exam is considered to shortlist students for the remaining programmes. Students can pursue a variety of courses at UG and PG levels.

Some of the exams accepted by the institute are GATE, KCET, and COMEDK UGET, and more. Students must secure a valid score in the relevant exam, and meet the eligibility. Vidya Vikas Institute of Engineering and Technology - VVIET fees generally range betweenINR 1,11,780 - 7,44,444. reviews.review_text: The facilities of the college are outstanding. The Wi-Fi is high tec lab, classrooms and a library are available on the campus. There are so many indoor games and other entertainment programmes are conducted on campus. The hostel facility is very nice and the rooms are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for college life. The infrastructure was not much great.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was not available on our campus. Labs were very useful for civil engineering, and lab attendees and staff members were really good at teaching. Classrooms were good, and the library facility was really good. Many books were available for students to study. The hostel was not situated on the campus, and we had to travel 3 km from the hostel to college. Our college timings were strictly followed, and about 75% attendance was compulsory to attend final exams.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good quality education and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the branches in our college are like family members. We have good bonding and compatibility with students. We have hi-tech classrooms and library. college_info.intro: VELS School of Maritime Studies' popular programmes are BSc and B.E. B.E. Marine Engineering is NBA-accredited. These course students can become Chief Engineers, Chief Electric Technical Officer, Design Engineer, or can go for several other job profiles. These students are taught Electrical Engineering Basics, Engineering Mechanics, Computer Science and various other subjects. The students are trained in such a manner that they can easily join the Shipping Industry or can even pursue higher education and research. Below mentioned are some of the VELS School of Maritime Studies courses and their respective eligibility and VELS School of Maritime Studies fee:

Students also need to secure more than 80% marks in the institute examinations to enroll for placements at the school.
faqs.question: Does VELS School of Maritime Studies provide 100% placements?

Maritime OperationsPresea Training for Graduates (GME)Presea Training for Diploma Holders (DME)Advanced Diploma in Nautical Science (Formerly HND Nautical Science) in partnership with City of Glasgow College, UKAdvanced Diploma in Marine Engineering (Formerly HND Marine Engineering) in partnership with City of Glasgow College, UKDiploma in Marine Engineering (Lateral)Diploma in Marine Engineering
faqs.question: Q: Which are the popular courses in VELS School of Maritime Studies?

faqs.answer: VELS School of Maritime Studies is situated at Thalambur, Chennai, near Navalur on the IT Highway of Tamilnadu, off the old Mahabalipuram Road. In the vast campus along with spacious building for class rooms, workshops and library, separate laboratories have been provided for Physics, Electrical Machinery, Control Systems, Power Electronics, Electronic devices, Electronic Communication, Digital devices and Seamanship. The two Computer Centres of School of Maritime Studies and a well-stocked library compare with the best anywhere. School of Maritime Studies has its own hostels for boys and girls separately. There is also an exclusive Mess Block within the campus with separate dining halls. School of Maritime Studies has its own fleet of buses connecting the college with different points of Chennai.
faqs.question: Q: Is VELS School of Maritime Studies a good college?

faqs.answer: VELS School of Maritime Studies offers diploma, postgraduate, and undergraduate courses to students. These courses are provided across the Marine Engineering, Nautical Science, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BSc, BBA, B.E., BTech, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers Graduate Marine Engineering (GME) course to students. There are several other Diploma courses available at this school of study.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are offered at VELS School of Maritime Studies?

review_summary.college_name: VELS School of Maritime Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the top college for marine studies.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed is 40-60%. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like K Line, etc., visit the college for placements. Top roles offered are deck officers, captain, chief mater, second mater, third mater, marine engineers, chief engineer, second engineer, third engineer, and supporting staff positions like purser. 30-40% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available like the library, labs, classrooms, etc. But one problem is the net connection is poor. The quality of the food is good. The hostel facility is average and a swimming pool is also available on our campus. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend joining this college for curriculum, practical classes, and new experiences.

content.Placements: I am a BE marine engineer in our batch. There are 80 cadets, and out of 80, only a single student got placed in a company through placements. So, placements are very poor. If you join this college, you have to arrange for a job, and then you can join this college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good and well-maintained, and classrooms and labs are available. The hostel food available is prepared with hygiene, but recently they changed the mess contract after I passed out.
content.Faculty: Teachers were awesome and very helpful, and there is no drawback in faculty members, curriculum, and exams. Everything is perfect. For exams, we are practically learning, and we just need to write them. It is not at all difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in India.

content.Placements: Our college has the best teaching and good placement opportunities. Companies like K-Line and many others visit our campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: All infrastructural facilities and the educational system are good. Our college provides all the facilities which are important for studying in a very well manner. review_summary.college_name: G.S. Mandal's Marathwada Institute of Technology (MIT, Aurangabad) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best college for core fields. Must consider G.S. Mandal's MIT.

content.Placements: Great placement assistance. Agriculture has a placement percentage of 66 per cent. The highest package is 19 LPA and 80 LPA across all branches. Tech Mahindra, Jain Irrigation, and Sula Winery are companies for agriculture placements. 70 per cent get an internship, and agriculture engineering-related core roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Best labs, library in the whole city, well-maintained great classrooms, Wi-Fi campus, great hostel for boys and girls. Best food services like mess and cafeteria as well. Various clubs like NCC Sports are also helping to make campus life very good and enjoyable. Great programs like motivation are also held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best moments of my career at MIT Aurangabad.

content.Placements: Overall UG (4-year) course (graduation batch 2023). Approximately 45% to 50% of CSE students got placed. As per information, 180 out of 417 students got placed. College claims higher overall percentage between 60% to 80% placed in computer science and engineering. The highest package was INR 80 LPA and in 2023 INR 12 LPA. For CSE, the average package ranges between INR 4 LPA to INR 23 LPA. Top recruiting companies in CSE were TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Amazon, Red Hat, Cognizant, and Hexaware. The college mentions mandatory internships (20 weeks in the 8th semester).

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college in my opinion.

content.Placements: The college is good for placements. I can only it is good and not very bad and also not very best placements. It is an average college for placements. At least 30% of students get placements with the average package of 3 LPA. Roles like frontend, backend, or java full stack developer are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a separate hostel and in that, a separate mess is also available. I don't like the quality of the food in the hostel as it is of average quality, and some days the quality is not acceptable. The college does not support much about sports and games, so students learn or go to outside classes. Facilities are okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in some aspects.

content.Placements: The percentage of the students who got placement is low in my batches as the companies do not come for the placement round. Mostly, one or two companies came for the placement round that are good companies. Otherwise, the companies came, but these companies are not very good and do not give high packages to students. The average package is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I think the college provides good facilities for students, so there are no problems. The Wi-Fi-associated labs are there. Classrooms for my department are very big, with a capacity of 120 students. In the first year, students in one classroom are 60, and in the second year, the class is combined into two divisions. The college has a big library, sports facilities, and a special canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A genuine review of G.S. Mandal's Marathwada Institute of Technology (MIT, Aurangabad).

content.Placements: In our college, there is a placement percentage of 40%. There are good placements for especially plastic polymer branch students. The highest package is 80 LPA. The average package is 3.5 LPA in our college. Companies that visit our college for placements are TCS, Tata, Gemini, Amazon, Finolex, etc. Many students get internships in TCS, Tata, Finolex, and Capgemini. Roles offered to students are assistant manager, material testing engineer, product designer, production engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our college are good. Classrooms are clean and beautiful. The campus of our college is also beautiful. The hostel facility is the worst because here if we take admission to the hostel then the hostel mess is mandatory. The hostel mess is very bad, and they don't provide healthy and good food.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for core fields. Must consider G.S. Mandal's MIT.
reviews.review_text: Best labs, library in the whole city, well-maintained great classrooms, Wi-Fi campus, great hostel for boys and girls. Best food services like mess and cafeteria as well. Various clubs like NCC Sports are also helping to make campus life very good and enjoyable. Great programs like motivation are also held.

reviews.review_heading: Best moments of my career at MIT Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at MIT Aurangabad was comprehensive, featuring modern digital classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, and an extensive central library with vast physical and digital resources. Campus Wi-Fi was available. Hostel facilities were good, with separate buildings for boys and girls. It offered various types and essential amenities like 24X7 security, power, and water. The mess food was generally hygienic and satisfactory. Basic medical facilities were available on campus, supported ...

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in my opinion.
reviews.review_text: The college has a separate hostel and in that, a separate mess is also available. I don't like the quality of the food in the hostel as it is of average quality, and some days the quality is not acceptable. The college does not support much about sports and games, so students learn or go to outside classes. Facilities are okay.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in some aspects.
reviews.review_text: I think the college provides good facilities for students, so there are no problems. The Wi-Fi-associated labs are there. Classrooms for my department are very big, with a capacity of 120 students. In the first year, students in one classroom are 60, and in the second year, the class is combined into two divisions. The college has a big library, sports facilities, and a special canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A genuine review of G.S. Mandal's Marathwada Institute of Technology (MIT, Aurangabad).
reviews.review_text: Facilities of our college are good. Classrooms are clean and beautiful. The campus of our college is also beautiful. The hostel facility is the worst because here if we take admission to the hostel then the hostel mess is mandatory. The hostel mess is very bad, and they don't provide healthy and good food.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: Campus has wide Wi-Fi connectivity and internet access. It has 24-hour internet access for students and staff. We have classrooms with multimedia learning Wi-Fi and internet access. We have a separate reference section for faculty members. There is a very big library.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for mechanical engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not good in this college. Classrooms are like school classrooms. They do not have advanced technology. There is no Wi-Fi access in the classrooms. The library has a vast collection of books, and you can study there from the start to the end of the day.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for CSE branch.
reviews.review_text: Building was built in the 90s and is still good with the great infrastructure and there are all facilities available for students. There are separate labs for every department with unlimited Wi-Fi connection. Wi-Fi is only accessible in lab sessions. Wi-Fi is not available in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. These are the basic things that any college has. Hostel facilities are also good covering with well room, and food quality in mess is good. Hostel is very near to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G.S. Mandal's Marathwada Institute of Technology (MIT, Aurangabad).
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the college are not so bad. There are very good facilities in sports. It has well-developed grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball. The infrastructure of the college is good. There are all departments in one or two buildings. Classrooms are available with advanced technology. The library is also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really good, although the infrastructure is old. There are two buildings, one for B.Tech students and one for polytechnic students. There is a separate canteen for each college inside the campus. The labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained, and the technical things needed for students are available. The hostel is very close to the college, and the food quality of the mess in the hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely value for money, take the admission in this college, and it is a very good campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are well done. For practical purposes, digital labs are available for individual students with PCs. Digital classrooms are equipped with projectors and mics. Hostel facilities are good, with healthy food and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus but we failed to enjoy in 2023.
reviews.review_text: In the MIT campus, wireless Wi-Fi is present. Labs are free for students; each lab has 25 PCs. Classrooms are of good quality, having projectors and digital boards. The library is free for students, but they should carry an ID card with them. Hostel quality is on the good side, but food quality is low; the canteen provides good-quality food. Sports and events are taken once a year.

reviews.review_heading: MITs fulfill all the requirements .
reviews.review_text: The facilities we get are better than every college in the city and the infrastructure is too huge as compared to other colleges. College provides us with free Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and the whole and soul library where we can sit silently and concentrate study. Also, the facilities in the hostel are too good, and the food is so good that we can eat it. Here we get all facilities, such as canteen, medical facilities, sports and games, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the Marathwada region.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Our campus is spacious. It is an autonomous college. It is the 1st private college in this region. Our college has Wi-Fi, a library, labs, etc. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the hostel is average. The food served in the canteen is good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about G.S. Mandal's Marathwada Institute of Technology (MIT, Aurangabad)

likes.text: Companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Persistent, IGate, Syntel, Cognizant, Tata Motors, Bajaj Auto and Varroc Engineering have hired students from here.
Many multinational companies came here for recruiting students and a maximum number of students were selected as they were capable of answering all the questions.

highlights.summary: Rishihood University admissions 2026 are now open. Below are some of the other important updates:

college_info.intro:
Rishihood University offers a diverse range of programmes to students at UG and PG levels. The college offers programmes mainly in the field of Marketing and Management. The most popular programmes offered at Rishihood University Sonepat are Bachelor of Designing (BDes) and Master of Business Administration (MBA). The university offers BDes and MBA programme to students for a duration of 4 years and 2 years, respectively. These programs are offered to students in full-time mode. Further, the BDes programme is offered across several specialisations such as Product Design, Fashion, and Textile Design, Interior Design, Architecture, etc. In addition to this, Rishihood University Sonipat offers an MBA programme to students across several specialisations such as Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Entrepreneurship, etc. These programmes are designed in a manner to polish the existing skills of the students. Candidates can check the Rishihood University popular programmes in the table given below:
Check out more details in the below video:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Rishihood University courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels through 6 schools. Some of the most popular programmes offered at Rishihood University Sonepat are MBA, BSc, BTech, etc. These programmes are offered to students at the UG level and in full-time mode. Rishihood University UG programmes also include BBA, BDes, and BS in Business Analytics. Some of the most popular PG-level programmes offered at the university are the MBA and MDes. The university also offers a wide range of education programmes such as the Indic Summer School, Global Grand Challenges, TechAhead Masterclass, etc. Apart from this, the college also offers a PhD programme to students at the doctoral level. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Rishihood University courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a recognised board. Students can check the table below to know detailed course eligibility for spme of the top courses:Course NameCommon EligibilityBBAClass 12 or equivalent qualifying examination with at least 50% aggregateBDesClass 12 or equivalent qualifying examination with at least 50% aggregate or 5 CGPABTech in Computer Science and Artificial IntelligenceClass 12 PCM in the last three yearsBSc (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent qualifying examination with at least 50% aggregate
faqs.question: Who are eligible for Rishihood University?

faqs.answer: A:    In order to get admission at Rishihood University, candidates must sit and appear for entrance exam as per respective courses. Students can check the table below for few of a top courses to know the entrance exam:Course NameSelection CriteriaBBARSAT/SAT India/CUET/UCEED + Aptitude Test + Aptitude Test, Past Academic Records Aptitude Test + Academic and Extracurricular Achievements + Personal InterviewBDesNIFT/ NID/ UCEED/ CUET/ DAT + Aptitude Test + Aptitude Test, Past Academic Records Aptitude Test, SOP, Academic and Extracurricular Achievements, Personal InterviewBSc (Hons)RSAT/SAT/UCEED/CUET + Aptitude Test + Past Academic Records + Academic & Extracurricular Achievements + Personal InterviewBTech in Computer Science and Artificial IntelligenceRSAT/SAT/UCEED/CUET + Aptitude Test + Past Academic Records + Academic & Extracurricular Achievements + Personal Interview/NSAT Entrance Exam + PI-GD
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for admission at Rishihood University?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates looking for course admission at Rishihood University cannot enrol for course admission without entrance exam. The university conducts an aptitude test by the name RSAT for admission to UG courses. Apart from RSAT, the university also accepts national-level entrance exams like CUET, SAT India, etc. for admission to specific courses.
faqs.question: Can I join Rishihood University without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent qualifying examination with at least 50% aggregate or 5 CGPA from any recognised board can apply for Rishihood University BBA course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Besides, Rishihood University accepts CUET/ SAT India. In addition to national-level entrance exams like CUET and SAT India students can also apply through Rishihood University’s RSAT for BBA admissions.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Rishihood University.

review_content.Placements: There have not been any placements yet. It is a very new college and there are only 2 batches studying in the college. First and second years only. They do put a very strong emphasis on placements though, since the very first year and some students have managed to get very big placements within the first year alone. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 40,000-60,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is compulsory, and facilities are decent. There is high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the entire campus. Classrooms are very big and vast. The library is the best part of the college. It looks beautiful and has a very big collection of books, articles and stuff. Mess is trash and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are mandatory. There is high-speed internet, water fountains, refrigerators, and microwaves on every floor which is common for everyone.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 43 LPA. The average is around 12 to 18 LPA. In our college, many companies are visiting. The first-year students got internships more than 80% because of the good curriculum and practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members and the infrastructure are excellent. Our campus is fully Wi-Fi 24/7. There is no issue with Wi-Fi. It spreads all over the campus. The hostel is cleaned daily. Housekeeping services are available. The mess is very good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful and supportive. They are excellent in their fields. They have industry experts and much more experience so that we can learn and revise on a daily basis. We can't face any difficulties during exams and tests because faculty members teach from the base.

review_summary.college_name: Rishihood University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college. The fact is if you enjoy working hard come here.

content.Placements: Newton School of Technology is new. The first batch has not passed out yet. The first batch will pass out in 2027 but if their internship record is seen approximately 93 percent of the students have got it. The second batch the placement records have not come yet but it is compulsory during their internship.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 hostels till now 1 for girls and two for boys. Two rooms are shared by 4 students on each floor. There is a fridge water cooler balcony oven. Mess food is good and healthy and it is purely vegetarian. Classroom capacity is 120 students and 60 students for sports. Indoor sports there is a learners arena in which badminton squash swimming pool gym table tennis and pool are available. Outdoors there is basketball football, and ground volleyball. You can also play cricket but for this there is no dedicated ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of Newton School of Technology.

content.Placements: Internship culture is very good. 3 students also cracked GSOC in their first year of college. Some students qualified for ICPC (International Collegiate Programming Contests). 98%of the first-year students got internships in great companies and startups. Some students have their own startup, which is funded by the college. College also brings many CEOs and ex-CEOs for students to gain experience from them.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided, like a swimming pool, cricket field, football field, tennis court, basketball court, etc. There are coaches for all sports. Hostels are also good, and students get two-sharing rooms. Both of them have their own almirah and study table.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Artifical Intelligence in collaboration with NST - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rishihood University.

content.Placements: There have not been any placements yet. It is a very new college and there are only 2 batches studying in the college. First and second years only. They do put a very strong emphasis on placements though, since the very first year and some students have managed to get very big placements within the first year alone. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 40,000-60,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is compulsory, and facilities are decent. There is high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the entire campus. Classrooms are very big and vast. The library is the best part of the college. It looks beautiful and has a very big collection of books, articles and stuff. Mess is trash and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are mandatory. There is high-speed internet, water fountains, refrigerators, and microwaves on every floor which is common for everyone.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and AI - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent.

content.Placements: The highest package is 43 LPA. The average is around 12 to 18 LPA. In our college, many companies are visiting. The first-year students got internships more than 80% because of the good curriculum and practice.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members and the infrastructure are excellent. Our campus is fully Wi-Fi 24/7. There is no issue with Wi-Fi. It spreads all over the campus. The hostel is cleaned daily. Housekeeping services are available. The mess is very good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful and supportive. They are excellent in their fields. They have industry experts and much more experience so that we can learn and revise on a daily basis. We can't face any difficulties during exams and tests because faculty members teach from the base.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Artifical Intelligence in collaboration with NST - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best college for B.Tech in Computer Science and has good internship opportunities.

content.Placements: As this a newly opened college, students didn't passed out yet. However some students from second year secured internships as software engineers at unicorn company Physics Wallah. Around 70% of students secured internships with a high stipend and are satisfied.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college is great with 24/7 water and electricity supply, high quality and maintained rooms with air-conditioners. High speed Wi-Fi is available 24/7 at every corner of our college. The quality and taste of food is great and hygienic. Our college sports facilities are great and supportive with good coaches.

admission_process.title: Rishihood University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rishihood University's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per the respective courses. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in the RU:
STEP 1: Rishihood University Application Process 2025

Aspirants can apply for various courses at the official website. Candidates will have to appear for Online Application + Aptitude Test+ Personal Interview. Students can also check the detailedRishihood University feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at RU are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the university. Students are selected based on the entrance exams such as RSAT/SAT India/ACT/CUET/UCEED, etc.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Students can checkRishihood University cutoffdetails here. A block fee deposit of INR 25,000 (INR 50,000 for all BTech Programs) is to be made at the time of acceptance of the offer of admission. This is counted towards the total payable fee of the first year.
To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

The mess food is actually good; the only downside for some is that the food is purely vegetarian every day.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome and up-to-date, and the ambiance is beautiful, with a lot of trees and a lower garden. The hostels are very comfortable and clean, with furnished tables and beds, keeping in mind the infirmary or medical needs of the guests.

data.description: Rishihood University is committed to providing the best facilities to its students.  The university offers world-class infra facilities on campus. Along with these, the university also has a hostel facility. The hostel facility at the campus can accommodate all the admitted students. Students get to stay in double occupancy rooms that are centralized AC rooms. The university believes in and promotes building friendships in the hostel so that students make relations for a lifetime.

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for Rishihood University MBA course is INR 7 Lacs as per an unofficial source. Candidates need to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the stipulated time, his or her admission stands cancelled. Apart from the course fee, aspirants also need to pay registration fee in the start of the admission process to apply for Rishihood course.

Rishihood University offers scholarships to deserving and meritorious studnets. The selection process for the scholarship is based on Online Application + Aptitude Test + Personal Interview. Studnets can also check the selection criteria from the points mentioned below:

college_info.intro:
GRD Institute of Management and Technology popular programmes include courses such as BSc, BTech and BPharma, offered in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses for the duration ranging from 3 years to 4 years. Admission to respective courses is based on merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation, depending on the level of the course opted for.
Moreover, the GRD IMT fee structure includes tuition fees ranging from INR 90K to INR 5.2 Lakh. For a course such as BSc, the annual intake is of 180 students, whereas, for BTech, the annual intake is of 510 students. BPharma on the other hand, is offered with an annual intake of 100 students. For more details around GRD Institute of Management and Technology popular programmes, check out the table below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    GRD Institute of Management and Technology offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, Diamond Ndt Inspection Services (P) Ltd, Samsung R And D Institute India Noida, Deloitte And Touche Assurancr Enterprise Risk And Services India Pvt Ltd, Terminal Contacts, Gndu Rc Sultanpur Lodhi, Dimple Advisory Pvt Ltd, Microtechcnc, Edvizo.

faqs.answer: A:    At GRD Institute of Management and Technology, BSc graduates have various job prospects across various industries. Students can explore career opportunities such as Data Analysts, environmental consultants, Laboratory Technicians, Quality control analysts, Science writers/communicators, Pharmaceutical sales representatives, and Health educators. These roles span fields such as Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Environmental Science, and Public Health, offering diverse paths for graduates to exp
faqs.question: What are the job prospects for B.Sc. graduates at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The GRD Institute of Management and Technology offers a diverse array of options available allowing students to improve their career prospects. The BA graduates have a wide range of career opportunities in fields such as Education, Public Administration, Business, Media, and Social Services. The programme equips students with a comprehensive skill set that is valuable across various industries.
faqs.question: What job opportunities are available for the BA programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    GRD Institute of Management and Technology accepts GATE scores for admission to its M.Tech courses. To be eligible candidates must pass a Master’s degree in a relevant discipline with 50% aggreagte from a recognised university. The university accepts GATE scores. Candidates must apply and appear for the GATE score and score good aggregate.
faqs.question: Does GRD IMT accept GATE scores for MTech?

faqs.answer: A:    GRD Institute of Management and Technology accepts the following entrance exams for admission to MBA:CAT:- which is generally known as (COMMON ADMISSION TEST)MAT:- (Management aptitude test)XAT:- (Xavier's aptitude test)SNAP:- (simbosis national aptitude test)Candidates must have passed in any of these exams to get admission in MBA in GDR institute of Management.
faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by GRD Institute of Management and Technology for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Hi,Documents required for admission to GRD Institute of Management and Technology:The candidate is required to have a 10th pass Mark Sheet/Certificate, 12th pass Mark Sheet/Certificate, Aadhar card, migration certificate, and passport-size photograph.
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to GRD Institute of Management and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates seeking admission to the BCom programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology, must ensure that they submit all necessary documents by the specified deadline. The required documents include: Academic transcripts or mark sheets, completed application form, passport-sized photographs, proof of identity (e.g., Aadhaar card, passport), and any additional documents specified by the institution.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I would not recommend joining this college.

review_content.Placements: To be honest with you sir/mam. Less than 50% of students got placed in my course. If we talk about the highest package it's around 1-2 LPA, the average package is around 1 LPA and the lowest package is Rs. 70,000 - Rs. 80,000. Top recruiters are TCS, Bebo, and Rubicon. Below 30% of students got internships. Top roles offered are engineering, data science, and cyber security.
review_content.Infrastructure: They don't even have Wi-Fi connections for each floor which makes it difficult to stay connected to Wi-Fi. Labs are decent not too good. Classrooms are good. The library is good, a place for students to study and work. Some of my friends are from the hostel. So they always talk about they give bad food, roti is very hard to eat, we are suffering here. If we look at the hostel building from the outside it will look fine but from the inside it's dirty, I'm not lying. The canteen is good there but they have expired food. Medical facilities are normal. Sports are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college review about placements, environment, college life, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 40% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Smart Data Enterprises, and Infosys visit the college for placements. The internship percentage in our college is about 30%, and most of the internships are unpaid. Top roles like software engineers and testers are offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have two grounds, one ground is big and the other is small. The library is well-facilitated and has Wi-Fi. There is a mess and canteen. Sports facilities are good but not up to the mark. Mess food quality is superb. It does not have medical facilities. We have a computer lab and a pharmacy lab.

The value of the scholarships varies, with some covering partial tuition fees and ot

course_faqs.question: What scholarships are available for BCom students at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
course_faqs.answer: GRD IMT provides a range of scholarships for BCom students, awarded based on merit, financial need, sports achievements, and other criteria. To be considered for a scholarship, prospective applicants must complete a scholarship application form available from the admissions office or downloadable from the GRD IMT website. Each scholarship has its eligibility requirements, and the institute offers a variety of scholarship options to assist students in different ways.

course_faqs.question: What is the BCom tuition fee at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
course_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for the BCom programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology varies from INR 66,000 to INR 96,000. In addition to the tuition fee, there are other expenses such as hostel fees, mess fees, etc. However, there is a one-time fee ranging from INR 5,000 to INR 15,000 that must be paid at the time of enrollment. These fee have been sourced from the official website or authorising body and are subject to change.

course_faqs.question: What is the one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
course_faqs.answer: The one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) programme at GRD IMT is INR 15,000. In addition, the tuition fee is INR 66,000, and the hostel fee is INR 2.70 lakh, bringing the total fee to INR 3.51 lakh. Those enrolling in GRD IMT courses will need to cover various fees, such as tuition, hostel, and mess fees, among others. Moreover, the mentioned fee is based on information from the official website/sanctioning body and should be considered a rough estimate, as it is subject to change.

course_faqs.question: What scholarships are available for B.A. students at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
course_faqs.answer: GRD IMT offers a variety of scholarships for BA students, which are granted based on merit, financial need, sports accomplishments, and other factors. overview_faqs.question: Is there a merit-based scholarship available for BCom students at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: At GRD Institute of Management and Technology (GRD IMT), merit-based scholarships are available for BCom students as well, who have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in their previous studies. To apply for merit-based scholarships, students need to submit the required documents, such as academic transcripts, proof of identity, financial statements, letters of recommendation, and a personal statement. The value of the scholarships varies, with some covering partial tuition fees and others covering full tuition fees or providing a stipend.

overview_faqs.question: What scholarships are available for BCom students at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: GRD IMT provides a range of scholarships for BCom students, awarded based on merit, financial need, sports achievements, and other criteria. To be considered for a scholarship, prospective applicants must complete a scholarship application form available from the admissions office or downloadable from the GRD IMT website. Each scholarship has its eligibility requirements, and the institute offers a variety of scholarship options to assist students in different ways.

overview_faqs.question: What is the BCom tuition fee at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for the BCom programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology varies from INR 66,000 to INR 96,000. In addition to the tuition fee, there are other expenses such as hostel fees, mess fees, etc. However, there is a one-time fee ranging from INR 5,000 to INR 15,000 that must be paid at the time of enrollment. These fee have been sourced from the official website or authorising body and are subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is the one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) at GRD Institute of Management and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: The one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) programme at GRD IMT is INR 15,000. In addition, the tuition fee is INR 66,000, and the hostel fee is INR 2.70 lakh, bringing the total fee to INR 3.51 lakh. Those enrolling in GRD IMT courses will need to cover various fees, such as tuition, hostel, and mess fees, among others. Moreover, the mentioned fee is based on information from the official website/sanctioning body and should be considered a rough estimate, as it is subject to change.

review_summary.college_name: GRD IMT Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Animation and Multimedia - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, there's no proper class or PC.

content.Placements: Not sure about placements case, they didn't provide an internship either. I don't know about placement of students into which company because I'm currently 3rd year student. Also, I heard from senior passed out students who told us that this college takes a long time to provide us with our own degree certificate.
content.Infrastructure: PC specs are so low that it can't even render a single video, it takes at least 15 minutes to start any software. It crashes so many times that we have to save our project every 5 minutes. Classroom is okay-okay, but there is no projector for better visual learning. They don't recharge Wi-Fi in a timely manner due to the lack of funds ig. There is a library, but it's way too far from our class.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed in my course. The highest package is 20 LPA. The average package ranges between 12 LPA - 15 LPA. The lowest package varies between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Infosys, Apps Squad, Microsoft, Google, etc., are top recruiting companies for my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi available in labs and library. Good infrastructure and facilities of classrooms, library, labs, and hostel are there. Canteen food is excellent. Mess food is also average. Sports and games facilities are good. Hostel is well clean and has facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend joining this college.

content.Placements: To be honest with you sir/mam. Less than 50% of students got placed in my course. If we talk about the highest package it's around 1-2 LPA, the average package is around 1 LPA and the lowest package is Rs. 70,000 - Rs. 80,000. Top recruiters are TCS, Bebo, and Rubicon. Below 30% of students got internships. Top roles offered are engineering, data science, and cyber security.
content.Infrastructure: They don't even have Wi-Fi connections for each floor which makes it difficult to stay connected to Wi-Fi. Labs are decent not too good. Classrooms are good. The library is good, a place for students to study and work. Some of my friends are from the hostel. So they always talk about they give bad food, roti is very hard to eat, we are suffering here. If we look at the hostel building from the outside it will look fine but from the inside it's dirty, I'm not lying. The canteen is good there but they have expired food. Medical facilities are normal. Sports are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college review about placements, environment, college life, and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Smart Data Enterprises, and Infosys visit the college for placements. The internship percentage in our college is about 30%, and most of the internships are unpaid. Top roles like software engineers and testers are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: We have two grounds, one ground is big and the other is small. The library is well-facilitated and has Wi-Fi. There is a mess and canteen. Sports facilities are good but not up to the mark. Mess food quality is superb. It does not have medical facilities. We have a computer lab and a pharmacy lab.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is an average college with wonderful faculty members and an outstanding location.

content.Placements: Last year, the number of students who got placed was quite high from B.Tech CSE. The highest package offered for a B.Tech student was 12 LPA, and the average or the lowest package was 5.5 LPA. Talking about internships, from the first year only, students get opportunities to gain new skills with good companies in their fields, and sometimes these internships come with pre-placement offers, which are very helpful for the students.
content.Infrastructure: In my course, they provide four computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi built in for smooth use, and also one very spacious library. Classes are also very good. Talking about hostel facilities, the rooms are good, there is a gym, and for games, there are two grounds. Every year, they organize different tournaments.

admission_overview.college_name: GRD IMT Dehradun Courses Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: GRD Institute of Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GRD IMT admission 2025 is open. The college offers merit-based admission. Further, for BTech, MBA, Bpharma, MTech and other courses college accepts various entrance exam scores. GRD Institute of Management and Technology offers UG, PG and diploma courses in various specialisations. Students interested in admission to GRD IMT must appear for entrance exams and fill out the eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Read the below article to know more about the GRD IMT admission process, course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:

GRD Institute of Management and Technology offers both merit and entrance-based admission to all its courses. Candidates looking for admission must fill out the admission criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree. After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college for admission to their respective courses. Want to know more about GRD Institute of Management and Technology course eligibility and selection criteria go through the detailed breakdown:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 withMathematicsas a compulsory subject with 50% aggregate
Merit-Based
Class 10and Class 12 with 50% aggregate inPhysics, Chemistry and Maths from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Class 10, Class 12 and Graduation degree with 50% aggregate
CAT/ MAT/XAT/ SNAP
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Physics,Chemistryand Maths or Biology from a recognised board
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in the relevant field with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) from a recognised university
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Accountancy,Economicsand Maths (as optional subject) andEnglishas main subject from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreGRD Institute of Management and Technology courses:

GRD Institute of Management and Technology admission procedure has a multi-step process, which has to be fulfilled by all the students to get admission. It starts with the application, students are required to apply and appear for the respective entrance exam and counselling for their desired course. Find below theGRD Institute of Management and Technology admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

Students seeking admission to the GRD Institute of Management and Technology must full fill the admission criteria before apply for admission. After completing the criteria, students are also required to register themselves by visiting the official website.
Step 2: GRD IMT Selection Criteria

After applying for the entrance exam accepted by the college for admission toMBA, BTech,BPharma, MTech and other courses. Additionally, for other courses, students must fill out the basic eligibility criteria which include that UG candidates must passClass 12and PG candidates must have a graduation degree.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

After the final round, the college releases the merit list based on the entrance exam score and the last qualifying exam score. The students get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to submit theGRD IMT course feeto lock in the final seat.

hostel.description:
Hostel service are offered on a yearly basis only. Separate on-campus hostels for boys and girls are available, providing the following facilities:
? 24/7 security with CCTV surveillance
? Nutritious food option (vegetarian and non-vegetarian)
? Laundry service
? Well-equipped gymnasium
? Indoor and outdoor games
? Round-the-clock hot and cold water supply
? High-speed Wi-Fi connectivity

library.description: The Institute has a well-stocked spacious library with exclusive digital and book bank sections. It is stocked with a massive knowledge and referral resources right from exhaustive subject-wise books to easy-to-read CD-ROMs. They also put the worldwide web at the disposal of the students to access educational and research-based websites 24×7. The central library is a member of DELNET. It has a subscriber of HBR, Bentham and other reputed journals for research and higher studies.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, there's no proper class or PC.
reviews.review_text: PC specs are so low that it can't even render a single video, it takes at least 15 minutes to start any software. It crashes so many times that we have to save our project every 5 minutes. Classroom is okay-okay, but there is no projector for better visual learning. They don't recharge Wi-Fi in a timely manner due to the lack of funds ig. There is a library, but it's way too far from our class.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi available in labs and library. Good infrastructure and facilities of classrooms, library, labs, and hostel are there. Canteen food is excellent. Mess food is also average. Sports and games facilities are good. Hostel is well clean and has facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: They don't even have Wi-Fi connections for each floor which makes it difficult to stay connected to Wi-Fi. Labs are decent not too good. Classrooms are good. The library is good, a place for students to study and work. Some of my friends are from the hostel. So they always talk about they give bad food, roti is very hard to eat, we are suffering here. If we look at the hostel building from the outside it will look fine but from the inside it's dirty, I'm not lying. The canteen is good there but ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college review about placements, environment, college life, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have two grounds, one ground is big and the other is small. The library is well-facilitated and has Wi-Fi. There is a mess and canteen. Sports facilities are good but not up to the mark. Mess food quality is superb. It does not have medical facilities. We have a computer lab and a pharmacy lab.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college with wonderful faculty members and an outstanding location.
reviews.review_text: In my course, they provide four computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi built in for smooth use, and also one very spacious library. Classes are also very good. Talking about hostel facilities, the rooms are good, there is a gym, and for games, there are two grounds. Every year, they organize different tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: About the college GRD PG IMT Dehradun .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good as it is one of the oldest colleges of pharmacy in Dehradun. It is located at a very prime location, which is well connected to public transport. The central library has many good publications. The hostel life is also good, and the food is good when compared to other college hostels.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in a nutshell.
reviews.review_text: When I was a student, until the third year, the infrastructure was okay, but not very good. But in my fourth year and after I graduated, the infrastructure improved to top-notch quality. Computer labs are amazing, the library is beautiful now, a few classrooms are somewhat good, and a few are excellent. Mechanical engineering labs are decent, and electrical labs and other labs are amazing. GD halls are also equipped with the best furniture now. Grounds are well-maintained, and so are the courts....

reviews.review_heading: Let’s Know Guru Ram Dass Institute of Management and Technology
reviews.review_text: Environment over here is very good as college is near hills. The area over here has good infrastructure and facilities are very good. The infrastructure of our course is too good; the university is going with the trending technology. Those who opt for a hostel will get a good life for four years.

reviews.review_heading: GRD Institute of Management and Technology College review.
reviews.review_text: This course provides computer labs and a Wi-Fi equipped library to study about the respective field. The classrooms are normal and lack special equipment. Hostel facilities include meals three times a day and an evening snack. The food quality is good. A volleyball court is available inside the hostel. Medical facilities are provided in the warden's room.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placement in 2015 really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There was a separate Wi-Fi network for each class, and lab classes were held every other day. The libraries were computerized and well-stocked with books. The food in the hostel mess and canteen was of good quality, and cleanliness was a top priority for the college.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is good, infrastructure is awesome and faculty is really helpful.
reviews.review_text: I liked the campus of the GRD Institute of Management and Technology. It has many facilities, such as a library, a gym, a separate ground for hosts, a medical facility, and a canteen that serves good food.

reviews.review_heading: Great place for undergraduate persons to get a good placement in 2024 and further.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the course and hostel is quite decent, with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and good quality food in the hostel mess and canteen. Sports games, like a cricket tournament held in the previous semester, or badminton and basketball tournaments that happened, are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and would suggest everyone out there join the college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and structures are very good and clean. The hostel is excellent, providing very good food in both girls' and boys' hostels. There are three large grounds on the college premises, sufficient for sports activities. The college provides Wi-Fi facilities on every floor of the building, including the canteen, boys' hostel, and girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GRD Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The campus is spread over 14 acres. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facilities are average. The food is served  four times a day. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories and classrooms are well-maintained. The infrastructure of our college is very authentic and modern. The girls' hostel doesn't provide hot water or a gymnasium. The food served in the mess is average.

college_info.college_name: GRD IMT Dehradun Scholarship Details

paragraphs: At GRD Institute of Management and Technology (GRD IMT), merit-based scholarships are available for BCom students as well, who have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in their previous studies. To apply for merit-based scholarships, students need to submit the required documents, such as academic transcripts, proof of identity, financial statements, letters of recommendation, and a personal statement. The value of the scholarships varies, with some covering partial tuition fees and others covering full tuition fees or providing a stipend.

The tuition fee for the BCom programme at GRD Institute of Management and Technology varies from INR 66,000 to INR 96,000. In addition to the tuition fee, there are other expenses such as hostel fees, mess fees, etc. However, there is a one-time fee ranging from INR 5,000 to INR 15,000 that must be paid at the time of enrollment. These fee have been sourced from the official website or authorising body and are subject to change.

The one-time fee for the BCom (Hons.) programme at GRD IMT is INR 15,000. In addition, the tuition fee is INR 66,000, and the hostel fee is INR 2.70 lakh, bringing the total fee to INR 3.51 lakh. Those enrolling in GRD IMT courses will need to cover various fees, such as tuition, hostel, and mess fees, among others. Moreover, the mentioned fee is based on information from the official website/sanctioning body and should be considered a rough estimate, as it is subject to change.

Yes, GRD Institute of Management and Technology provides merit-based scholarships for BSc students who have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in their previous studies. These scholarships usually necessitate academic transcripts, proof of identity, financial statements, letters of recommendation, and a personal statement. While eligibility requirements may vary, exceptional academic achievement is an important factor.
