review_summary.college_name: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in CSE (Artificial intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: AVIT offers quality education, vibrant campus life, and strong industry-focused training.

content.Placements: AVIT provides a well-structured placement ecosystem with reputable recruiters and programs. However, success heavily depends on strong academics, hands-on technical skills, project experience, and a proactive job search. Both on- and off-campus, it's a very good college for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology offers a well-maintained and student-friendly infrastructure that supports both academic and extracurricular development. The campus is spread across a spacious and green environment with all the essentials. The hostel and campus are very beautiful.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: About the college: Giving importance to sports.

content.Placements: 80 to 90% of students got placed. The remaining plan for higher studies. The highest package is around 10-15 LPA. The lowest is 2 LPA. The average is around 2.5 to 5 LPA. Blitz Works, Intel, Amazon, etc., visit the college. All students worked as interns in IoT platform in Kritilabs. Software developer, etc., roles are there
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facilities are good on campus. There are labs for us like a microwave lab, microcontroller/processors lab, and electronics lab. In classrooms, smart boards and seminar halls are there. There are many other things. The library has access to offline. From mobile phones also we can read books. On sports days, sports are held.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is good but hostel is waste. Infrastructure of college is good for CSE.

content.Placements: There are no top companies but new startups will come. Recruitment is there but not by your dream companies like Google and Microsoft. You will get product based jobs and low salary. You should think and learn good so that you will get good jobs and a career.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good but hostel is worst. But you should think of it and all CSE is good another group is waste. I think of it before joining so you should be careful right. They will send home when you want so please avoid hostel and check another. Mess is good but hostel is worse. You should be within your limits. All e-library and labs will be open till 8:00 PM so be nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied and everything is good also the faculty members are helpful.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students got placements in the course I am studying. All students got internships from this course. The average package offered in our course, which has been referred from the college would be about 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very good. It has options in rooms whether we want AC or non-AC and whether we want four sharing. It also provides food facilities. Other things like cleaning rooms and mess are done very well by the workers, they keep all the things clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It’s a work in progress, but it's doing well now.

content.Placements: As per my knowledge, placement in my course is very low, around 1%. The packages offered range between 2 LPA to 4 LPA. No companies have actively come for recruitment so far, but the process is ongoing. Only a few students (around 1%) have secured internships. Since placements are low, specific roles are not well-defined yet.
content.Infrastructure: Department has Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. However, the quality of facilities is not up to the mark, which is why I reduced stars for it. Hostel is good, providing decent living conditions. Mess and canteen food is average, but manageable. Basic medical facilities are available, but not very advanced. Sports facilities are available, but they could be improved.

admission_overview.college_name: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology Admission: Eligibility, Application Process, Courses & Fees

admission_process.title: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology admission 2025 is merit-based for programmes offered at the UG, PG, and Doctorate levels. The BTech programme is offered under nine specialisations, such as Biomedical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and Electrical and Electronics Engineering.Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technologyoffers an MTech programme under six specialisations Power Systems Engineering, Embedded Systems Technologies, Computer Science and Engineering and Construction Engineering and Management. The college also offers lateral entry for the BTech programme. along with the BTech programme for working professionals.

Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology admission process 2025 is completely online. Candidates can visit the official website and register along with the payment of the registration fee. Details around the admission criteria and fees for allAarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology coursesoffered by this institute are listed below:

Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology is open for applications in all its courses. To enter, the candidates need to complete the registration process. Here is how you can apply:Step 1:The application process is online. Candidates must fill in their details, including name, email, phone number, and work experience.In some cases, an application fee may be required.

Step 2:Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technologyevaluates the application forms of the candidates to confirm eligibility. The selection ofAarupadai Veedu Institute of TechnologyStudies courses is based on Merit.
Step 3:The institute informs the selected aspirants of their admission status. Once shortlisted, candidates need to pay theAarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology feeto confirm their seat.

headings.text: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection
Steps for Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: AVIT offers full-time undergraduate B.E. and BTech degree programmes to eligible candidates. The duration of the course is four- years. To be eligible for admission, candidates must have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggreagte in PCM. Admission to the B.E. and BTech. programme is granted on the basis of merit.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BTech at AVIT?
faqs.answer: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology offers BE and BTech at UG level in several specialisations, such as Biotechnology, Civel Engineering etc. Admission to BE/BTech is merit- based at the institute. AVIT also accepts admission on the basis ofVMRF- SMART testforEngineering programmes. Candidates can scan theQR Codeto apply online and pay the fee towards VMRF-SMART 2024-25 application through various payment mode.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for admission to Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Admission into AVIT is merit-oriented in most cases, except for BTech, for which the institute also takes into consideration scores in the VMRF-SMART entrance exam. Admissions into M.Tech and MBA do not call for an entrance exam since they are admitted on the basis of graduation marks. Candidates have to satisfy the minimum eligibility requirement for admission. Academic performance ensures fair selection.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at AVIT?
faqs.answer: AVIT offers full-time undergraduate BE/BTech degree programmes to eligible candidates. The duration of the course is four- years. To be eligible for admission, candidates must have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggreagte in PCM. Admission to the BE/BTech. programme is granted on the basis of merit.

courses_data.name: Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: AVIT offers regular full-time postgraduate level courses in Engineering stream. The duration for the courses is two- years and it is approved by AICTE. To be eligible for admission, candidates must have a BTech degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate in the qualifying exams. AVIT Chennai also offers part-time M.E. and MTech at PG level forthree-years.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in M.Tech at AVIT Chennai?
faqs.answer: AVIT offers regular full-time postgraduate level courses in Engineering field. The duration for the courses is two- years and it is approved by AICTE. To be eligible for admission, candidates must have a BTech degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate in the qualifying exams. GATE qualifyed candidates will be given preference.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for M.Tech AVIT Chennai?
faqs.answer: The total intake for ME/MTech programmes at AVIT Chennai is 108. All programmes are approved by AICTE. There are various specialisation available including  Biotechnology, Computer Science and Engineering, Manufacturing Engineering, Power System Engineering etc.For AVIT students who opt to pursue a postgraduate degree at AVIT, a 50% academic scholarship is available.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for AVIT Chennai admission?
faqs.answer: AVIT Chennai eligibility criteria varies course to course. Admission is granted on the basis of merit list for different courses such as MTech, BSc, BDes etc. Below are the AVIT Chennai eligibility and selection criteria details for various courses:CoursesEligibilitySelectionBE/ BTechClass 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregateMerit-basedME/MTechMinimum 50% aggregate in graduationMerit-basedGATE qualified candidates are given preferenceBScClass 12Merit-basedBDesClass 12Merit-based

faqs.question: What is the admission process for AVIT Chennai?
faqs.answer: AVIT Chennai admission process 2025 ismerit-basedfor majority of the courses. Eligible candidates can apply through both online and offline mode for AVIT courses. The institute also accepts admission on the basis ofVMRF- SMARTtest forEngineering programmes. Candidates can scan theQR Codeto apply online and pay the fee towards VMRF-SMART application through various payment mode. Candidates must have 50% aggregate in Class 12 to get admission in UG courses

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions 2025 are open at Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology. Candidates willing to get admission must take part in the Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must have knolwdge of their Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology eligibility criteria and apply accordingly.

reviews.review_heading: AVIT offers quality education, vibrant campus life, and strong industry-focused training.

reviews.review_heading: About the college: Giving importance to sports.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are good on campus. There are labs for us like a microwave lab, microcontroller/processors lab, and electronics lab. In classrooms, smart boards and seminar halls are there. There are many other things. The library has access to offline. From mobile phones also we can read books. On sports days, sports are held.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but hostel is waste. Infrastructure of college is good for CSE.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but hostel is worst. But you should think of it and all CSE is good another group is waste. I think of it before joining so you should be careful right. They will send home when you want so please avoid hostel and check another. Mess is good but hostel is worse. You should be within your limits. All e-library and labs will be open till 8:00 PM so be nice.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and everything is good also the faculty members are helpful.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good. It has options in rooms whether we want AC or non-AC and whether we want four sharing. It also provides food facilities. Other things like cleaning rooms and mess are done very well by the workers, they keep all the things clean.

reviews.review_heading: It’s a work in progress, but it's doing well now.
reviews.review_text: Department has Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. However, the quality of facilities is not up to the mark, which is why I reduced stars for it. Hostel is good, providing decent living conditions. Mess and canteen food is average, but manageable. Basic medical facilities are available, but not very advanced. Sports facilities are available, but they could be improved.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities. I recommend students study here.
reviews.review_text: Everything is perfect. It was worse when I joined in 2021. Now in 2025, everything is perfect. It has nice playgrounds, a canteen, and an auditorium. The hostel facility is somewhat good because I stayed in it only in 1st year, and now, it has changed too much. I did not visit it recently.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education with an industry-ready curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped labs, classrooms with projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, and access to the central library with a good collection of books and e-books. The hostel facility is pretty decent with clean rooms, and the mess provides clean and hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Totally our college is best for money we pay and we can enjoy.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they provide Wi-Fi, multi-specialty labs, and supreme class infrastructure. In terms of infrastructure our college is best at it. They provide unlimited Wi-Fi access all over the college. Hostel, toilets, and bathrooms are very clean and perfect.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with this college because the faculty are good, and placements are also go
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in teaching. Labs are good; especially the computer lab is much better than I expected. Food is good, but not bad. They give equal importance to sports. Wi-Fi has good strength. Libraries are very broad. Digital classrooms are enabled with Wi-Fi and air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure in the college.
reviews.review_text: A maximum of 15 percent of students get placed. The maximum salary package was 6 Lacs per annum. Some companies that came for recruitment are Hexaware, Qspider, and Infinitive. Some top roles offered were student graduate trainees, later posted in the company at Hexaware.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, placement in 2025, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are very clean and have a neat ambiance. Hostel food is also good and eatable. Classrooms and labs are very neat and we also have digital classrooms. Every classroom has an air-conditioner and smart board. The outside area of the campus is also neat. There are bus facilities always available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am a cyber security student in my final year, and I liked the journey of these 4 years.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge playground for cricket, football, and tennis. There are good canteen facilities. We have hostel facilities. There is a garden, a green campus, and a water plant. The campus is good for all state students. The infrastructure, labs, playground, and classroom facilities are worth the money paid. There are good sports and playground facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because the teachers are very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good, and it has a very big campus. This is India, one of the top colleges. This college's branch is out of India, too, like Malaysia, Singapore, The qualities of the facilities of our hostel are free Wi-Fi, free library books, and good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a green and serene atmosphere. It provides the perfect ambiance for peaceful and creative learning.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable college for average students.
reviews.review_text: This campus is Wi-Fi-enabled, so we can get high-speed internet and use unlimited data for our studies. We can access the central library where we can get various books, magazines, and research papers. The food served is good. They serve separate food for North Indian students.

college_info.intro:
Noorul Islam University offers three-year BA, BCA, BCom, BE, BSc, BASLP, BBA, and other courses to students at the undergraduate level. Moreover, at the postgraduate level, Noorul Islam University offers one to two-year MCA, MSc, MBA, ME, and MA courses to students. The university also offers PG diploma and PhD courses to the students.
The flagship programme offered at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education is the BE in various specialisations, including Software Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Biomedical Science & Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The university provides this programme to students at the UG level. The university offers the BE programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education courses strive to enhance students' learning experience to prepare them for the industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses, along with Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education fees and their respective eligibility:

placements.overview: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission is open for various programmes. The university provides over 60 courses across multiple specialisations such as Engineering, Business Administration, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. The university offers various courses such as BE, BBA, MBA, ME, etc. The selection criteria are entrance-based, NICHE entrance exam followed by a personal interview. To get admitted to NICHE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers a PhD programme. faqs.question: Q: Is Noorul Islam Centre For Higher Education a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Indeed, one very famous institution is the Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education. It is a private institution based at Kumarakovil in Tamil Nadu, India. In 2008, the Ministry of Human Resource Development declared the Centre that was established in 1989 as a deemed university. The institution offers undergraduate and graduate studies in such fields as engineering, administration, science, and the arts. It holds an A+ grade rating and is NAAC accredited. It has established an impeccable reputation of high standards, highly professional teachers, cutting-edge technology, and superlative research. paragraphs: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission 2025is open for various courses. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BBA, MBA, ME, etc. The selection criteria are entrance-based, NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI. To get admitted to NICHE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process atNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Educationis conducted online. However, students can also collect the form from the university by visiting the campus. Read the article to know more aboutNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Educationcourse admission2025.

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission is openfor various programmes. The university provides over 60 courses across multiple specialisations such as Engineering, Business Administration, Management etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Students seeking to apply to the offered programmes can refer to the following table to learn aboutNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission 2025highlights:

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admissionsis completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various course programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., www.niuniv.com. The application fee is INR 500. However, candidates can also obtain the form from the university.
STEP 2: Selection

The university selects candidates based on university-level entrance exam scores, i.e., NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI for various course admission. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.answer: The NICHE Kanyakumari placements 2025 concluded with 190 students placed. A total of 18 companies participated in the drive. The companies presented more than 305 job offers. The highest package offered was INR 10.12 LPA. The average package stood at INR 3.06 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education placements?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education placements 2025 was INR 10.12 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered during placements 2024 was INR 9 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the placement activities organised at NICHE Kanyakumari?
faqs.answer: Some of the initiatives and activities organised by the Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education placement cell are mentioned below: Training Programmes: To improve students' soft skills, technical skills, aptitude, and communication talents. Industry Interaction: To give students insight into market trends, expectations, and skill requirements, regular meetings with industry professionals are arranged Opportunities for Internships: Encouraging students to participate in internships is a major area of concentration. Placement Drives: Renowned businesses from a range of industries visit the campus to undertake recruitment processes. Career Guidance: To help students make educated career decisions and get ready for the hiring process.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at NICHE Kanyakumari?
faqs.answer: The Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education average package recorded for the 2025 placements was INR 3.06 LPA. Earlier, the average salary offered to the 2024 batch was INR 2.4 LPA. From 2025 to 2024, a growth of 28% was observed.

reviews.review_heading: The best university in the whole Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are unbelievable. They provide the needed equipment according to the courses. Classrooms are very decent. They also provide multi-specialty labs for animation students. The hostel is also well-maintained and beautifully maintained by staff.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is amazing. Free Wi-Fi is available. College bus service is available. Administrative staffs and other working staffs are friendly. College libaray is large and has books according to every department. Every class is smart class. There is a separate building for labs.

reviews.review_heading: About Noorul Islam University.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-maintained infrastructure on college campus with Wi-Fi, labs, library, and it is an eco-friendly campus. Hostel and hostel food are not bad, but it varies among students because students from North India don't like those foods.

reviews.review_heading: This college is highly a good option for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course are highlightable. This course has been moving a great demand for now and in future. Our department and our classrooms are well-equipped and labs and labs are well-settled and clean. Hostel is well-spacious and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Noorul Islam:The Walk Of Life
reviews.review_text: The overall  infrastructural area was impressive as it has a location on uphill and has wonderful view.The classrooms and labs are impressive as it was highly developed for out studies.The library is spacious and huge and had a vast collection of books which is great.The Hostel facilities are great student staff interactions are too good and has a great bond.The quality of the food is superb and tasty.The institution showed great support for sports and games and even helped the students to parti...

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure, Eco-Friendly Campus
reviews.review_text: The hostel mess food is not suitable for everyone. There is a gym in the hostel for both boys and girls. Free Wi-Fi is available for students. The health center operates 24/7. Various sports activities are offered, including inter-college competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Right one for career, good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus. Classrooms are quite okay. The library is notable as it has a vast collection of books on various categories. They conduct various clubs like arts, literature, sports, eco-green club, social service club, yoga, and more. Hostel mess food might not be okay for everyone, but many canteens are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: So dissatisfied with placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, and the food is also good. I'm not a hosteler. But there is no Wi-Fi connection. And not a good tower for any SIM; some time it's been total tower down also happen. There are many sports that are unimportant to sports and are not available.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of discrimination.
reviews.review_text: Teachers are very good and friendly to all. They are very skilled, and teaching subjects professionally will be very useful to our career. The hostel's quality and facilities are very good. The food and mess canteen are all very clean and good.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of discrimination.
reviews.review_text: The hostel stay is so comfortable that there are no words to describe it. Moreover, the food is also very clean and hygienic. There's currently no power cutting, and 24-hour Wi-Fi is provided with high-speed internet. Additionally, there is extensive security for girls, making them feel safer.

reviews.review_heading: I am very grateful to be in.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course, including Wi-Fi lab classrooms, are very comfy and pleasant, and it includes a nice library area, which gives the students a bright future. The university enables every little facility to improve our skills.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, with well-equipped labs and well-educated teachers in high-teaching classrooms with Wi-Fi access throughout the campus. I am a day student, although I know the facilities of the hostel. The hostel was super cool, with many amenities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good campus. But the canteen is the only drawback.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good infrastructure. We have lots of trees on the campus, and the classrooms are okay. The canteen on the campus is not good; that's the only drawback on the campus. On campus, I can breathe fresh air, and the environment itself gives me peace of mind.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has average infrastructure. We have state-of-the-art infrastructure. But there is no good canteen on the campus. Good labs are all in good working condition, but not all are clean. Good green land under the mountains. Most of the fans and lights are not working.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is up to standard, and all the needed facilities are provided for the students. The labs have all the necessary facilities and also have a new iOS lab, which was inaugurated 3 months back. Medical facilities are provided to all the students for free.

NICHE accepts online applications for all its programmes at UG, PG, and Doctorate levels. Interested candidates who meet the eligibility requirements can directly apply to the official website. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 500 which is non-refundable.

Yes, Students at NICHE can apply for various scholarships as per their eligibility criteria. Some of the scholarships offered are the NICHE Steve Jobs Scholarship, the Academic Excellence Scholarship, the NCC Cadet Scholarship, the COVID crisis relief Scholarship, the Student Support Scholarship for differently-abled students, and the Regional (Kanyakumari) Scholarship. reviews_list.review_title: Need improvement for better.

review_content.Placements: The recruiting companies are so good. All those companies are in the 4th and 5th grades. The maximum salary package was INR 2 LPA. Those companies wouldn't assure you any permanent job or any hike after a certain time. Not even half the students are still working for the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good, but there is no Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are not that good. Hostel rooms are okay but they're not suitable for the food they provide there. Sometimes the food is good but most of the time it is not so good. Here, I am not talking about taste. No canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The environment and faculty members are very good.

review_content.Placements: In our college from past year students, more than 50% of the students got placed in companies. Our college provides 5 departments in BE and 3 departments in diploma. Diploma departments and also ME courses started 2 years ago. Companies like Amazon and Rolls-Royce are recruiting here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college environment is good. Hostel rooms are good, and we also have separate space for cloth washing. The hostel mess food is good, and the cost is affordable for every student. Hostel students can also use the gym provided by the college, and it is absolutely free.

For further details, candidates can refer to the table below, which outlines the courses available at Sree Sakthi Engineering College, along with their admission eligibility and tuition fees:

faqs.answer: Sree Sakthi Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class (SSLC/Matriculation) examination or equivalent qualification from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Sree Sakthi Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: Sree Sakthi Engineering College offers Degree and Diploma courses including 5 UG and 2 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Sree Sakthi Engineering College has specializations such as After 10th Diploma specializations in Automobile Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Sree Sakthi Engineering College?

faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Sree Sakthi Engineering College are After 1th Diploma, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Sree Sakthi Engineering College has a rating of 4.4 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.5, 4.3, 5 and 4.3 as per reviews by students.

content.Infrastructure: My college infrastructure is so bad and there are only two blocks and classrooms are not available for upcoming students.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are not good. They don't have much knowledge about the course and they are average in teaching.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Sree sakthi engineering college.

content.Placements: According to 2024 placements, as they give 100 Percentage placement results. Some nearby companies gave some internship opportunities at 2 and 3 year itself. As they provide stipend too. We got placed in top companies like TCS, HCL, Accenture, Zoho and so-on.
content.Infrastructure: We have good hostel facilities as three members can share a room. As seperate hostel facilities for boys and girls students. And there is a highly enhanced security system within the hostel with CCTV cameras present at all over the campus. And it's an eco-friendly environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Need improvement for better.

content.Placements: The recruiting companies are so good. All those companies are in the 4th and 5th grades. The maximum salary package was INR 2 LPA. Those companies wouldn't assure you any permanent job or any hike after a certain time. Not even half the students are still working for the companies.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good, but there is no Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are not that good. Hostel rooms are okay but they're not suitable for the food they provide there. Sometimes the food is good but most of the time it is not so good. Here, I am not talking about taste. No canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The environment and faculty members are very good.

content.Placements: In our college from past year students, more than 50% of the students got placed in companies. Our college provides 5 departments in BE and 3 departments in diploma. Diploma departments and also ME courses started 2 years ago. Companies like Amazon and Rolls-Royce are recruiting here.
content.Infrastructure: The college environment is good. Hostel rooms are good, and we also have separate space for cloth washing. The hostel mess food is good, and the cost is affordable for every student. Hostel students can also use the gym provided by the college, and it is absolutely free.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sree Sakthi Engineering College.

content.Placements: The college provides good placement training, and all students get placed. All students can gain more experience and enhance their skills. The placement staff members are very helpful for all students. Around 90-100 companies visit the campus to offer placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is nice. It is easy to commute to different classes. Hostel facilities are also good. There is a canteen near the classroom, so it is very useful during breaks. The college offers a natural environment which attracts everyone.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sree Sakthi Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sree Sakthi Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class (SSLC/Matriculation) examination or equivalent qualification from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of emplo

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely average college.

faqs.question: What are the details required to check the KEAM result?
faqs.answer: To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below:Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely average college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available, with good Wi-Fi labs and classrooms. Good hostel, average food. The facility quality is good. The mess, canteen, medical, everything is okay, so basically, the infrastructure and campus are good. There are 4 canteens here, so it's good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is awesome for its faculty and facilities, with a good campus and placements.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure of the college campus are very good. 
There is Wi-Fi connection everywhere on the campus. Labs have the latest technologies and machinery. The library has a wide range of books and journals available and can also be lent. The library also has an app.
The quality of food in the hostel was pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Here, each department has different blocks. Classrooms are spacious and well-equipped. Fully Wi-Fi facilitated eco green campus. Labs with high technologies and good facilities. A spacious common library and specified libraries for various departments. Good canteens and emergency medical facilities are available. There is a spacious auditorium for programs.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is clean and tidy. We have a bed and fan in every room. The mess food is very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides highly educated faculty members and some of them are very friendly.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi at college campuses and hostel. Our computer labs are fully autonomous and air-conditioned. We use touch screen TVs for teaching students. Hostel is not bad, but sometimes the food of the hostel is too bad. Hostel rooms are well maintained, and rooms are cleaned weekly once.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus with facilities and infrastructure, bad placements, and average hostel.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were very good. The college had spacious classes and well-structured buildings. Free Wi-Fi was available for students. Labs were well-equipped, and the library had almost all the books you ever needed. Coming to the hostel, it's not bad but not too good either. The quality of food was great, but the rooms were a mess. Sports and games provided were great too.

reviews.review_heading: Reflection because college is giving me all the good and bad thing that which are reflection on me.
reviews.review_text: The campus is occupied with Wi-Fi connectivity accessible in classrooms and libraries to support students for academic and research purposes. There are computing labs and modern hardware and MATLAB python for coding needs and are much better for artificial intelligence and data Science students. And about classrooms smart classrooms with projectors are for interactive learning. Spacious and well-lit seating arrangements for accommodation for students comfortable. And about library houses full of...

reviews.review_heading: About my MESCE. Best placement providing college in town.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is best and very environment. My college has free Wi-Fi in every department and every building, and lab facilities are so good, and lab technicians are so supportive. I am a hostler, hostel food and accommodation are so good.

reviews.review_heading: Good aesthetics and good faculties. Fees structure depends on your quota.
reviews.review_text:
The course is good, and we have a good faculty team with great support for both academics and extracurricular activities inside the department. Fully wifi college, good classrooms, one good library and also a large auditorium, and also a canteen and 2-3 small tea shops inside college run by third parties.
Coming to the men's hostel is a 4/5 rating. But for ladies, it is a 2/5 rating. But is cheap, with a maximum of 4,000 per month, which includes a food room and other facilities. Ladies hostel h...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, good placements, and great campus.
reviews.review_text: We have a large and spacious library. The classroom and lab facilities are good. The lab has proper computers to accommodate all the students from a class and proper working Wi-Fi is available on campus. The hostel is quite good and the food is okay. The college supports sports and arts and also has its own cricket and football teams.

reviews.review_heading: MESCE is a college were CEOs and many entrepreneurs were born.
reviews.review_text: There is a college ground beside hostel which have volleyball court, basketball court, and also football field. The food provided in the hostel mess is also great compared to other college hostels. There are separate buildings for different departments. College provides free Wi-Fi in hostel and in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with currently ongoing situation in college.
reviews.review_text: The college is full of facilities for students. There is plenty of Wi-Fi for students all over campus and in the hostel. All classrooms are digitalized. There is a waste library for books. There is a hostel for women and men. The mess and canteen are always clean. There are different types of sports for those who are interested.

reviews.review_heading: Good option for MBA. Good faculty and nice campus.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good and classrooms are nice. No A/C is present in the classes but seminar hall is good. Canteen is average. Wi-Fi is also poor. Overall, it is okay. Library is vast and almost all the textbooks are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilites, above average placement record and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of useful facilities in both college and hostel. College Facilities include Wi-Fi, Fab labs, Seminar halls, Auditorium and Library, etc. Hostel accommodates 3 people in a room and the overall package for hostel is worth what you're paying for which is considerably cheap compared to other colleges. The quality of food is above average, and the menu is inclusive of all types of native dishes.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are better. The food quality is decent. A Wi-Fi facility is also available. The hostel fee is perfect. Facilities and infrastructure are good. This college also has laboratories, Wi-Fi, and other amenities. It also provides a huge library, and several books are available.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for mining students and average placement in electronics .

review_content.Placements: The average package of this college is 3 LPA. Mining students get a higher package, up to 16 LPA, in companies like Vedanta, etc. Also, the TNP (Training and Placement) manager brings some worker-type jobs for those who are not placed. It's also not a job; it is an apprenticeship for 1 year with a bond of at least 1 year. Mining placements are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are conducted in all branches, especially in CSE and ECE branches. Gadgets are updated for the year 2024, and all lab coordinators are good. Hostel food is not good in the girls' hostel. The library is good for students; there are a lot of books they can borrow from there. The boys' hostel is average.

reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges for mining engineering.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. Laboratories and classrooms are average. Several books are available in the library. Hostel is decent in this college. Sports are conducted. Mess is average. Electricity facility is available 24X7. Hostel rooms are very good. The security facility is very good.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are hard. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you guys want to take admission with a lower percentile, go for it.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of students are placed, but it depends on how you perform in the campus round. The college provides placement opportunities, but it's all about us, and it depends on us. In our electrical branch, companies like Hexawave and Radiant come every year for mass hiring, and almost all the students get placed in between 3 to 5 LPA or above.
content.Infrastructure: The college is a little bit old, but the infrastructure is still good for an engineering college. In the electrical department, there are high-voltage labs found in our college, which is very rare. But, if you want to do electrical engineering in our college, you won’t get all the facilities available in our department.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College Life and Experience

content.Placements: 273+ placements were secured this year, with a minimum package of 2.5 lakhs and a maximum of 16 lakhs. TCS and Infosys are among the companies with good placement records, and faculty members help us crack interviews and aptitude tests, ensuring we get good placements. Additionally, there will be internships for all students every year.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is good, and the teaching is amazing. There is sometimes a lack of network coverage, but overall, everything is good. The canteen food is also delicious. Sports activities are organized at the college level, and cultural events are also organized, which are amazing.

description: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 250839 and 579907 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 250839, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 358836.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 250839.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 28.28 and 36.52, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Mining, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 36.52. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 28.28,

Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Mining turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 36.52. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 38.54 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

Getting an idea of different years’ cutoff trends helps students prepare better for upcoming examinations. To assist with the same, the table below provides MHT CET cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023. Students can download the year-wise PDF for future reference.

hostel_campus.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering

reviews.review_heading: If you guys want to take admission with a lower percentile, go for it.
reviews.review_text: The college is a little bit old, but the infrastructure is still good for an engineering college. In the electrical department, there are high-voltage labs found in our college, which is very rare. But, if you want to do electrical engineering in our college, you won’t get all the facilities available in our department.

reviews.review_heading: College Life and Experience
reviews.review_text: The faculty is good, and the teaching is amazing. There is sometimes a lack of network coverage, but overall, everything is good. The canteen food is also delicious. Sports activities are organized at the college level, and cultural events are also organized, which are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for mining students and average placement in electronics .
reviews.review_text: Labs are conducted in all branches, especially in CSE and ECE branches. Gadgets are updated for the year 2024, and all lab coordinators are good. Hostel food is not good in the girls' hostel. The library is good for students; there are a lot of books they can borrow from there. The boys' hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges for mining engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Laboratories and classrooms are average. Several books are available in the library. Hostel is decent in this college. Sports are conducted. Mess is average. Electricity facility is available 24X7. Hostel rooms are very good. The security facility is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placement and every department.
reviews.review_text: Our college building looks old but well-furnished classrooms and well maintained desks are there. Our college has a boys’ hostel and a girls’ hostel. Both are well maintained. There are students in both boys and girls hostels. There are two canteens in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Students become eligible for campus placements after the 2nd semester. There are many companies visited in this college like Nomura, Accenture, Godrej, HDFC bank, etc. The average salary package offered ranges from 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The highest salary package offered varies between 15 LPA - 19 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: My college was very good in terms of facilities & infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Yes, in my college there are facilities and infrastructure available for my course/ department. The quality of the facilities in my hostel was good enough & the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is superb. The food taste is also good. Medical facilities are also good. There is also have basketball ground which we are eligible for pay sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities, but there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good infrastructure and facilities. For every subject, there were individual labs, so all the subjects practical can experience. Wi-Fi was only available in the computer lab and not in departments. But overall was good. In the case of the hostel, fee charges were a little higher but rooms and facilities were good. There were two canteens and there were no problems with the food served. We also had fests for different sports and games like basketball, cricket, volleyball, and...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good here. There are good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi, labs, library facilities and infrastructure are available for our course. The quality of food served is good in our mess, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Rajiv Gandhi College of Research and Technology is an excellent campus.
reviews.review_text: Rajiv Gandhi College has 55 campuses. There is a Wi-Fi facility on the campus for teachers and professors, but students are not allowed to use Wi-Fi. Hostels are not much good. Rajiv Gandhi has a ground of about 30 acres, along with a football ground and cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure and facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. The department is also very good. Wi-Fi is very bad. The classrooms are nice, and the laboratory is very good. I have very good memories here, and I like to recommend this college to average students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities provided in our hostel make us not to get bored, and we all are very satisfied with the Wi-Fi facilities. The infrastructure is also good. The mess, canteen and almost all the facilities are also very good here. Medical facilities are always available for students, and there is a huge playground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering, Research and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good and peaceful. Our college has Wi-Fi connectivity over the campus. They provide advanced labs, enriched classrooms, advanced and fully digitalised library. Hostel facilities are also available. Food quality is average, but it is manageable. Canteen and mess are average. Sport and games are also available here, and games like volleyball, cricket and football are major games which our college participated and won prizes.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. They provide all the facilities which are important to our course. Our college hostel is also very good, and it has a huge building. All the facilities are available. Mess food is also of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and teachers. But the management was worst, and fee charge was high.
reviews.review_text: RCERT has a vast campus where all departments are constructed separately. As you enter from the main gate, you can see a front main building of 3 floors. The college had its Wi-Fi but not for students. There was a library in the main building itself on the 3rd floor. College was well-equipped and had many labs like for fluid mechanics, the strength of materials, engineering drawing, electronic lab as well as English Lab. The college had its hostel for both boys and girls with mess facility. Ther...

college_info.college_name: Bhubaneswar Engineering College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Bhubaneswar Engineering College admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bhubaneswar Engineering College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Aviation. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Bhubaneswar Engineering College offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Bhubaneswar Engineering College courses range between INR 79,500 to 2,52,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Bhubaneswar Engineering College are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Bhubaneswar Engineering College goes up to 996.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Bhubaneswar Engineering College?

faqs.answer:
A:    Bhubaneswar Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination with any three subjects out of 14 subjects (Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/
Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/
Entrepreneurship) and obtained at least 45% marks for general (40% marks for in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed bachelor degree or equivalent in the relevant field of engineering and technology with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.UG DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent conducted by BSE, Odisha/equivalent are eligible to apply.
The lower age limit is 14 years and there is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent conducted by BSE, Odisha/equivalent are eligible to apply.
The lower age limit is 14 years and there is no upper age limit.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of good placement.

content.Placements: 25% student were placed for Aeronautical engineering. The highest pakcage for this course is 1.5 Lacs and the lowest package is 90k. Top recruiting companies are Air India, Indigo, airports etc. 15% student get internship for this course in Aviation Training Institutes.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities in our hostel is Average. Food quality of our mass and canteen is below average. Infrastructure and facilities available for Aeronautical department is good. Class room and labs are good. Medical facilities is not much available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good to learn new things, enjoy, and work hard.

content.Placements: The college's placement team brings in a lot of companies for placements. The placement officer helps its students in cracking job interviews and make the right decision in their life. Many companies come to the campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure can be rated 8 out of 10. We have all the labs in our college, a vast library, a good playground, and a small garden in front of our college. Our department has a machines lab, network lab, communication lab, visit lab, computer lab and others. Our library has books, and we can issue books for the whole semester, and you have to renew all that in a gap of 20 days.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are quite good. Not well-reputed companies visit our campus for placements. However, they recruit students based on their merit, capabilities, abilities they have until now in the college. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA. I recommend students to join this college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-equipped with furnished chairs benches. The library is well defined and equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Students can take books from the library, whichever they need. The environment is eco-friendly. The campus is clean, and it attracts all the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you not to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Placements are nil, and no company visit this college. They only inform students where pool campus is going on, and in that, hardly 2 or 3 students will get selected. Internships also depend on students as college does not take any responsibility of students. There is a placement cell, but it is useless.
content.Infrastructure: There are no medical facilities, and if you met with an accident, they even don't care. There is no Wi-Fi, no sports and games available. Labs are in okay condition. In the name of the hostel, they took one apartment in rent in which other people or family also live, at night warden locks all the flats from outside if there is a fire then nobody can go out. Food quality and quantity were the worst, and sometime there will be cigarette, grasshopper, ant, etc. Apart from that, the college looks good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of good placement.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities in our hostel is Average. Food quality of our mass and canteen is below average. Infrastructure and facilities available for Aeronautical department is good. Class room and labs are good. Medical facilities is not much available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good to learn new things, enjoy, and work hard.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure can be rated 8 out of 10. We have all the labs in our college, a vast library, a good playground, and a small garden in front of our college. Our department has a machines lab, network lab, communication lab, visit lab, computer lab and others. Our library has books, and we can issue books for the whole semester, and you have to renew all that in a gap of 20 days.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty of the college is good.

No medical facilities in the college. Hostel is in average condition
In library many books are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with furnished chairs benches. The library is well defined and equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Students can take books from the library, whichever they need. The environment is eco-friendly. The campus is clean, and it attracts all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. It doesn't have Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are well structured and very spacious. Not that much medical facility is available. Hostel rooms are good, warden is there to take care of students. Proper rules and regulations are there in hostel. No there is not any infrastructure related issues during your te...

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to focus on its students a little more.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college holds an average rating. The library, classrooms and labs were good enough but not satisfied with the food facilities. There was a special ground for sports. The campus was lush green. Transportation facilities were quite good. The location of the college was quite far from the city, so students often face problems. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2017-2018. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: This college provides very good facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, canteen and playground. The quality of labs and classroom is good. The quality of food available in the canteen is good when compared to other colleges. The hostel is very beautiful. The college also develops its infrastructure every day.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst engineering college.
reviews.review_text: No good facility is available. Classes are conducted combinedly for the students of different branches. Labs don't have instruments and machines. Students might not get all the required books in the library. Medical facilities are not available. A fest is conducted, every year, by the 3rd year students with their own money, and the college doesn't give money for that, in fact, they save money from the contribution of students. Birds fly in the classrooms, and the benches and desks are spoiled. T...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provide best faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college provide lots of facilities like wi-fi enable good library facilities, medical facility and much more. They celebrate annual function. Good qualities of food. The hostel room are too good and so many facilities provide in hostel also. Every year college provide game competition.

reviews.review_heading: My life in this college from 2012-16 was good, but not the best. I didn't get placed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The college has 27.5 acres of lush green campus away from the city crowd. It has proper labs and workshop. Especially, the aeronautical workshop is good.

reviews.review_heading: BEC is recommended for every student aspiring to be aeronautical engineer at a cheap budget.
reviews.review_text: College is located In the outskirts of the city of Bhubaneswar hence has a large ground area for sports. Mechanical workshops, computer labs and Electrical labs are equipped with proper equipments. AERO labs are however not up to the mark. Lab equipments are not in proper working conditions and lacks proper maintainance.

reviews.review_heading: BEC, Bhubaneswar review by a passed out student of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus and the environment are good. The hostel facility provided by the college is good. The college hasn't completed the ten years so, in spite of that, the infrastructure is far better than the other colleges of Bhubaneswar. Boys and girls hostel facility is been provided by the colleges in and outside the premises.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good, because of the good teaching facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and lab facilities. Still, some of the labs lack the instruments that are necessary to enhance the student's practical knowledge and the same should be made available to the students. Infrastructure-wise, the college has a good infrastructure with an excellent central library with lots of books and magazines and has a well-furnished e-library as well.

I had a really nice experience in GEC. For me it was "home away from home". 3 key features defining college are academic-oriented, friendly environment, center for excellence. 
However, sometimes they pushes a student too much to excel, which may sometime create stress on the student. I had a really nice experience in GEC. For me it was "home away from home". 3 key features defining college are academic-oriented, friendly environment, center for excellence.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Don't come here at any cost if you want to ruin your life, welcome.

review_content.Placements: No company reaches out here, only companies with 1 LPA come here. No help from the college as well. If you want placement, you need to work independently and develop your skills on your own. 100% placements, if you count unpaid internships and job rejections. Our placement cell is great at placing blame, not the students. We have experience of how not to get placed. Career guidance is more like career hiding.
review_content.Infrastructure: Poor facilities and construction. No clean water supply, worse rooms, and lobbies. Zero cleanliness. The college infrastructure is nothing short of a disappointment. Cracked walls, outdated labs, and classrooms that looked untouched since the last decade. The so-called smart campus has more broken benches than working projectors. Hostel life is worse. The rooms are cramped, poorly ventilated, and barely maintained. Fans didn't work, the water supply is irregular, and hygiene seems like an afterthought.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with mostly all things.

review_content.Placements: The quality did not guarantee any placements for every student because as per my observation when I studied there the third year students were very average and got almost no placement. But if I talk about the good students, they secure the package of 15 LPA to 20 LPA. I also got the package of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department of food and facilities was average. There were no labs of any kind and all but on the campus there was Wi-Fi for everyone. There was a math lab for our course. There were computers in very good condition. The canteen and medical facilities were also top-notch.

description: Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 146177 and 387435 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Information Technology. Th

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Information Technology was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 146177 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 119538 in 2023 and 97487 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Information Technology demonstrated an improving trend.

Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda.

As the Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top two most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, with the closing ranks of 245075 and 2014855, respectively.

For admission to Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda.
