hostel_campus.college_name: Rajkiya Engineering College

reviews.review_heading: Less campus area, remote area and less crowded.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are somewhat new since this is a new college and the infrastructure is renovated daily. Wi-Fi is good labs are average classroom and library are decent Hostel room is average food is below average, sometimes good, sometimes the worst. Sports are good and the game is total 8.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is low, but most students go to different colleges for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: At my college, there is a library open to all students 24/7, equipped with smart classrooms, smartboards, and LANs that provide internet access at all times. The quality of food is quite normal, not very good. The canteen is open from 8 AM to 8 PM. Eight sports facilities are available at the college, such as chess, cricket, table tennis, basketball, and others. A medical cabin is open during college hours.

reviews.review_heading: Don't come here at any cost if you want to ruin your life, welcome.
reviews.review_text: Poor facilities and construction. No clean water supply, worse rooms, and lobbies. Zero cleanliness. The college infrastructure is nothing short of a disappointment. Cracked walls, outdated labs, and classrooms that looked untouched since the last decade. The so-called smart campus has more broken benches than working projectors. Hostel life is worse. The rooms are cramped, poorly ventilated, and barely maintained. Fans didn't work, the water supply is irregular, and hygiene seems like an aftert...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with mostly all things.
reviews.review_text: The department of food and facilities was average. There were no labs of any kind and all but on the campus there was Wi-Fi for everyone. There was a math lab for our course. There were computers in very good condition. The canteen and medical facilities were also top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: REC Bandra: A cheat-off location, the worst college option.
reviews.review_text: It does not offer a chill vibe, still, as per the fee breakup, which is comparatively lower, it offers amenities. The campus area is relatively small, 8-10 acres, and is a newly instituted, decade-old program. Classrooms are new, with benches, smart TVs and projector boards, VCR rooms, and AC enabled. Hostels are below average, congested, with 3 per room, no proper sanitation for washrooms, water coolers, and electricity issues. Mess food quality is below average to worst. LAN is there, wireless...

reviews.review_heading: All about Rajkiya Engineering College, Banda.
reviews.review_text: Labs are fully air-conditioned with internet access and class also. Library is available with a separate study room with air-conditioned. In the hostel room, we have 3 beds, 3 chairs, 3 study tables with drawers. Quality of facilities is good according to others. Canteen is also available. Mess food is average. All sports are available with proper equipment like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, table tennis, badminton, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Rajkiya Engineering College,Banda .
reviews.review_text: All over infrastructure is good in my college. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are many classrooms and a good library where you can study. Many types of books are available in the library. The food served in the hostel is good. Our college provides medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Average government college affiliated with AKTU.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in college academics are average. Campus contains Wi-Fi and labs with all the basic machines needed. Classrooms are equipped with ACs and smartboards. Library of our college is not that big but you will find all books related to your course. A separate study room is also available with Wi-Fi. Hostels are also average single room is allotted to three students. Room contains a bed, table, chair, and almirah. The food in mess is not that great, and a basic canteen is available inside the...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. Labs and classrooms are good. There is hostel for girls and boys both. The food quality is not that much better but okay. There are libraries and books for different courses are available in the college. Sports are also good. Almost 8 sports are played in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Rajkiya Engineering College Band.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in the college are not bad, but not too good either. Everything is there in the lab infrastructure. The building from the inside is good, but from the outside, it's in very bad condition. We do have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college provides medical facilities, and they are open during academic timing.

reviews.review_heading: Our college atmosphere is very good. And faculty are very hard working and motivation to students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, and the campus is so green and happy. There is Wi-Fi in the classrooms and library, and the computer center is great. The faculty members in the hostel are good and treat us like family. The food in the mess is okay, and medical facilities are always ready. The sports facilities are the best, and the college provides the kits.

reviews.review_heading: If you want IT branch, don't take this college because everything is very poor including faculty.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is very poor. Its an engineering college, but you are not allowed to go into the computer centre with a laptop. The hostel building is good, but the condition of the bathroom is not good.
The AC in the classroom has not been working for many years. Specially in the IT department, only faculty cabin ACs are working.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with faculty members. Average placement is 4 LPA.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel including LAN. ACs are there in the academic campus. Library is present. A study room is also present here. Good labs are there with all the equipment. Food is average and mess is there. A canteen is available. Total 10 sports including cricket, football, etc. are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college offers good and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college has all kinds of facilities. There is a digital board in every class, Wi-Fi, and high-speed internet in the labs. All books are available in the library, and there is also a dedicated room for studying. The quality of hostel food is average. There is one canteen on our campus. All sports are available on campus, with 10 different games. Medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good but the faculty is average. No one helps you.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good; in most of the classes, smart boards are present, and air conditioners are present. The library is also present in the college but the books there are outdated. Hostel rooms are average. In each room of the hostel, three students stay. Each student gets a bed and a separate almirah, chair and desk.

college_info.intro:
Knowledge Institute of Technology popular programmes are BTech and MBA. KIOT Salem has collaborative research centres with the IAPMO-India for HVAC, Harita Techserv Pvt., Ltd., and others. Knowledge College Salem BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies such as Zoho, Expleo, Rapl, Hexaware, Tech Mahindra, ITC Infotech, and others. KIOT College has experienced faculty members who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders.
Knowledge Institute of Technology has a Centre for Career Development and Training (C- CDT). The areas of training include problem-solving skills, interpersonal skills, entrepreneurial Skills, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Got disappointed all the time.

review_content.Placements: For several other departments, various challenging roles with a number of twists and turns happen in every company placement drive, while for MBA, as usual, companies with average salaries are recruited. Hindustan Unilever Limited, Aditya Birla Group, Nestled, as other finance and banking companies are the primary and usual recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: Mess and crowded areas due to the high traffic admissions, specifically for the department of master of Business Administration, with approximately 140 to 160 students in every new batch. The sports areas are limited by permitting only the passionate students to play sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Great placements and supportive faculty members but infrastructure needs improvement.

review_content.Placements: It provides 360-degree professional development. Excellent training is there in all communication, aptitude, and programming for all branches. The training organised outside of college experts and ideas instructed by them are valuable for our placements and future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities in our hostel is upto the level. The rooms are separate for 4 members. The toilets are cleaned daily. The quality of food is eatable. The college canteen is excellent. One ambulance is always in our college for medical purposes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Green infrastructure and good environment.

content.Placements: In our college, many of us placed because our college spends more money only on training in my department (IT) Hexaware and Tech Mahindra is a top recruiting companies in my department. The highest package is 8.25 LPA. Many of us got internships in Zoho, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure but the network tower is low only Airtel network tower is high but our college provides Wi-Fi-specific passwords for us to use. Classrooms have good air-conditioners and good lab facilities. Hostel atmosphere is good but the food only needs to improve.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The placements are the noticeable thing at KIOT. They provide a variety of placement training.

The PAT placements and training KIOT has an exclusive 370 training programs to make your placements in top industries with an average package of 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms are cleaned daily and the food is tasty even though the menu is given by the student committee. Every department has its own laboratory facilities. The campus fully has Wi-Fi facility every corner. The library facilities are pretty good. Overall, KIOT is a good choice.

admission_process.title: Knowledge Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Knowledge Institute of Technology admissionenquiry form2025 is currently open. However, the MBA admission is open. The institute offers courses, such as BTech/BE, ME, MBA at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers PhD courses. To get admitted to theKIOT, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The college offers more than 10 courses (including specialisations) in the streams of Engineering and Management Studies, etc. The application process at KIOT is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutKnowledge Institute of Technologycourse admission2025.

Knowledge Institute of Technology admission 2025is entrance-based. The mode of study for the course is full-time. Check out the following table for details aroundKnowledge Institute of Technology course admissions2025:
Particulars
KIOT Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study

Read More:KIOT Brochure 2025
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

KIOT courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forKnowledge Institute of Technology courses:
Check detailedM.E specialisationseligibility here

Knowledge Institute of Technology's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the KIOT:
STEP 1: Knowledge Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online at the official website. Students must go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds, course-wise merit lists are released on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at SEC are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification per the college's respective courses. Students are selected based on the entrance exam of merit + TNEA counselling for BTech courses, GATE, CEETA PG for MTech and TANCET for MBA courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Students can checkKnowledge Institute of Technology cutoffdetails here. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

placement_data.title: Knowledge Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2024

description: KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology TANCET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA/PGDM for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI quota. The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 4514 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 3498 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 4826.

KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology accepts the TANCET cutoff for admissions to various specialisation of MBA/PGDM. Students who are interested in admissions at this institute can refer to the table below to know the important dates regarding registration, exam, etc.

TANCET 2025 cutoff for KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology is available in the table below, along with last two years cutoff data.The cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students preparing for admission can download the consollidated round and year-wise cutoff data to understand the cutoff trends.

Students can view the KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at KIOT - Knowledge Institute of Technology was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 50930.

hostel_campus.college_name: Knowledge Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Green infrastructure and good environment.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure but the network tower is low only Airtel network tower is high but our college provides Wi-Fi-specific passwords for us to use. Classrooms have good air-conditioners and good lab facilities. Hostel atmosphere is good but the food only needs to improve.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are the noticeable thing at KIOT. They provide a variety of placement training.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are cleaned daily and the food is tasty even though the menu is given by the student committee. Every department has its own laboratory facilities. The campus fully has Wi-Fi facility every corner. The library facilities are pretty good. Overall, KIOT is a good choice.

reviews.review_heading: Got disappointed all the time.
reviews.review_text: Mess and crowded areas due to the high traffic admissions, specifically for the department of master of Business Administration, with approximately 140 to 160 students in every new batch. The sports areas are limited by permitting only the passionate students to play sports.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements and supportive faculty members but infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities in our hostel is upto the level. The rooms are separate for 4 members. The toilets are cleaned daily. The quality of food is eatable. The college canteen is excellent. One ambulance is always in our college for medical purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: KIOT is green campus and infrastructure is very good. College is clean, with green parking areas, and food court is also very clean and provide healthy food. Classrooms are also clean and very peaceful and quality of labs and washrooms are also clean and very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good at all things.
reviews.review_text: In our campus, we have high-speed Wi-Fi facilities. We have good and neat classrooms as well. We have almost 60 labs in our college. We also have industry-linked labs. Our library is such a good and pleasant place to go. We have all kinds of wonderful books to read.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is excellent, and faculty members are well-developed.
reviews.review_text: The quality of facilities in our hostel is up to the level. Rooms are separate for 4 members. Toilets are cleaned daily. The quality of foods are eatable. The college canteen is excellent. An ambulance is always in our college for medical purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledge Institute of Technology is really the best engineering college .
reviews.review_text: The campus environment is good, and the library is well stocked. There are also departmental libraries. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls, and the food is hygienic. There is also a gym on campus.

reviews.review_heading: If you need placement, you can definitely choose KIOT.
reviews.review_text: There is good Wi-Fi everywhere. Each subject has a separate lab, and there is a separate mechanical lab with machines. There are labs for Robotics, Siemens, etc. The classrooms are very comfortable for studying, equipped with five convenient fans, good working projectors, and windows. All sports facilities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Student life at KIOT campus is vibrant.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure-wise, the college is currently being developed. There is an industrially recognized laboratory with high-specification computers available. The laboratories give students a feel of a real-time working environment. The library provides digital access to e-books. The college is surrounded by green land, providing a good environment for students to learn.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledge Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: It boasts an enlarged spacious campus with all the necessary facilities. There are thousands of books present in our college library including all the updated articles and journals. A specific menu is followed regularly in our canteen and students are encouraged to participate in sports according to their interests.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a free Wi-Fi campus; its infrastructure is good; it is well located; and it has good ventilation facilities. The labs are pretty good. The classrooms are well furnished. The library's facilities are good. The food quality is good, and the canteen is pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: It is overall a good one with experienced faculty members and huge placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are normal and pretty comfortable. The classrooms are equipped with smart classes. The college has one main common library and separate libraries. The labs are very useful for us. 24 hours a day, medical facilities are available. At any time, the students are ready to donate the blood.

reviews.review_heading: KIOT makes students knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Kiot college has the best infrastructure and hostel. Free Wi-Fi and labs are there. In hostel, food is very good and unlimited. Library has lots of books and a digital library with computers. Library provides free Wi-Fi. Hostel has a gym, study rooms and a ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good environment. The infrastructure is average. The food served in the hostel is excellent. We also have a food court in this college. We requested to improve the taste and quality of the food to the principal. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the speed is upto 50 Mbps.

admission_overview.college_name: AAA College of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: AAA College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: AAA College of Engineering and Technology admissionis merit-based. The college considers the qualifying exam score followed by TNEA Counselling for admission.AAACEToffers four-year BE and BTech programmes at the UG level in affiliation withAnna University. The course is offered in various specialisations such as Civil, Mechanical, CSE (Cyber Security), etc. Besides, the college also offers PhD programme at the doctoral level. Interested candidates can apply online for admission.

The college offers full-time BTech and BE courses at the UG level. Candidates must score well in the qualifying exam for admission. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria forAAA College of Engineering and Technology courses:

Class 12 (intermediate) or its equivalent examination from a government recognised board withPhysics,Mathematicsand Chemistry with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for backward class including Muslim, MBC & DNC/ SC/ ST/ SCA)
Download:AAA College of Engineering & Technology Brochure
AAACET admissions are currently open. The college considers Class 12 scores of the candidates for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in the college:
Step 1: AACET Application Process 2025
Aspirants must first register for TNEA Counselling and then fill out the form available on the college's website. Candidates can also register for TNEA at AACET campus.
Step 2: Selection
The college shortlists candidates for the BTech programme based on their Class 12 scores. Aspirants need to submit a valid Class 12 score while filling out the form.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates need to register and participate in TNEA Counselling for seat allotment. The rank is given to aspirants based on their Class 12 score. Shortlisted aspirants need to report at the college for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the TNEA rank required for admission at AAA College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: AAA College of Engineering and Technology considers TNEA rank of the candidates for admission in BTech programme. The TNEA rank is calculated based on the Class 12 score of the aspirants. In 2024, last round closing ranks ranged between57060and155395for the General AI quota. Out of all the BE/B Tech specialisations, the most in-demand wasBTech in Electronics and Communication Engineeringwith a closing cutoff rank of57060.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at AAA College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: No, AAA College of Engineering and Technology does not consider entrance exam scores for admission to BTech programme. Aspirants can apply with their Class 12 score for BTech. However, aspirants having JEE Main score are eligible for one of the scholarship offered by the college. Students having valid JEE Main score of 50 and above with 60% aggregate in Class 12 get full waiver in the tuition fee.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at AAA College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: AAA College of Engineering and Technology admissions are merit-based. The college considers Class 12 score of the candidates for admission. Aspirants with Class 12 score need to participate in TNEA Counselling. The seat are allotted to candidates based on their TNEA rank. Selected candidates need to further come for document verification and fee payment for confirming the seat.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at AAA College of Engineering and Technology without TNEA rank?
faqs.answer: No, candidates should have a TNEA rank for a seat in AAA College of Engineering and Technology. Aspirants with a Class 12 score need to participate in TNEA Counselling for seat allotment. The seat are allocated to candidates based on their rank. Selected candidates need to confirm their seat by paying theAAA College of Engineering and Technology fee.

paragraphs: AAA College of Engineering and Technology has a placement cell which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises.

As per the latest report, AAA College of Engineering and Technology recorded 100% placements for its BTech Civil, CSE, ECE, EEE and Mechanical branches. The 2024 BTech batch constitutes 216 students , of which 174 were placed successfully. Further, 54 CSE students , 39 Civil, 33 ECE, 41 EEE and 47 Mechanical branch students were eligible for the 2024 placements and all of them were placed in reputed companies. The highest package offered to the CSE batch 2024 stood at INR 7 LPA. The top recruiters of AAA College of Engineering and Technology in 2024 included Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Comodo, Hexaware, HGS, Vertex, Primetec Industries, Windcare India, ACT Plast paints, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: AAA College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Established in 2013, AAA College of Engineering and Technology is a private institute, offering courses with AICTE approval.
The Institute is NAAC accredited with a grade of A and accreditation of NBA.
AAA College of Engineering and Technology offers a BTech in 7 specialisations such as Artificial In

reviews.review_heading: It's a best college and has good and well-educated faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was perfect at this college. It provided fully air-conditioned classrooms, buses and all, well-maintained and developed laboratories, library, and they gave more importance to the extracurricular activities. Hostel and food were too good so thanks.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Madurai. Must try.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good. Once a month, events are conducted in the hostel where students can enjoy a lot. Food quality is overall good and resembles home food. Students can join the hostel without worrying about food quality. A variety of foods are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has poor lab facilities and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Wi-Fi is available sometimes, but once 20-25 students get connected, the server will be down. Labs are also not good. Some monitors don't have CPUs. Some PCs do not work properly. Classrooms and library are good. Hostel rooms are good. The hostel and canteen food is average. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Virudhunagar district.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Free Wi-Fi is available for both students and staff members. Hostel facilities are very good. The food served in the hostel is very good. Our departmental library has many books related to our course.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study.
reviews.review_text: There are experienced facilities and excellent infrastructure. The college campus is good. The best feature is its maintenance and infrastructure. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is great. Medical facilities and sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is up growing college with emerging technological laboratories and experience doctorate staff.
reviews.review_text: In our college, students have excellent laboratory facilities. It also has the center of knowledge in various departments including IIOT, E-yantra, Bosch, texas instruments, laboratory view, etc. It provides good class room with Wi-Fi cloud, library, and sports is also available with all sports materials.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its teaching and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus with good laboratory facilities. It also provides a library with thousands of books, and e-books. The hostel has rooms with air conditioners. The food is good in the hostel, canteen, and mess. Medical facilities are available 24X7 on the campus. Sports and games are appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its teaching and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in this college. It provides good laboratories, Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and has classrooms with projector facilities. The library is also available with several books. Hostel is well facilitated, and the food is very good. The canteen and mess has space and drinking water is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to grow knowledge and have fun.
reviews.review_text: It provides modern infrastructure which attracts others easily. This college has good laboratory facilities, the center of excellence beach, laboratory view center, IIOT, e-yantra, redhat, texas instruments, and german language are specials. The canteen is good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus and teaching quality.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms, department libraries, control system, laboratories (circuit, control system, Texas, IoT, renewable energy, microprocessor and controller, LabVIEW, MatLab), a waiting hall, and seminar halls are available. Good medical facilities are available. Good quality food is available.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure and experience faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is attractive in this college. Air-conditioned classes, college buses, meeting halls, and hostel rooms are available. The center of excellence for each department has laboratory facilities, sports, ground, auditoriums with air-conditioners, canteens, and a healthy mess.

reviews.review_heading: All the teachers are very helpful, and the infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the labs have proper equipment. The classrooms have projectors. A library and seminar halls with a smart engineering structure are available. The food is good, and medical facilities are good. Many games and sports facilities are available. Students are greatly using those facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best environment to grow knowledge, skills, and personal traits.
reviews.review_text: It provides a modern infrastructure that inspires students to study well. It has a good laboratory facility, elevators, water coolers and purifiers, good canteens, first aid, and dispensary rooms with basic facilities. It provides a good sports team and guide.

reviews.review_heading: There are thousand reasons to choose this one college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have excellent lab facilities. We have a center of excellence for each department. That includes IIOT, E Yantra, Bosch, Texas Instrumentation, lab view, etc. We have good classrooms with all available equipment. Wi-Fi cloud, an excellent library, a healthy canteen, xerox centers, sports, playgrounds, and memorable college events are our additional features.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Though the college was developing within a short span of time, they have good infrastructure with seminar halls for each department. It has good lab facilities for all departments. There is only one small library with fewer amount of books.

The total tuition fee for AAA College of Engineering and Technology BTech is INR 2 lakh. Aspirants need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the college. The total fee includes various components such as tuition fee, exam fee, caution deposit, etc.

AAACET offers BTech in various specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, AI, Cyber Security and many more. Considering the fee structure of the course, AAACET offers these courses at an affordable price.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in the MBBS course. There is a one-year compulsory internship for all students. A stipend of Rs. 10,000 is given per month to all students. Students are rotated in all departments and students learn all the skills necessary in this one-year internship course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: MBBS life at Akash Institute.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course. We have a one-year compulsory internship. They also provide a stipend, which is around 10,000 per month in our college. All students have to do a compulsory internship for one year. We are posted in all branches during this period.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

review_summary.college_name: Akash Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Data Science (Advanced) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good infrastructure, college, and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are good. They are good. They provide internships in 2nd or 3rd year with a good stipend. Packages are also good. Companies like Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Flipkart, and many others come for placements. They provide good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. There is a huge building and very good. It is beautiful and eco-friendly. It has a green nature. The college hostel is there. It is also good. The food is okay but not that much good. The college owns a hospital so we can have free checkups.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MBBS at Akash Institute.

content.Placements: There are compulsory internships for all students in our hospital. There are no placements. Students usually prepare for PG after internships. Rs. 10,000 stipend is given every month. Students will learn all skills needed in this one year. Students can also work after MBBS in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, clean, and hygienic. The food is tasty. The hostel fee also includes the mess fee. Wi-Fi is not available. The library is peaceful. Labs are well-built. The canteen has both veg and non-veg food. A sports ground is also present. A swimming pool is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: There is no placement in the MBBS course. There is a one-year compulsory internship for all students. A stipend of Rs. 10,000 is given per month to all students. Students are rotated in all departments and students learn all the skills necessary in this one-year internship course.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: MBBS life at Akash Institute.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course. We have a one-year compulsory internship. They also provide a stipend, which is around 10,000 per month in our college. All students have to do a compulsory internship for one year. We are posted in all branches during this period.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Akash Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: They merged with RS College, and now it has become Akash Global College of Management and Science. There is no placement because it is a recently opened college so after the 5th semester we will know about the placement. So I'll give feedback after 2 years. And in my opinion, it is better to go to another college.
content.Infrastructure: Because there are not enough faculty members available, we will not be able to finish the syllabus on time. Department-wise, I am not sure, so I am only talking about MBA faculty. Hostel quality is not good because bed bugs are there and food quality is also not good so better choose a government hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Akash Group of Institutions Admission: Details & Updates

admission_process.title: Akash Group of Institutions Admission Process

paragraphs: Akash Group of Institutions admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG and PG levels. In total, the institution offers 77 courses to the students across various streams, such as IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, and Medicine & Health Sciences, among others. Amid all these courses, some of the popularAkash Group of Institutions coursesoffered at the UG level include B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, and B.Sc. and at the PG level, the institution provides, MCA, M.Com, and MPT, etc. Students interested in Akash Group of Institutions admission 2024 must check the fees and other details below:
lists: Akash Group of Institutions Fees: The overall tuition fees charged for UG courses range between INR 200,000 - INR 635,382 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 570,960 - INR 2,142,090. In addition to the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
Akash Group of Institutions Course Duration: The duration for UG courses provided by Akash Group of Institutions ranges between 3 - 4 years and the same for PG courses falls between 2 - 3 years.

faqs.question: What's the seat availability for courses at the Akash Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Combined intake across all courses at Akash Group of Institutions is up to 997. Akash Group of Institutions offers BCA, BBA, MCA, B.Sc, M.Com, B.Com, BPT, UG Diploma, B.A, MBBS, MPT, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MD, MS courses for students to build their careers in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Nursing, Medicine & Health Sciences, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering. These highly regarded programs are available in full-time mode, catering to the needs of students who wish to obtain a comprehensive education in this field.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the MBA course at Akash Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for the MBA course at Akash Group of Institutions is that the candidate should have passed graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate. The entrance exams accepted include MAT, CAT, XAT, CMAt, ATMA, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Akash Group of Institutions for MBA?
faqs.answer: Applicants for MBA programs at Akash Group of Institutions must have a Bachelors degree with at least 50% aggregate marks from a recognised institution. Candidates are also often required to have legitimate results from entry tests such as the CAT, MAT, CMAT, GMAT or the Karnataka state PGCET. Those who meet these qualifications may apply directly through the Akash Institutions website or by visiting the admissions office. The selection procedure examines entrance exam scores, academic performance and occasionally includes interviews to judge the applicant's appropriateness for the program.

cut_off.college_name: Akash Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check COMEDK Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Akash Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech programmes via the COMEDK UGCET examination. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know the cutoffs for various accepted examinations across different rounds, categories and quotas. Refer to the pointers below for more exam-related updates:

Akash Group of Institutions Karnataka PGCET Round 2 Seat Allotment ranks are out for admission to MBA/ MCA courses. As per Round 2, MCA cutoff 2023 stood at 13919 for the General AI category, whereas for Round 1, the cutoff was 14239. Tabulated below are the year-wise closing ranks for Akash Group of Institutions Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2023 along with previous years' cutoffs.
According to the Akash Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Mechanical Engineering stood at 68496 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 100736. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

In this section, Akash Group of Institutions Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Akash Group of Institutions. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 69577 for MBBS.

Akash Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Akash Group of Institutions MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in General Medicine with a closing cutoff rank of 10507 for the General AI category candidates.

reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. There is a huge building and very good. It is beautiful and eco-friendly. It has a green nature. The college hostel is there. It is also good. The food is okay but not that much good. The college owns a hospital so we can have free checkups.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS at Akash Institute.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, clean, and hygienic. The food is tasty. The hostel fee also includes the mess fee. Wi-Fi is not available. The library is peaceful. Labs are well-built. The canteen has both veg and non-veg food. A sports ground is also present. A swimming pool is available.

reviews.review_heading: Life of MBBS student at Akash Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The hostel fee is 1.5 lakh per year. The canteen fee is included. For non-veg food, we have to pay an extra fee. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are set up with AC. Few lecture halls are good. The canteen food is good. Sports are not available. Only during fests, there are sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS life at Akash Institute.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, with all the lecture halls and practical demo rooms well-equipped. The library has a wide variety of books and is spacious with a peaceful environment. A cafeteria is present in the college, and the canteen is present in the hospital. A sports ground is available, and a swimming pool is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Because there are not enough faculty members available, we will not be able to finish the syllabus on time. Department-wise, I am not sure, so I am only talking about MBA faculty. Hostel quality is not good because bed bugs are there and food quality is also not good so better choose a government hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for academics but campus life is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Hostel facilities are decent. Our campus is not spacious. There is a playground on our campus. This college is still under construction. Management courses like MBA, BBA, and BCA have separate buildings.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and teaching and modern infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have very modern infrastructure and all facilities needed like libraries, classrooms and access to the hospital. We have a very good hostel facility, and the food quality is really nice, the hygiene maintained in the mess is also more than satisfactory. Being attached to a hospital, we have access to medical facilities 24/7, we have an hour of sports and games every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Institute of Nursing Devanahalli.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in Devanahalli which is very near Kempegowda International Airport. The college building is super with nice classrooms and labs. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. The hostel is inside the same compound. The hostel is good looking and facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure, and the facilities are also excellent.
reviews.review_text: This college provides laboratories and classrooms. The library was clean and there was total silence. There were many books to read in the library, the laboratories were good, and students can try every experiment. The books which were given by Aakash were the best, and students can learn everything from them. The canteen was provided, and the food was very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure and very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure, along with neat labs and classrooms. There are neat hostel facilities with good Wi-Fi facility. Good quality food is served in the hostel, and the canteen is good with good food. Our college provides good sports with neat equipment and also good medical facilities with students-friendly staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Akash Institute of Medical Sciences & Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls are quite good of 170 capacity. There are 4 lecture halls in the college and 1 in the hospital. Two of the lecture halls are air-conditioned. The building is not that great but well-equipped with labs, research labs, and demonstration rooms. The opportunities for sports is minimal. The canteen is fine. Medical facilities in some departments are good, but some needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and education-wise facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The college provides facilities like large building, spacious auditoriums, demo rooms, well-equipped labs, libraries, study places, common rooms and canteens. The college provides good hostel facility with good food and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: Our college got its own central library which is very informative and helpful. There is a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel but not in college. Labs are spacious and clean with good equipment. Hostel food is good, and they serve South Indian meals. The college has its canteen where you can get Chinese food. Medical facilities are excellent and effective. There is a huge ground for sports, and a basketball court and badminton court are available here.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms and computer available here assist in learning. Classrooms are air-conditioned and are huge and can accommodate more than 200 students. They are also equipped with projectors. The library has books for subjects and also has a computer room for learning. There are good washrooms on all floors.

reviews.review_heading: Life at aimsrc medicos life.
reviews.review_text: We have gym in hostel. Library is very near to college with different kinds of books. We have very good playground with all kind of sport courts. Hostel is 3 sharing and 2 sharing with clean rooms and washrooms and hot water for batch. Mess food is very hygienic and tasty with evening snacks provided.

reviews_list.review_title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

review_content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My college facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per year the lowest package is INR 1 lacs per year and the average package is INR 1.8 lacs per year offered in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

review_summary.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Our college provides good opportunities for students. Average students get placed at this college. Students get opportunities in the research and development fields. The average package offered in the college ranges between 4-6 LPA. Students also get internships at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very awesome.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact percentage of students who are placed in a company but at least 150 students get placed under a company every year. The highest package that is offered in my course is around 22 LPA, and the average package is about 6-7 LPA. To be honest, I don't know the company's name, but they are kind of agrochemical companies and they generally belong to Haryana, Gujarat, Assam and Pune. In the government sector, generally people go for a forest officer and food inspector and in private, there are field administrative officers, and many posts are offered by the companies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (L.L.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college facilities are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per year the lowest package is INR 1 lacs per year and the average package is INR 1.8 lacs per year offered in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college faculty members are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is good and 70 percent of students placed in my course. In my course, the highest package is INR 5 lacs per annum the lowest package is INR 2 lacs per annum and the average package is INR 3.8 lacs per annum. The top role in my course is in the agriculture department.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure available in my department are good, with good Wi-Fi speed, good labs and classrooms, good painting, and a library available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good and boys and girls have separate rooms, but the mess is the same.

admission_process.title: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG for admission to specific courses.Kamla Nehru Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 42 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 1 year - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 19,000 - 3,50,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,53,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

cut_off.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check UPTAC Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 563961 and 971998 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engin

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 563961 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 437609 in 2023 and 149705 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated an improving trend

Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.

As the Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very awesome.
reviews.review_text: There are several kinds of facilities offered in my course & infrastructure, as the infrastructure is very good. Classes are taken over a smart board and the lab practicals are also done by the professor so that we can resolve our queries and perform well in exams. In my college, there are also Wi-Fi facilities is also offered and there is a huge library where a variety of books is offered to us, which saves our money as expensive books are offered to us without any cost, which saves our money.

reviews.review_heading: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

reviews.review_heading: My college facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available in my department are good, with good Wi-Fi speed, good labs and classrooms, good painting, and a library available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good and boys and girls have separate rooms, but the mess is the same.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good placement and facility.
reviews.review_text: My college facility is very good, and the infrastructure available in my department is good. The Wi-Fi campus has good speed, laboratories are available, and libraries are available. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very good; all boys and girls rooms are separate.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and placements are available at my college.
reviews.review_text: My college facility is very good, and there is good infrastructure in my department of college. Wi-Fi is available, and good labs, good classrooms, and a good library are available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good, and good-quality food is available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are available. Fans are available in all classrooms. The library is good. The hostel and canteen are excellent. The quality of food in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are neat and clean. Fans are available in all classrooms. A library is available. The quality of the food is excellent. The hostel facilities are good. A mess and canteen are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are good. Fans are available in all rooms. A library is available. The quality of the food is excellent. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for any course. Good teacher and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: My college's facilities are good. All facilities are available at my college: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. Fans are available in good-type classrooms. My hostel facilities are good, and my room has a fan and a water supply that are properly maintained. My hostel food is of good quality, and medical faculty are available in my college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained.   Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel is average. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was not good. The buildings were old. Desks and benches also needed to be changed. The college was basically situated between jungles. You can find too much greenery and grass on the campus, not like in the stadiums, but like on barren land.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a good education for the courses.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Our class runs in first building of college, in which Wi-Fi speed is good and lab is for B.Pharma students only. Classroom was well maintained. Library was full of books in which you can easily get books without any charge, but after 15 days, late fees are charged. If hostel facilities did not provide food, you would have to self-cook your own food. Room is large enough for two students to live comfortably. Canteen was available and sports. College gave ma...

reviews.review_heading: This college provides great infrastructure, and atmosphere is also good.
reviews.review_text: This institute has a great atmosphere. Wi-Fi is enabled on campus, and it has a great network of roads. It also provides a huge playground for various outdoor sports. A cafeteria is also available for indoor sports. The classrooms are large and it is well-ventilated. The laboratories are also available. In the hostel, it provides a 24X7 electric supply. The food served in the mess is average.

The institute offers courses, such as BTech, BPharma, BBA, MCA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Other than UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctoral and Diploma courses. faqs.question: Who is eligible for Bahra University admission?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to BPharmacy course at Bahra University, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are merit-based + admission counsellor and candidates must pass Class 12 from any recognised state/national board with PCB or Maths minimum 45% aggregate. Aspirants who belong to the reserved category should complete Class 12 with a 40% aggregate. Candidates who have not completed Class 12 are not eligible for admission.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to BPharma at Bahra University?

faqs.answer: A:    Bahra University admission to the BPharma programme is made if candidates meet the minimum eligibility requirement set by the University. For admission to the BPharma programme at Bahra University, candidates must have passed the Class 12 examination with from any recognised state/national board with PCB or Maths minimum 45% aggregtae (reserved cateogory - 40% aggregate).Bahra University BPharm admission is also offered via lateral entry for which candidate must complete Diploma in Pharmacy from recognised state board with minimum 45% aggregate (for reserved category – 40% aggregate).
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharma course admission at Bahra University?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to BTech at Bahra University candidates are required to Pass Class 10 and Class 12 ffrom any recognised state/national board with PCM as subjects and minimum 45% aggregate (reserved category-40% aggregate). Further, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exam JEE Main. But if candidate haven't taken any entrance exam, university recommend taking the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam for admisison. After fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to visit the official website of the university to apply online.

reviews_list.review_title: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.

review_content.Placements: They only give provisional placements for 3 months, and if you qualify provisional period, you get a permanent placement, but your package will be, like, 1.2 LPA. First three months, the HRs will treat you nicely, but as soon as your provisional period ends, they will get rude with you, as the responsibility of the university ends after the provisional period. They will react as if they never wanted to hire you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

reviews_list.review_title: Very nice university give good placements.

Around 99.9% of students got internships through the course, including in international companies, one even got selected as a sports physiotherapist for the Indian cricket team.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. Water coolers with rat control measures were provided. The hostel facilities were good for bed students, and the quality of food was good. A physiotherapy OPD was available. However, there were no canteens. Sports and games were also conducted.

review_summary.college_name: Bahra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college provides a good experience and good weather.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed every year. The median package is 3-4 LPA. Most percent of students get placed in the internship. Physiotherapist roles are offered in our course, and we get Dr. Prefix and a medical course from a well-reputed college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library and Wi-Fi available in the university. The classrooms are well-furnished, and the labs have equipment. The facilities in the hostel are good, with wooden beds, clean bathrooms, and separate washrooms for each room. The mess food is also okay, and medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very friendly teachers, average placements, good infrastructure, and beautiful environment.

content.Placements: Usually 60% of students get placement directly through the college. Maximum others are also able to land a good job on their own. The average package in B.Tech computer science is 8 LPA - 9 LPA, and the highest package given is 25 LPA. Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and many more are the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The university is sitting on the lap of mother nature and is surrounded by green lush mountains. The weather here is optimal and moderately cold. It includes one physics lab, mechanical lab, chemistry lab, physiotherapy lab, and 2 computer labs. There are multiple sports grounds and basketball court in it with a mini football ground as well. The food here is moderate. They have one dispensary and one animal dispensary.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. admission_overview.college_name: Bahra University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Bahra University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bahra University admissionis open for all the courses. The university offers UG, PG, diploma and Doctoral programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Pharmacy and others.Bahra Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of the university. Read the below article to know more about Bahra University admission, course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat, fees and admission process:

Bahra University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech courses. Further, for other courses, admission is based on the last qualifying exam score and Counsellor Interaction. The table below lists courses offered at Bahra University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Check here for more to know more aboutBahra University courses:
Download:Bahra University Prospectus

Bahra University feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Check below the total tuition fee for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Bahra University seatintake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Bahra University's admission process includes registration followed by a conversation with the admission counsellor. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BU:
STEP 1: Bahra University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at BU is INR 1,100.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission, followed by counsellor Interaction. The university also has the facility for provisional registration or seat booking by paying an amount of INR 10,000.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aBahra University course feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Bahra University?
faqs.answer: Bahra University offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Applicants looking admission to BTech are required to appear in JEE exam. But if candidate haven't taken any entrance exam, university recommend taking the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam for admisison. Further, other courses like for BSc, BBA, BCom, MBA, BCA and others university offers merit-based admission. After completing the criteria set by the university, candidates are required to visit university official website to apply for admission.
