hostel_campus.college_name: Bahra University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a good experience and good weather.
reviews.review_text: We have a library and Wi-Fi available in the university. The classrooms are well-furnished, and the labs have equipment. The facilities in the hostel are good, with wooden beds, clean bathrooms, and separate washrooms for each room. The mess food is also okay, and medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Very friendly teachers, average placements, good infrastructure, and beautiful environment.
reviews.review_text: The university is sitting on the lap of mother nature and is surrounded by green lush mountains. The weather here is optimal and moderately cold. It includes one physics lab, mechanical lab, chemistry lab, physiotherapy lab, and 2 computer labs. There are multiple sports grounds and basketball court in it with a mini football ground as well. The food here is moderate. They have one dispensary and one animal dispensary.

reviews.review_heading: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice university give good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. Water coolers with rat control measures were provided. The hostel facilities were good for bed students, and the quality of food was good. A physiotherapy OPD was available. However, there were no canteens. Sports and games were also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the faculty and the placement system of the college in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The college has classrooms, blackboards, and a library, but there is no Wi-Fi or smart boards, which makes understanding difficult. Additionally, cameras are also not available. The quality of food provided in the college mess is very poor, the mess is untidy, and the food prepared doesn't taste good.

reviews.review_heading: Bahra University review for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like well-managed classrooms and labs for students with 4 types of windows like Linux, Microsoft, and others are provided.  Hostel facilities are well-managed. Food is well prepared. Games are playable inside the auditorium. College provides a healthy food cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Bahra.
reviews.review_text: Bahra University offers state-of-the-art infrastructures that render its campuses conducive to students' learning. This campus has modern classrooms equipped with advanced audio-visual aids, digitized libraries housing numerous titles and other resources, and sophisticated laboratories for hands-on learning across various sectors. This university provides its students with high-speed internet connectivity and bullet-proof IT infrastructure to facilitate academic and research endeavors. Further p...

reviews.review_heading: Really good nature and climate the whole year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good; the labs are big and well managed. Also, the classes are good for study and the Wi-Fi is not that good because of the low speed of internet and the library is open 24/7, which is a very good thing; students can study in the library anytime. The hostel food is bad because the taste is not good and the quality is also not very good. Medical facilities are available but not good. No sports or games are there in our university.

reviews.review_heading: In this, I have given a brief review of Bahra University. By reading this, one can easily understand
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is very slow. In computer labs, computers hang too much, and some of them are not working. Keyboards are of low quality. Physics labs and Chemistry labs are good. The library is also good, and almost all required books are present there. Hostel facilities are average. Medical facilities are present. Food in the mess is sometimes good and sometimes bad. There is a ground to play games in front of the hostels. That is the only ground, which is a negative point. Canteens are present, in...

reviews.review_heading: Bahra university review.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library are well-managed in my university. Classrooms are well-managed. Infrastructure is good. The hostel is well-managed by the warden, sir. Food quality is good for their state people. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are not playable there.

reviews.review_heading: All about Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not too good. Wi-Fi of the hostel and university both don't work rightly. Also, the computers from the computer lab don't work, they arrange them for show. Classrooms are too small for 80 students. The library is good but some of the important books are not there. If you complain to them, it's a long process to get a new book.

reviews.review_heading: About my college BAHRA UNIVERSITY.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good, the classrooms are well designed and there are proper seating arrangements for the children. They have provided proper benches and tables for students to study. The facilities at the hostel are also good; they have well-maintained rooms in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied. Please do a good research before choosing a college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. In the classrooms, some seats are broken, and the Wi-Fi speed is poor. In the labs, computers often hang, and there are frequent issues, such as slow internet or malfunctioning systems. For the sports department, there is only one ground where events are held. Mess food is average—sometimes good, sometimes bad. Medical facilities are available, including a university ambulance. Hostel rooms are average, with 3-4 students sharing a room.

reviews.review_heading: NextGen faculty is the best, and the other faculty of the college is also helpfu
reviews.review_text: The course is designed to help students, and the hostel is fine, helping students manage their time efficiently. Food is prepared daily, and everything is great. Every faculty member, including non-teaching staff who help in the hostel, mess, and wardens for safety, is helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Very good private university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have Wi-Fi facilities in our labs, making it easy to complete our work. Regarding hostels, we have Wi-Fi and attached bathrooms in every room. The quality of food in the mess is good, and we also have medical facilities available.

college_info.intro:
Sai Nath University offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Education, Law, Pharmacy, and others. BTech and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Sai Nath University Jharkhand offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mining Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. The MBA programme offered by the Sai Nath University Ranchi is a two-year programme.
Below mentioned are Sai Nath University's popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the Bachelor of Commerce (BCom), candidates must secure a valid score in the last qualifying exam. Sai Nath University BCom admission is merit-based. Candidates require Class 12 from a recognised board. There is no specific percentage mentioned for BCom admission. However, candidates must at least secure 40% aggregate in Class 12. review_content.General: The college has various facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of food is average. Rooms are average. faqs.question: Q: Can I join Sai Nath University without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Sai Nath University is a private university recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), the Bar Council of India (BCI), the National Council for Teacher Education (NCTE), the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the State Nursing Council.The University offers agriculture course at an undergraduate level lasting for four years. BSc in Agriculture curriculum comprises of a variety of scientific, technical & business subjects. The cost of the course is around INR 1.76 Lakh for four years. Talking about its ROI, as per the recent placement record the the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, TCS, Myntra, Accenture, Mahindra, TVs, Reliance, etc., are the top recruiters. Further, candidates with BSc Agriculture degree from SNU can secure job opportunities in horticulture, poultry farming, plant science, soil science, food science, animal science, etc. NOTE: The placement information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: Q: Is Sai Nath University good to pursue B.Sc Agriculture?

faqs.answer: Yes, BA is available at Sai Nath University. The programme is offered as an integrated course lasting for four to five years. The university first offers BA along with B.Ed as an undergraduate course lasting for four years. Additionally, there is another integrated programme, i.e., BA with LLB lasting for five years.
faqs.question: Q: Is BA available at Sai Nath University?

faqs.answer: To apply for the DPharm course at Sai Nath University, candidates seeking admission are first required to apply by completing the application form to become eligible for admission. The application process steps are as follows:Step 1: Visit the official website of Sai Nath University.Step 2: Now click on the Registration icon at the top of the home page of the official website.Step 3: The registration form will appear. Register with a valid mobile number and email ID and all the required information.Step 4: Verify and fill out the online application form.Step 5: Pay the SNU DPharm application fee of INR 1,000.Step 6: Finally upload all the required documents.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sai Nath University good to pursue B.Sc Agriculture?
overview_faqs.answer: Sai Nath University is a private university recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), the Bar Council of India (BCI), the National Council for Teacher Education (NCTE), the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the State Nursing Council.The University offers agriculture course at an undergraduate level lasting for four years. BSc in Agriculture curriculum comprises of a variety of scientific, technical & business subjects. The cost of the course is around INR 1.76 Lakh for four years. Talking about its ROI, as per the recent placement record the the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, TCS, Myntra, Accenture, Mahindra, TVs, Reliance, etc., are the top recruiters. Further, candidates with BSc Agriculture degree from SNU can secure job opportunities in horticulture, poultry farming, plant science, soil science, foo

overview_faqs.question: Is BA available at Sai Nath University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BA is available at Sai Nath University. The programme is offered as an integrated course lasting for four to five years. The university first offers BA along with B.Ed as an undergraduate course lasting for four years. Additionally, there is another integrated programme, i.e., BA with LLB lasting for five years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college has the best faculty members who are friendly with students and help with all problems.

content.Placements: 80% is the placement rate, with the highest package of Rs. 50,000. The recruiting companies are FSSAI, Fertilizer companies, and Seed companies. 100% of students got internships from our course. Students have improved very much, and many are inspired to become entrepreneurs or trainers. The student is very competitive with their own friends.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available, such as Wi-Fi, lab, library, polyhouse, mushroom cultivation room, etc. There are sports and game facilities. All festivals and parties are celebrated every 2-3 months. There is a 24/7 light available, and the warden is very helpful. The mess food is average in taste.

admission_process.title: Sai Nath University Ranchi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sai Nath University Ranchi admission process 2026ismerit-basedfor the majority of the programmes. The university accepts bothonline&offlinemodes of the application process. Sai Nath University (SNU) has courses in streams includingEngg., Pharmacy,Nursing, Management,Education, & Law. SNU admission toBPEd & DPEdprogrammes isentrance-based. However, the university also has a provision of direct admission under several programmes, if students meet the specified eligibility criteria set by SNU. Additionally,SNU Ranchialso providesPolytechnic Diplomaprogrammes in Mining, Mechanical, Electrical & Civil Engg..

Located in Ranchi, Jharkhand, Sai Nath University provides quality education to its students. All students should follow the common admission process on a merit basis or entrance test basis which is conducted by SNU (university-level). Check out the Sai Nathi University admission highlights details below:
Particulars

Selection to the majority of UG, PG & diploma courses is done based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Seat reservation to SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD category students is applicable as per the rule of the Central or Ranchi State Government. The eligibility criteria & selection criteria details ofsome of the popular coursesoffered by Sai Nath University - SNU are tabulated below:

Sai Nath University's admission process includes various stages, such as selection, round,payment ofSNU fees& reporting at the university.Any feepaid at the time of admission or afterwards isnon-refundable. Find below the step-by-step procedure for Sai Nath University Ranchi admission 2025:

Step 1: SNU Ranchi Application 2025:The SNU application form can be submitted online on the official website or downloaded to submit offline. The application fee is to be paidINR 500by DD in the name of 'Sai Nath University, Ranchi'. The registration processing fee with a complete filled-up form is to be submitted on or before the deadline along with the required documents.

Step 2:Selection round:Admission will be accepted based on merit in performance in the qualifying examination for the majority of the programmes. Admission toBPEdis done on the basis ofwritten tests,sports proficiency,physical fitness, & merit in the graduation degree.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation: Selected students need to pay the required admission fee & complete all the formalities of final admission at SNU Ranchi.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SNU - Sai Nath University and Education?
faqs.answer: The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA , and the the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA . The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, TCS, Myntra, Accenture, Mahindra, TVs, Reliance, etc., visit our campus to hire students. SNU, Greater Noida has a Career Development Centre (CDC) that helps students get ready for the workforce or to pursue higher education. During the 2022-23 ongoing placements of SNU Noida, the highest package offered to students was Rs. 58.09 LPA while the average package was Rs. 12.46 LPA. In 2021, 88% of fellowship graduates got placement opportunities during Sai University's placement drive. The highest salary package reached INR 15 LPA with an average salary range of INR 6 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech Electrical Engineering students at Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: In 2023, Sai Nath University's average package for B.Tech Electrical Engineering students was INR 6.05 LPA, while the best package achieved INR 52 LPA. However if you want a good package you should work smart throughout the course and during interviews you have to perform great to get a higher package and a great job. In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BCom from Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) is an important programme in the field of commerce. This undergraduate course provides various career options such as private or government jobs in different industries, opportunities for entrepreneurship, and further education like MCom , or MBA. Graduates from Sai Nath University's BCom programme can also explore job opportunities through campus placements. On average, BCom (Hons) graduates can expect a starting salary package of INR 3.5 LPA. Some job positions that BCom graduates can pursue are listed below: Accountant Business Executive Accounts Manager Tax Consultant Financial Consultant Account Executive Business Consultant.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, the library is available, classrooms are big, and laboratories are also available. The hostel is normal. The quality of food served in mess is average. The medical facility is not available. There are sports like cricket, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: This college is value for money. Students won't regret coming to this college.
reviews.review_text: This university has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and basic amenities. reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here, and the campus is nice with an open area. Classrooms are huge and good. There are computer labs and engineering labs. The library is good, and there is a hostel with a mess facility. The only bad thing is the college is situated very far from the city area. So medical facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Nath University, Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, but the messy food was not good. However, let me tell you, you were really able to enjoy hostel life very well. The hostels were big enough, but you might not have liked the food during the match.

admission_overview.college_name: KIIT College of Engineering Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: KIIT College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KIIT College of Engineering admissionis a blend of merit and entrance-based. The college offers courses at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Engineering, Computer Applications, and Management. Students can pursue the desired course by satisfying the admission criteria. Also known asKIIT Gurugram, the college offers courses in affiliation withGurugram University. The application process of the college is carried out online. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, and admission process for KIIT College of Engineering.

KIIT College of Engineering course admissionis subject to preset admission criteria. The college accepts candidates on both an entrance and merit basis. Aspirants are advised to ensure that they satisfy the minimum educational qualification specified by the college in addition to clearing the selection.

For UG admission, students must have completed Class 12 or equivalent with the specified aggregate. Whereas, for PG admissions, clearing graduation is mandatory. Interested students can take a look at the following table to learn all about the general eligibility and selection criteria forKIIT College of Engineering courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects
JEE Mains+HSTES Counselling
Graduation from a recognised university
Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent in any stream with a minimum aggregate of 55% from a recognised board
Merit-based
Class 12 from a recognised board
Merit-based

The admission procedure for KIIT College of Engineering is a multi-step process. To start the procedure, students need to check the eligibility followed by applying at the designated portal. Students are then shortlisted based on the course criteria. The process is usually carried out online. Students must note that mere possession of the basic eligibility doesn’t guarantee a seat and satisfying the entireKIIT College of Engineering admission criteriais mandatory. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepKIIT College of Engineering admission processexplained below:
Step 1: Check Your Eligibility

It is essential that candidates satisfy the admission criteria of the desired programme before proceeding further with the admission procedure. Hence, students can either visit the college’s official website or look at the table above to get a general idea of the eligibility.
Step 2: Register and Apply

Interested students can then apply at the portal of either the college or HSTES counselling for seat allocation to the BTech course. Students can connect with the admission desk of the college in case of any queries.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once a seat is offered, selected students need to submit documents for verification. The final step requires candidates to payKIIT College of Engineering feesto secure a spot at the college.

paragraphs: KIIT College of Engineering has thrived in achieving 100% success in the very first year with the placement of its all 22 MCA students. The institute keeps close liaison with industries, business and recruiting agencies. It also facilitates the training of students in different organizations. The great result is achieved by the training and placement cell of KIIT. The placement cell also consists of a full-time Training and Placement Officer (TPO).

KIIT provides a good opportunity for internships and projects. Companies like Amazon , Tata, Wipro, IBM, Convergys and Infosys hires 3 rd - year students for Internships. The institute holds a 95% placement percentage in computer science engineering department.

The highest package for the 2013-17 batch was INR 3.5 LPA which was offered by Comparex India Pvt. Ltd. Companies like PAT Technologies, Aurelia Consultancy Services, KMG Technology, SportsQ Pvt Ltd, Yes Technology, Zero effort Pvt Ltd and Adyogi Infotech offered a package of INR 2.4 LPA which was also the median package for this batch.

hostel_campus.college_name: KIIT College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: You can choose our college because it is affordable and it provides good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, the college is covered with over trees, plants, etc. Library is also available, and the canteen is also available. The food in the canteen is good, in decent amounts. Labs of college are good, AC is installed, and good PCs are available.

reviews.review_heading: A great campus life at KIIT.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of KIIT was totally amazing. Great facilities were available for students, such as huge classrooms, a sports stadium, a library, and water purifiers across the campus. Hostel was affordable, and the hostel rooms were value for money. Food quality in the mess was good.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs classes are very well maintained and the auditorium is there, which is very big. The library is also very big and the availability of books for each and every student is present. There is no hostel availability in our college and the canteen is also very small.

reviews.review_heading: This college has better education but facilities are not good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi and laboratory facilities are good. The staff members are average, but good in their works. The library and classroom facilities are not good, because of corona they are recovered day by day. The hostel, canteen, and sports facilities are not available. The washrooms are also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are just fine, and the infrastructure is good. The teaching is wonderful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great, and there is a hostel. It isn't available right now due to COVID. A canteen, a library, a sports room, a ground, free Wi-Fi, computer labs, an auditorium, and different labs are there.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides knowledge for engineers.
reviews.review_text: The campus is lush green with a lot of trees, a garden, flowers and a playground. The campus is enabled with internet Wi-Fi. Moreover, our college has won the best tech award in Haryana. Along with that, various cultural programs, a science competition and a tree plantation drive are organised every year. Our college has organised zonal level techno fest and youth fest. The hostel is well maintained with proper facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent infrastructure and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty decent with good facilities all around the college campus. The library is pretty good and the best for students who are looking for knowledge. I don't stay in the hostel. The canteen is decent, and many indoor and outdoor sports are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: We are quite satisfied with our faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are quite good. The canteen was good earlier, but it is in bad condition right now, due to pandemic. In fact, we had good quality coffee too. We have good games opportunities, but the only problem is that you have to take the initiative.

reviews.review_heading: KIIT College of Engineering is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is brilliant. There is a library in our college which provides good knowledge to the student. The library helps the student in the preparation of the exam. Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi facility for students. The canteen is very good. Our college also provides a huge playground for football.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because there are no good placements.
reviews.review_text: The library is good. The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Facilities in our hostel are not good, and they just provide one common TV and meal for students. Medical facilities are not available. They serve unhygienic food for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. If you want to get good placement, then try it on your own.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not so good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the engineering building. Labs are not up to the mark, and some of the computers are very slow, and some of them have problems. The library is good, but many books are not available which was given by the teachers, so you have to buy it. Other books are available which are not good. Classrooms are simple. The college does not provide hostel facility for the students. Food served in the canteen is good. Medical facil...

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college to anyone.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was below average. Labs were pathetic, with very fewer machines and equipment, and these machines and equipment were also faulty. Classrooms are just okay, nothing more or less. The library has a good collection of books where you can study and take books to your home. The college collected fees for Wi-Fi from us, but there was no Wi-Fi facility on the campus. The college has huge ground and basketball court, but they never allow anyone to play there, why I don'...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty members, placements, infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Amenities are available, but the quality is not much good. Labs are good. No proper support is provided by the administration for money, implement and execution. The college lacks good infrastructure, and the students don't show much interest in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is below average. The college doesn't provide any facilities like medical facilities and sports and games. Food served in the canteen is not good. They provide poor hostel facilities and Wi-Fi facilities. They don't even organise extracurricular activities. They provide very low practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college had good infrastructure in the earlier times. At present, a school is added to the college which takes a lot of space and one building which is of management earlier. The B.Ed course is shifted to girls' hostel building. Classrooms, labs, and library are good.

likes.text: They motivate us from time to time, and the placement coordinator arranges classes for aptitude skills.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET) courses stands around INR 1,40,000 to 3,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below: Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.
faqs.question: What are the details required to check the KEAM result?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates should pass Higher Secondary Examination, Kerala or Examinations recognised as equivalent thereto, with 45% marks in Mathematics separately and 45% marks in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry put together. Candidates should also qualify the KEAM (to the particular year) conducted by “The Commissioner of Entrance Examination, Kerala”. Similarly for the application to M.Tech and Phd. Courses, one requires Qualification of B.Tech from recognised institutes and 10+2 at 45 percent marks.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET)?

faqs.answer: A:    Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry as one of the optional subject and secured the above mentioned percentage in the subjects taken together. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry, the marks obtained in Computer Science shall be considered. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry and Computer Science, the marks obtained in Biotechnology shall be considered. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry, Computer Science & Biotechnology, the marks obtained in Biology shall be considered. Candidates belonging to SEBC/ PwD category will have a relaxation of 5% marks in the qualifying examination. Applicants should have completed 17 years. There is no upper age limit. Result awaited students are also eligible to apply on provisional basis.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed minimum B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology from a recognised Institute/University

faqs.answer: Sahrdaya College of Engineering, Thrissur was established in 2002 under Irinjalakuda Diocesan Educational Trust. It is affiliated to Calicut University, Malappuram and approved by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. It is recognised by Government of Kerala and accredited by The Institution of Engineers, India. The goal of SCET is to train the youth to be the leaders of tomorrow with proper skills, deep-rooted sense of social responsibility, strong ethical values and with a global outlook to face the challenges of changing world. The mission of the institute is to promote academic excellence, absolute discipline, and sound practical exposure.

review_summary.college_name: Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with good infrastructure, facilities, and utmost friendly environment.

content.Placements: For B.Tech CSE, there are 4 classes with a total of more than 250 students in 2024 enrolled batch, and 3 classes with a total of more than 190 students in 2023 enrolled batch. Top recruited companies for our course include TCS, IBM, Infosys, Cognizant, SOTI, QBurst, UST, Radence, Accenture, Abbot, Hykon, SIB, EY, Agappe, Speridian, etc. Many of the passed out batches of students, including 2025 pass out batch, got internships and placements at these top companies. 90% placement for 2024 passout batch.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very eco-friendly environment with utmost cleanliness. Recognised as green campus under Watch Bharath. It has modern infrastructure. Classrooms are spacious with smart boards. It has well-equipped labs. It has free Wi-Fi availability for all students and staffs. We have a large library with neat and peaceful sitting space. Other facilities include intel AI labs, robotics and automation labs, project labs, medical room, large ground area for sports, gym, indoor multipurpose auditorium of 2000+ capacity, premium guest rooms, chapel, etc. There are 2 food counters excluding canteen, snacks bar, and shawarma snack. Plenty of tables and seating facilities are available. Hostel is situated within the campus, with Wi-Fi and gym facilities. There are blocks like main, bio, and decinial blocks. We have intel AI labs, robotics and automation labs, ICFOSS Cell, IEEE SB, IEDC (innovation and development center), GDSC (Google Developed Student Club), placement cell, grievance cell, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Sahrdaya review, soar to achieve.

content.Placements: 90% of students have been placed in well-known companies such as Medtronic, Agappe, GE, Philips, etc. The roles offered are medical device manufacturer, testing and calibration, sales officer, etc. Our seniors have all got internships in well-known companies with a good amount of stipend.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 girls hostel and 1 boys hostel. The quality of food is okay to a certain level and differs from person to person. You can't go out after 6 PM. The facilities of the college are very good. We have collaborated with companies for lab, and recently we got a new Intel AI lab.

faqs.answer: To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below:Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET)?
faqs.answer: Candidates should pass Higher Secondary Examination, Kerala or Examinations recognised as equivalent thereto, with 45% marks in Mathematics separately and 45% marks in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry put together. Candidates should also qualify the KEAM (to the particular year) conducted by “The Commissioner of Entrance Examination, Kerala”. Similarly for the application to M.Tech and Phd. Courses, one requires Qualification of B.Tech from recognised institutes and 10+2 at 45 percent marks.

faqs.question: How can candidates join Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET)?
faqs.answer: Sahrdaya College of Engineering, Thrissur was established in 2002 under Irinjalakuda Diocesan Educational Trust. It is affiliated to Calicut University, Malappuram and approved by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. It is recognised by Government of Kerala and accredited by The Institution of Engineers, India. If the candidate is interested in admission to this university, they can apply online application form and offline application form. The online application form needs to visit the university's official website and fill tye for. For offline admission form candidates can download the form from the official website and visit the university campus.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (SCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry as one of the optional subject and secured the above mentioned percentage in the subjects taken together. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry, the marks obtained in Computer Science shall be considered. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry and Computer Science, the marks obtained in Biotechnology shall be considered. In case, the candidate has not studied Chemistry, Computer Science & Biotechnology, the marks obtained in Biology shall be considered. Candidates belonging to SEBC/ PwD category will have a relaxation of 5% marks in the qualifying examination. Applicants should have completed 17 years. There is no upper age limit. Result awaited students are also eligible to apply on provisional basis.M.E./

hostel_campus.college_name: Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with good infrastructure, facilities, and utmost friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very eco-friendly environment with utmost cleanliness. Recognised as green campus under Watch Bharath. It has modern infrastructure. Classrooms are spacious with smart boards. It has well-equipped labs. It has free Wi-Fi availability for all students and staffs. We have a large library with neat and peaceful sitting space. Other facilities include intel AI labs, robotics and automation labs, project labs, medical room, large ground area for sports, gym, indoor multipurpose audito...

reviews.review_heading: Sahrdaya review, soar to achieve.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 girls hostel and 1 boys hostel. The quality of food is okay to a certain level and differs from person to person. You can't go out after 6 PM. The facilities of the college are very good. We have collaborated with companies for lab, and recently we got a new Intel AI lab.

reviews.review_heading: Charting my path: A candid review of my college. A good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: While talking about the infrastructure, apart from the college's infrastructure with greenery and environment-friendly, the campus also has 24/7 Wi-Fi facilities. The labs are good in our college. It has Kerala's first AI Intel lab, inaugurated by Kerala's educational minister. While talking about the hostel, we have around 3 to 4 hostels for girls and boys, with rich infrastructure and good food.

reviews.review_heading: More in-depth theoretical knowledge and practical application challenges.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi in classrooms, labs, and also libraries. This facility is provided to each block on the campus. The facilities in the hostel include food from the mess, Wi-Fi, all-time available electricity, and water. The hostel food is homely, and all three courses are available in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Sahrdaya's experience.
reviews.review_text: Infra in the college and hostel is pretty good and above average. The food quality in the college is average at best but adjustable. Library is good with a large plethora of books for research and other purposes. Sports opportunities are limited and few.

reviews.review_heading: A complete adventurous student life.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi in classrooms, labs, and also libraries. This facility is provided to each block in the campus. The facilities in the hostel include food from the mess, Wi-Fi, all-time available electricity and water. The hostel food is homely, and all the three courses are available in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Sahrdaya is So High or Soar High?
reviews.review_text: College is vast. College is close to nature. The infrastructure and facilities in college is 9/10. Oher than this they provide free WiFi, ac cs labs, big library with tons of books, journals, also digital library is available.  And  vending machine is available  other than in 2 canteens. Hostel is very hygienic. It is inside the college. Free wifi is available.  In one room 4 or 3 mates will be there and no attached bathrooms but has 8 bathrooms and 8 toilets in each floor and extra 20+bathroom ...

reviews.review_heading: Good campus environment and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: There are hostels for boys and girls separately. All instruments for studies are provided in the labs. One building for the library, one for the auditorium, and indoor games. A small chapel is also available at our college. There is a Wi-Fi zone for browsing. Classrooms are well maintained. The college provides a rest room in case of sickness or tiredness. Sports equipment is also available.

reviews.review_heading: A school with great infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great infrastructure with the classrooms being smart classrooms. Free Wi-Fi is provided. The facilities are great. We have a digital library having thousands of collections of books, reviews, research materials available at the college library. I will give 9.5 for infrastructure out off 10. There are lots of pets, goose, dogs, and a nice garden along with lots of trees in the campus. There is a vast ground. The hostel has great facilities having free Wi-Fi, triple or 4 persons ...

reviews.review_heading: The home of only academics.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available even in the hostel and on the college campus. There is a printing service just inside the campus, as well as a small restaurant and snacks bar for both hostellers and day scholars. The food quality in the canteen is average, and medical facilities are good, with a monthly visit from a doctor. Physical education is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus has a natural beauty.
reviews.review_text: The course I took was M.Tech in Embedded Systems, and the duration was 2 years. The batch had 60 students and the teachers we had were around 15; I am not sure about the count of supporting staff. We had highly qualified faculty. There is a vast library for the students, a canteen, a hostel, and start-up support centers in the college. Clubs such as NSS, IEEE, IEDC, etc. are present at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements, infrastructure, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. All facilities are available. Laboratories are well-equipped. The laboratory staff members are very helpful and they always clarify our doubts. Digital classrooms are available. I am not a day scholar. I do not know about hostel facilities. I have heard that the boys' hostel is satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges in Thrissur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is top-notch and well-maintained by the management committee. All classrooms are spacious. We have a huge library with a good collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: The college is mainly focused on education.
reviews.review_text: The management is good. The infrastructure and facilities are very good. Laboratories have a good internet connection. The college is very clean and lush green. We have decent libraries with all types of books related to subjects. We are currently having two boys' hostels and three girls' hostels. There is a good mess that offers good and hygienic food for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. The laboratory facility is the best. Lecture halls are also available and our campus environment is clean. Our entire campus has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel facilities are also good. There are 60 students in each classroom. We have a large library, and several books and journals are available.

overview_faqs.question: How safe is the campus of Srinivas University for students?
overview_faqs.answer: To ensure the safety of students, the university takes various measures. There are CCTV cameras installed everywhere. The university is presently creating more rules and regulations for anti-ragging. The university has an anti-ragging committee available in the university.

overview_faqs.question: Is Srinivas University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Srinivas University is a good university. Srinivas University is a private skill-focused and research university located in Mangalore. This university (one of the 18 Srinivas Group of Institutions) was established in 2013 by the Karnataka State Act. Srinivas University Mangalore offers PG, UG, and research programmes under 9 faculties/institutes with about 71 programmes.

review_summary.college_name: Srinivas University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Augmented Reality, Artificial Intelligence, and Virtual Reality - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and campus.

content.Placements: In this college, placements are good. They have collaborated with companies like Amazon and Microsoft; this helps in getting placements. They have IBM certificates to help in getting vacancies in big companies. Almost all students got placements through the college in Amazon, Microsoft, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very good and clean, they have hourly cleaning timings. They have many good labs. In hostels, there is good food and cleaning. The hostels are nearby the college, and there is a pickup bus to go to the hostels, they have Wi-Fi and well-maintained bathrooms.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Software Development and Web Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placement all the time and I see many of my seniors get a happy ending.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students will enter the college. Average package is 4.29 LPA for 3 years. Recruiting companies were AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, etc. 60%-80% of students got internships. Roles offered were cloud support, technical analyst, software intern, IT support, and web/app developer (intern level). Another roles were there special teachers come from specialists and they take classes too.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent maintenance and health food, all staffs were helpful and nice bathroom and clean. All time hot water was available and water purifiers were there 24 hour. Staff will be there. Security was also there. It was the safest place all time, Wi-Fi was there 5G unlimited and also library.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Mar 2024)-B.Com. in International Accounting with ACCA Integration - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placement and facilities.

content.Placements: Placement assistance provided. 35% of students get placed. Packages offered range from 2.5 LPA to 6 LPA. Large-scale businesses in chartered accountancy offer placements (company names are not acknowledged). The college helps by providing internship placements at Placemantra and assists with further placements. The course focuses on accounts and special positions in corporate.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilitates easy access to the library, Wi-Fi, and well-maintained classrooms. The quality of the hostel is moderate. The food quality is just fine. Medical facilities are good. They organize sports events with good standards of achievement.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Software Development and Web Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the current placements, but good faculty members and campus facilities.

content.Placements: 40 to 60%. The highest CTC is 3.5 LPA. In my academic years, there were only local companies from Dakshina Karnataka. I think only a few students got internships, like under 10. Most of the students got internships from internship training companies for a fee. Top roles offered are business development executive or associate, and similar.
content.Infrastructure: We have a new campus for the ICIS department with large lab facilities. One single lab can handle 100+ students. There is a big 86-inch Samsung smart monitor in every class. Also, there are projectors and chalkboards. We have a library with digital access too. Classrooms are equipped with charging sockets and a great amount of space.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend anyone to get admission at Srinivas University.

content.Placements: I don't know about placements. They said that they'll provide placements for us. I don't know what is ging to happen if they do or not. I am studying in the 3rd year. My 5th semester hasn't started yet. I am on vacation now after the 4th semester.
content.Infrastructure: There are some low-level benches and desks. The infrastructure is not worth what we pay as a college feels. There is no Wi-Fi in the beginning and it is only for limited people and for some, it will not connect. Sports and games are also not that good.

admission_overview.college_name: Srinivas University Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility & Selection, Application Process

admission_process.title: Srinivas University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Srinivas University admission2025is entrance-based for all the courses. The university conducts in-house entrance examinations for selection. However, entrance exams such as KCET, and Karnataka PGCET are also accepted for course admissions. The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes in various streams such asHotel Management, Medicine and Health Sciences, IT and Software,Business and Management Studies, Engineering, etc.

ForSrinivas University admissions, eligible candidates can visit the official website of the University and register online, till the seats get filled. Moreover, the university also offers scholarships to encourage young minds. Before applying for any of theSrinivas University courses, aspirants are advised to check the eligibility and selection criteria.

Candidates seeking admission have to go through the entrance test approved by the university for selection. The university has prescribed eligibility and selection criteria for each of the programmes. A few important highlights related to theSrinivas University admission criteriafor some popular courses are mentioned in the table below:
Eligibility Criteria

Candidate must have passed graduation with 45% aggregate from a recognised university
Mandatory Courses: BSc (Anaesthesia Technology, Operation Theatre Technology)/ BSc (Cardiovascular Technology)/ BSc (Cardiac Care Technology)
Candidate must have passed graduation with 50% aggregate from a recognised university
SUAT/Karnataka PGCET
For details about more Srinivas University courses,Click Here.

The total course fee of the university includes multiple components, such as hostel fees, library deposits, training and placement fees, and more. The total course fee can vary depending on the facilities chosen by a student. Moreover, some of the fee components are one-time chargeable, while some have to be paid annually or semesterly.Srinivas University fee breakupis provided in the following table for some of the programmes:

The university shall follow the reservation policy prescribed by the Government of India or the state of Karnataka. Students are admitted to each of the courses following the seat intake. The seat count varies from one course to another and can also differ for each specialisation. The following table mentionsSrinivas University seat intakefor some of its courses:
Course Name
NOTE:The above-mentioned seat intake details are as per the official website/sanctioning body. They are, however, subject to changes and hence, are indicative.

For admission at the university, aspirants have to go through the complete process that involves online registration, release of cutoff marks, selection rounds, and seat allotment.Srinivas University admission criteriais entrance-based for all the programmes. The educational qualification required for selection varies for each course. Details about each of the stages in the admission process are provided below:
STEP 1: Srinivas University Application Process 2025

The university application form can be downloaded from its official website (srinivasuniversity.edu.in). It can then be filled out carefully and submitted at the admission office in person. In addition, aspirants must pay the application fee online as well. The link for the same is activated on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Release of Cutoff List

Following the application process, the university releases the merit/cutoff list.Srinivas University cutoffindicates the minimum score required in the respective exam for selection. The merit list of the university exam shall also be available on the official website/notice board of the university. Candidates who meet the cutoff criteria can be called for an interview/selection round.
STEP 3: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates shall further be called for document verification and fee payment. During document verification, students shall have important documents copies and originals. At that time, aspirants can be asked to pay some amount of the admission fee for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required to get a seat at Srinivas University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the College of Management and Commerce, students should get a minimum of 25 marks in semester end examinations and a minimum of 25 marks in the internal assessment to pass in the particular subject.For admission to the College of Education, candidates with at least 50% marks either in bachelor's degree and/or the master's degree or any other qualifications equivalent thereto are eligible.For admission to the College of Social Sciences & Humanities, post-graduates in respective disciplines mentioned above with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply.For admission to the Diploma in Engineering/Technology program, candidates passing the Diploma in Engineering/Technology examination with a minimum of 50% marks from AICTE approved Polytechnics are eligible.

placement_report.college_name: Srinivas University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Srinivas University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Srinivas University placement report 2023 is not released. Earlier, the highest package offered during Srinivas University placements 2022 stood at INR 20 LPA . Further, the mean and median package offered during Srinivas University placements 2022 stood at INR 4.5 LPA and INR 10 LPA , respectively. Further, the placement rate recorded during Srinivas University placements 2022 was 100%. Other than this, more than 300 offers were made and 180 companies visited the campus during Srinivas University placements 2022.

faqs.question: What is the scope of job after BSc?
faqs.answer: With BSc degree you are eligible for majority of non technical posts in Government (Central, State, PSU, Banks etc) where eligibility criterion is graduation degree. Beside this you may able to get job of technician, lab assistant in Scientific R&D organisation. You are also eligible to do BEd and take school teacher job. In order to have better career growth you will have to do post graduation.

faqs.question: How are BCA placements at Srinivas University?
faqs.answer: BCA students can get upto 15LPA. Srinivas University has an active placement cell and a good placement record for its BCA program. Many top companies recruit students from the BCA program at Srinivas University based on their performance. The BCA program is designed to make students experts in networking, server installation and management, web servers, client-server technology, and web programming with database management. The course adopts the latest technologies into the curriculum and has a good placement record, with students getting placed during the fifth semester in leading IT companies like Infosys Technologies, Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture Technologies, and Cap Gemini, among others. The university follows a unique stage-wise campus placement conditioning process for its eligible and registered students.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Srinivas University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the QS World University Rankings 2026, the institute ranked #454 under Southern Asia category, and #1401-1500 under Asia. Srinivas University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Srinivas University rankings is covered in the following article:

hostel_campus.college_name: Srinivas University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: It stocks over 64,500 books and subscribes to nearly 120 journals/ periodicals/ magazines. It also offers digital information services such as UGC Info net.,1,500 Scanned Books, 1,600 PDF Books available in library collection.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground

library.description: It stocks over 64,500 books and subscribes to nearly 120 journals/ periodicals/ magazines. It also offers digital information services such as UGC Info net.,1,500 Scanned Books, 1,600 PDF Books available in library collection.

cafeteria.description: All the three existing campuses have Cafeteria facilities which are designed to provide students with a wide range of vegetarian dining options.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good and clean, they have hourly cleaning timings. They have many good labs. In hostels, there is good food and cleaning. The hostels are nearby the college, and there is a pickup bus to go to the hostels, they have Wi-Fi and well-maintained bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement all the time and I see many of my seniors get a happy ending.
reviews.review_text: Excellent maintenance and health food, all staffs were helpful and nice bathroom and clean. All time hot water was available and water purifiers were there 24 hour. Staff will be there. Security was also there. It was the safest place all time, Wi-Fi was there 5G unlimited and also library.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college facilitates easy access to the library, Wi-Fi, and well-maintained classrooms. The quality of the hostel is moderate. The food quality is just fine. Medical facilities are good. They organize sports events with good standards of achievement.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the current placements, but good faculty members and campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a new campus for the ICIS department with large lab facilities. One single lab can handle 100+ students. There is a big 86-inch Samsung smart monitor in every class. Also, there are projectors and chalkboards. We have a library with digital access too. Classrooms are equipped with charging sockets and a great amount of space.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend anyone to get admission at Srinivas University.
reviews.review_text: There are some low-level benches and desks. The infrastructure is not worth what we pay as a college feels. There is no Wi-Fi in the beginning and it is only for limited people and for some, it will not connect. Sports and games are also not that good.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our college are good. The hostel and the quality of food are good. There is a canteen in our college. It provides good and healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with good infrastructure and placement, but needs a curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Campus wise high with Wi-Fi and dedicated bandwidth when it comes to labs. Well-equipped labs for each department including CSE AIML, mech, etc., are available. Special ventilated and digital with projector, smart boards are available for interactive sessions. A central library is available with a vast collection of books, e-journals, and research papers. There is separate hostel for boys and girls with 2/3 sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Srinivas University.
reviews.review_text: I like to work on computers and develop software so I have chosen this course. We had mini-projects each semester which enhanced our developing software skills and also it was easy when we reached the final project of academics. I was not staying in the college hostel however, had a few friends who were staying in the college hostel the hostel was a little away from the college say 3 km where the college bus would drop them off morning, and evening to the place and there was Srinivas hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, a good library, and qualified teachers. I am fully satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is average.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best universities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel food is very good and unlimited. They provide food 4 times a day. Milk and tea are also provided in the hostel. The registration process is very easy. You have to give your name, pay the hostel fees, and get a room. PGs are also good nearby JECRC University. If you want to live in a PG, you can live.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review from honest student.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to infrastructure, my college has moderate facilities. We have college Wi-Fi, but only 32 MB of data is accessible per day. Every classroom has a projector, fans, and lights. The hostel is also good, with 24/7 electricity, two fans in each room, and elevators. The food is moderate, and sports accessories are also moderately available.

reviews.review_heading: I’m very satisfied and also got placed in one of the startup companies before completing my degree.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure for software development and web designing courses. However, the equipment for cloud computing and AI could be improved. The college building is impressive with a beautiful ambiance. The classrooms are spacious with smart class facilities. Canteen and mess facilities are provided and are decent. Wi-Fi is not provided for personal use. Overall, it's a great place to learn with some room for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and facilities with decent placements, but scope for industry tie-ups.
reviews.review_text: Our department is equipped with modern labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and well-maintained. The quality of food is served in the mess and a variety of options are available in the canteen. We have basic medical facilities. 24/7 health center is available. There are sports grounds for games like cricket, football, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Srinivas institute of nursing sciences.
reviews.review_text:
College has 4 floors. 
Ground floor = 1st-year GNM classroom, computer lab, library, stationery store, office, and principal chamber. 
1st floor: anatomy lab, community lab, 2&3 GNM classroom, nutrition lab, OBG lab, staffroom 
2nd floor: pediatric lab, staffroom, 1, 2, 3 & 4-year B.Sc. classroom
3rd floor: auditorium, foundation lab
Each floor has ladies and guest toilets. The hostel has 6 floors. 
Ground floor: mess, warden's room, office 
1st floor: engineering students 
2nd floor: pharmacy s...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of our college is very good as each room of our hostel is very good. Around two should stay in one room. Facilities inside the room are very good. We have a good canteen facility. The food served in the canteen is very good. A variety of items are available in the mess.

Here are some additional updates regarding the SB Patil College of Engineering:

faqs.answer: A:    S. B. Patil College of Engineering offers median package range of INR 350,000 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program and has been rated 2.6 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered at S. B. Patil College of Engineering during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: S. B. Patil College of Engineering provides Full Time programs at the UG level. These courses are available in stream like Engineering, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,89,504 to 2,58,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech.

faqs.answer:
A:    S. B. Patil College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.

S. B. Patil College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at S. B. Patil College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by S. B. Patil College of Engineering are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at S. B. Patil College of Engineering goes up to 360.

description: SB Patil College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the SB Patil College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

SB Patil College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 243080 and 424226 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 243080, B.Tech. in Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 277682.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 243080.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the SB Patil College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 42.74 and 77.13, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 77.13. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percenti

SB Patil College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 77.13. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 75.52 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at SB Patil College of Engineering for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

hostel_campus.college_name: SB Patil College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: In 2015, the placement was good.
reviews.review_text: There are the best facilities in our college. There is free Wi-Fi in the college. Our classrooms are very clean and well-developed. There are PPTs for teaching. The quality of our college facilities is No. 1. The college has days like Sports Day, Traditional Day, and games like cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: - There is only one big library of college for reading which is open in college time only. - 2-3 computer labs are there with full Wi-fi for practical. - Hostel is great, all facilities are available in hostel like Wi-Fi, B.Ed System, Auro drinking water and so many other things.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled but the speed was slow. Classrooms were good. It also provides a good library. Hostel facilities were average. The food served in the canteen was not good. Medical facilities were available. Sports activities were also provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: All students in the 2021 batch received good salary packages.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel, Wi-Fi is available. There are good rooms. Each room is allotted to three people. Classrooms and labs are good. Medical facilities are not available at our college. Sports are good, but sports events are not arranged at our college. Basketball courts, hockey grounds, and swimming pools are not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: I love the infrastructure of our college. It is located in the womb of nature. The buildings were constructed to get more sunlight, ventilation, and space for students to feel relaxed. Trees and grass are also on the campus freshen the air of the college.

reviews.review_heading: This is the place to learn and they offer jobs through placement drive
reviews.review_text: I just love the infrastructure of my college. It was located in the womb of the nature. The buildings were constructed to get more sunlight, ventilation and space for students to feel relax. Trees and grass also in campus that fresh the air of college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is better by communicating with staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. They provide the best necessary lab equipment, bus transportation facilities for students, well-parking system, sports grounds, good quality mess and hostel facility with Wi-Fi. There are advanced classrooms with remarkable projectors. The library has all types of books, including technical and non-technical.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are really good here, and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: The range of the Wi-Fi facility provided here is not better, but there are 4 labs and 150 classrooms. There is an excellent library, and the food served in the hostel and also in the canteen is very bad. Outstanding activities are conducted in our college. Medical facilities are not available near the college, but our college provides its own car to travel to the hospital from college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Not good placement in 2022 batch but Teachers and campus life were the best.

review_content.Placements: Not a good placement experience; very few companies hire in on-campus drives. L&T and Tata come to hire, with only 9 students out of 85 being placed. One company offered only 1.2 LPA, which is the worst. Most of us got internships in Tata Technology as apprentices. There is a need for improvement in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Old building, but well-maintained classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is not available in the college; only in computer labs, we can use the internet. The hostel has a separate gym for us, but the mess food is not good; most of us have food outside the hostel. In sports, our college is very active; if anyone wants a career in sports, proper training will be provided by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Best college in the rural area of Pune. Variety of branches, good faculty and high placements.

review_content.Placements: College placement is good. 55-60% students get placed in companies on an average INR 3-4 lacs package. Students get placed in Tata motors, L&T, Termax, Bosch and rural companies. Almost 70% of students got internship in big companies like Tata motors, L&T, Bosch and remaining students got internship in rural companies. Top role is offered by Bosch as a design engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course is clean. Availability of high-speed Wi-Fi, every section have their own labs, big classrooms and good ventilation are there. College has a big library and variety of books. College hostel is big and clean, good infrastructure and gym availability. There are variety of meal in college canteen but it is open from Mon-Sat. College has separate medical section and best medical facilities. College has a big cricket ground, also for kabbadi, basketball, badminton and seperate game room for chess, carrom, table tennis etc.
