review_summary.college_name: Jaihind College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Decent college but limited opportunities.

content.Placements: Placements and internships are not that great. Only 40% of students got internships. Many of them are unpaid. Around 50% of students got placed. Many students get placed. The average package is around 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is okay. Classrooms are clean and spacious. We have a central library and limited Wi-Fi access. The hostel is not that great but liveable. The food is also not that good in terms of taste. Mostly students eat outside. Medical facilities are not there. We have limited sports.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are okay. They deliver lectures. They are not very approachable to students. The curriculum is not that great. It does not get regularly updated. External courses are required by students to become industry-ready. Exams are easy. The passing rate is above 90%.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Jai Hind College of Engineering Admission Information.

content.Placements: There is a college that provides every student with placement facilities, offering monthly salaries ranging from 40k to 60k through campus placements. Tata Techno companies offer internships through the college, and a total of 220 students are placed in this course, with various roles offered to join jobs.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the department and hostel are so good; the infrastructure provides the best Wi-Fi connection, 4 classrooms, 4 labs, and 1 library where all books are provided. The college canteen food is so tasty and yummy. There is a "Jeem Khana Commiti" for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Not good placement in 2022 batch but Teachers and campus life were the best.

content.Placements: Not a good placement experience; very few companies hire in on-campus drives. L&T and Tata come to hire, with only 9 students out of 85 being placed. One company offered only 1.2 LPA, which is the worst. Most of us got internships in Tata Technology as apprentices. There is a need for improvement in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Old building, but well-maintained classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is not available in the college; only in computer labs, we can use the internet. The hostel has a separate gym for us, but the mess food is not good; most of us have food outside the hostel. In sports, our college is very active; if anyone wants a career in sports, proper training will be provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Best college in the rural area of Pune. Variety of branches, good faculty and high placements.

content.Placements: College placement is good. 55-60% students get placed in companies on an average INR 3-4 lacs package. Students get placed in Tata motors, L&T, Termax, Bosch and rural companies. Almost 70% of students got internship in big companies like Tata motors, L&T, Bosch and remaining students got internship in rural companies. Top role is offered by Bosch as a design engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course is clean. Availability of high-speed Wi-Fi, every section have their own labs, big classrooms and good ventilation are there. College has a big library and variety of books. College hostel is big and clean, good infrastructure and gym availability. There are variety of meal in college canteen but it is open from Mon-Sat. College has separate medical section and best medical facilities. College has a big cricket ground, also for kabbadi, basketball, badminton and seperate game room for chess, carrom, table tennis etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very good and helpful here.

content.Placements: The placement rate in our course is between 20%-30%. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is up to 8 LPA. Companies like Tata, Mercedes, Skoda, etc., visit here for placements. I think about 30% of the students got internships in Tata. Some of them got placed in the sales department in companies like Toppr, Byju's, etc., which are actually study-related. Sales and production roles are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available here, and the labs are average. Classrooms are fine, and the libraries are also very well. Sports are given the top priority to us. The food served here is average, and the mess is not much good. Some students don't like to eat there, and they go to another mess to have breakfast and lunch.

description: Jaihind College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Jaihind College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Jaihind College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 367493 and 594509 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 367493, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 594784.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 367493.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Jaihind College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 56.84, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Civil. Refer to the table below to see the first and last-round cutoff percentiles for various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for General category students belonging to the

Jaihind College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Civil turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 56.84. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 69.07 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Jaihind College of Engineering for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

Getting an idea of different years’ cutoff trends helps students prepare better for upcoming examinations. To assist with the same, the table below provides MHT CET cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023. Students can download the year-wise PDF for future reference.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top three most competitive specialisations were M.Tech. in Civil - Structural Engineering, followed by M.E. in Design Engineering, and M.Tech. in Computer Engineering, with the cutoff being 20.13, 6.33 and 5.67, respectively.
See the table below for more such comparisons about other categories in different rounds and years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jaihind College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Decent college but limited opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. Classrooms are clean and spacious. We have a central library and limited Wi-Fi access. The hostel is not that great but liveable. The food is also not that good in terms of taste. Mostly students eat outside. Medical facilities are not there. We have limited sports.

reviews.review_heading: Jai Hind College of Engineering Admission Information.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the department and hostel are so good; the infrastructure provides the best Wi-Fi connection, 4 classrooms, 4 labs, and 1 library where all books are provided. The college canteen food is so tasty and yummy. There is a "Jeem Khana Commiti" for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Not good placement in 2022 batch but Teachers and campus life were the best.
reviews.review_text: Old building, but well-maintained classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is not available in the college; only in computer labs, we can use the internet. The hostel has a separate gym for us, but the mess food is not good; most of us have food outside the hostel. In sports, our college is very active; if anyone wants a career in sports, proper training will be provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the rural area of Pune. Variety of branches, good faculty and high placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course is clean. Availability of high-speed Wi-Fi, every section have their own labs, big classrooms and good ventilation are there. College has a big library and variety of books. College hostel is big and clean, good infrastructure and gym availability. There are variety of meal in college canteen but it is open from Mon-Sat. College has separate medical section and best medical facilities. College has a big cricket ground, also for kabbadi, basketball, badminton and sepe...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very good and helpful here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available here, and the labs are average. Classrooms are fine, and the libraries are also very well. Sports are given the top priority to us. The food served here is average, and the mess is not much good. Some students don't like to eat there, and they go to another mess to have breakfast and lunch.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied, but the faculty are really good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good, and the college grounds and hostel facilities are very good. Libraries and labs are clean, and Wi-Fi is not so good for range and classrooms are clean. Medical facilities are good, food in the canteen is good. The mess is good, and the sports ground is good. Libraries and classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like spacious classrooms, good practical labs, all related practical instruments, excellent and technical teaching staff, large workshop unit for mechanical engineering students with twenty number of CNC machines, fabrication and carpentry units are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities with good helping staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a Wi-Fi facility, good practical labs. Classrooms are having excellent ventilation and a nice library with education relevant books. Hostel and mess facilities are also good. Good food facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good College for education.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good best environment for education, hostel facility is also good, Wi-Fi is available 24 hrs a day for students for educational purpose, sports is arranged time to time and other cultural events is also arranged properly its very good for students.

reviews.review_heading: A great college for those who want education and extra knowledge at affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: All the labs are available in our college. It has a huge playground and a garden. The canteen serves great meals at an affordable price. The college has a huge auditorium, and there is a separate hall on every floor.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good in terms of staff, but there is some problem with placement.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure. The computer labs are very nice, and the network quality is good. The classrooms are the best and very comfortable for students. The library contains various books for information. The college staff provides various information related to placement and internships, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Very best thing this college is good facilities and good placement structure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facility is Wi-Fi, and also the best classrooms. There are a lot of facilities like warm water, Aqua guard, and also very tasty food. There are a lot of options in food. There are also good facilities for medical and sports games like football, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so good, the study environment is awesome, and we have Wi-Fi in college so that students can study without any obstacles. Labs are well-equipped. The classrooms are spacious. Libraries are equipped with all the books that students need. The college has a canteen which serves healthy and good food. Having good first aid. We have sports day and games time also.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college, surrounded by greenery and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the atmosphere is good. The campus is surrounded by greenery. Wi-Fi facility is available here. Labs have all types of equipment in good condition. A library is available with various books, so students can get good knowledge. The hostel is also available here. Good and healthy food is available in the mess. A huge ground is available to play games and sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Raising its infrastructure, teaching staff, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: At this college, the department and hostel are so good. The infrastructure provides the best Wi-Fi connection, 4 classrooms, 4 labs, and 1 library where all books are provided. The college canteen food is so tasty and yummy. There is a Jeem Khana Committee for sports and games.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) refunds fees under certain circumstances. The refund is given based on the University Grants Commission (UGC) guidelines.According to the guidelines they will charge you some percentage of fees.The charge amount varies based on the time taken for withdrawal from the program.The 100% of refund id given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or more before the Starting of classes.The 90% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made less than 15 days before the starting of classes.The 80% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or less after the Starting of classes.The 50% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after the commencement of classes.No refund if the withdrawal is made more than 30 days after the commencement of classes.

faqs.answer: A:    Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) in Jaipur, Rajasthan admission is usually merit based. However, for PhD the university's conducts entrance exam for admission. The application form for 2024 UG and PG courses is open. Candidates can visit the official website of MJRPU's to register.
faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University 2023?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get direct admission at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU). However, there are eligibility criteria.The admissions process for all courses at MJRPU is online and offline. Fill out the application form on the official website.Pay the application fee online using net banking, credit, or debit card.Pay the application fee by demand draft.Deposit the fee through NEFT or RTGS.For PhD: Eligible candidates must appear in the Entrance Test conducted by the university.
faqs.question: Can I join Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    MAHATMA JYOTI Rao Phoole’s B.Pharma tuition fee varies according to the major and is between Rs 75,00 and Rs 3,00,00 per year. The average B.Pharma course fee is about Rs 1.89,000 per year. Candidates are admitted to the program on the basis of their 12th CBSE pass. Candidates have to fulfill the eligibility criteria, which includes minimum 50% combined score in Physics and Chemistry with Mathematics or Biology as compulsory subjects.For more information, please visit Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole official website or admission cell.

reviews_list.review_title: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.

review_content.Placements: Yes, the college offers placements if you have a good percentage in your exams and have such qualities, so you will be selected and placed at top firms. I am currently in my first year; that's why I don't have the same amount of knowledge, but I have seen my seniors get placed in various top firms in India.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in the College for any department. And also, there is no scholarship program for the students. In the future, I would like to prepare for judicial exams. The minimum package for the Judiciary is 10 Lacs annually. I have also done some internships in the Session and High Court to gain more knowledge of law.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

course_faqs.question: What is the cost of BSc at MJRPU Jaipur?
course_faqs.answer: The overall cost of BSc at MJRPU Jaipur is INR 2,000 - INR 4 lakh. The fees might include components other than tuition fees. Candidates also has to pay a registration fee of INR 2,500. You can pay the fee online through net banking, credit card, debit card, demand draft, NEFT, or RTGS. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

course_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for BSc courses at Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University in 2025?
course_faqs.answer: The tuition fees for BSc courses at Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University in 2025 ranges between INR 81,000 - INR 4.5 lakh. The tuition fee for BSc courses can be charged either on a per annum basis or a per semester basis. Candidates are advised to visit the official website of Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University and check the tuition fee for their chosen BSc course.

course_faqs.question: Dose MJRPU offers BSc scholarships?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University does offer scholarships for its BSc course. The university provides Means-cum-Merit Financial Assistance to its students. Candidates must secure a valid score in their last qualifying exam to be eligible for the scholarship. The student who has secured 60 to 70% marks, will get a 10% Scholarship on tuition fees, and the student who has secured 71 to 80% marks, will get a 12.5% Scholarship on tuition fees.

course_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee structure for the Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University BSc course?
course_faqs.answer: The tuition fee structure varies between different mods of Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University BSc courses. Individual BSc courses usualy follow a per semester structure for their tuition fee while integrated courses follow a per annum structure. However, some courses in either category can have a different fee structure than the rest. Candidates are advisedto confirm the fee structure by visiting the official website of Mahatma Jyotirao Phule University.

review_summary.college_name: MJRPU Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has nice facilities and good infrastructure. It has 2 campuses and is good to take admission.

content.Placements: MJRP University has a peaceful environment and is useful for all types of courses. About 80% of students get placements after completing the degree. There is no fixed average package, and it depends on our percentage and practicals. The average salary is Rs. 40,000 per month, and can be easily earned by an average student in the physiotherapy course. Approximately, all students get internship who are doing a degree from college. It is a budget-friendly college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a study environment and daily classes. It has a nice campus and also a playground. The library has books for every course. A hostel facility is also available with good food. There are helpful colleagues who help us in our studies and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA + MBA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our batch of integrated BBA+MBA students had a great journey despite having a small class size.

content.Placements: Our batch of integrated BBA and MBA students had a great academic journey. The strength of the students is very low. This year, ICICI has been recruiting for the internships. The top role that was offered to our batch is Relationship Manager, and the average package that was offered is 2.5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not up to par but they have recently renovated the digital room with the latest digital equipment for the management students. The hostel facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and conducive living environment for students.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (July 2025)- B.Sc. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.

content.Placements: Yes, the college offers placements if you have a good percentage in your exams and have such qualities, so you will be selected and placed at top firms. I am currently in my first year; that's why I don't have the same amount of knowledge, but I have seen my seniors get placed in various top firms in India.
content.Infrastructure: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: There is no placement in the College for any department. And also, there is no scholarship program for the students. In the future, I would like to prepare for judicial exams. The minimum package for the Judiciary is 10 Lacs annually. I have also done some internships in the Session and High Court to gain more knowledge of law.
content.Infrastructure: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college campus review.

content.Placements: They have no placements in this college. You only get knowledge of coding, web development and Java, but you cannot get a placement because there are no collaborations with the companies by the college. You get amazing marks in the college but you don't get placed here.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of this University, I am interested in Computer Science whose faculty teaches very clearly and gives us proper knowledge of the course which is very good. We have an unlimited Wi-Fi, 2 computer labs, a library and a hostel for girls.

faqs.question: Does Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) refunds fees under certain circumstances. The refund is given based on the University Grants Commission (UGC) guidelines.According to the guidelines they will charge you some percentage of fees.The charge amount varies based on the time taken for withdrawal from the program. The 100% of refund id given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or more before the Starting of classes.The 90% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made less than 15 days before the starting of classes.The 80% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or less after the Starting of classes.The 50% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after the commencement of classes.No refund if the withdrawal is made more than 30 days after the commencement of classes.

faqs.question: How much does B.Pharma at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University cost?

reviews.review_heading: It has nice facilities and good infrastructure. It has 2 campuses and is good to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a study environment and daily classes. It has a nice campus and also a playground. The library has books for every course. A hostel facility is also available with good food. There are helpful colleagues who help us in our studies and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our batch of integrated BBA+MBA students had a great journey despite having a small class size.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not up to par but they have recently renovated the digital room with the latest digital equipment for the management students. The hostel facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and conducive living environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.
reviews.review_text: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college campus review.
reviews.review_text: As a student of this University, I am interested in Computer Science whose faculty teaches very clearly and gives us proper knowledge of the course which is very good. We have an unlimited Wi-Fi, 2 computer labs, a library and a hostel for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The campus is fully connected to high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms and labs are excellent. The food served in the mess is good. They provide games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very nice infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in the course and hostel at the college. Wi-fi, lab, classroom, library—all the necessary facilities are available in the college. The quality of the facilities is decent. Mess and canteen food are acceptable. There are sports facilities, and the number of medical facilities is also high.

reviews.review_heading: The worst decision of my life is, joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, and labs are not available. Computers do not work properly. Toilets are not maintained properly. Dissatisfied with the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best knowledge to students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides internships in the final year. The average salary offered is Rs. 54,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely not good for law students.
reviews.review_text: The library is not updated for a very long time. Books are too old and not a sufficient collection of books are there. The classrooms are average. You should not expect smart classrooms here. Wi-Fi is not good. There is no canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: There are many hostels in our college. There are separate hostels for girls and boys.  Wi-Fi is available for students to study. There are many cultural activities and events. There is a library for students to study there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. I suggest you take admission here to make your career.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent Wi-Fi speed, good labs, and well-seated classrooms. The library environment is very good, and it has knowledgeable books. The hostel quality is good. The food served is just like home food. There is also a huge canteen in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, well-equipped with ventilation and Wi-Fi. The food is decent. The variety in food is good, and they give you three meals a day and tea two times a day. The hostel fee is affordable, even the hostel facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a bit above average college.
reviews.review_text: There is no boys hostel on the main city campus. There is no Wi-Fi in college. There is no ground on the main city campus. It has PGs around it, so you can live nearby with freedom.

reviews.review_heading: This university is good but not for every course.
reviews.review_text: This college has a small campus, but the way they have utilised that small space is good. Hostels still do not have a washroom on one floor, but it will be built in a couple of years. There is no canteen and no sports and games in this college. The food served in a hostel is very good.

paragraphs: Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) refunds fees under certain circumstances. The refund is given based on the University Grants Commission (UGC) guidelines.According to the guidelines they will charge you some percentage of fees.The charge amount varies based on the time taken for withdrawal from the program.

The 100% of refund id given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or more before the Starting of classes.The 90% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made less than 15 days before the starting of classes.The 80% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or less after the Starting of classes.The 50% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after the commencement of classes.No refund if the withdrawal is made more than 30 days after the commencement of classes.

Candidates have to fulfill the eligibility criteria, which includes minimum 50% combined score in Physics and Chemistry with Mathematics or Biology as compulsory subjects.
For more information, please visit Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole official website or admission cell.

You can pay the fee online through net banking, credit card, debit card, demand draft, NEFT, or RTGS. reviews_list.review_title: My college is good value for money and has low fees.

review_content.Placements: My college placements are very poor. Approximately 50% of students got placed in 2024, with the highest package being 6 LPA and the lowest 1.8 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average compared to other colleges. There are 8 hostels in my college, but they are average and lack cleanliness. reviews_list.review_title: Take it only if you do not have the option to drop out or not get any better colleges.

review_content.Placements: Most students here either prepare for GATE or government exams. Placements are just average. Only mass recruiting companies visit campus and the rest depends on our skills since college gives enough time for skill building. Like last year, less than 10 students out of a batch of 60 from Information Technology got placed, and that too with off-campus drive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of hostels is even better than some of the old Tier 1 colleges since we get single occupancy rooms in 3rd year and final year which have 24/7 LAN facilities. College infrastructure is just like a school classroom and not fancy like what we would expect from Tier 1 or Tier 2 colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of the Ambedkar Nagar.

content.Placements: Placement in my college is not good. On campus, very few companies visit the college, mostly students apply for off campus and online placements. This year, in the electrical department 60% students got placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the average package offered is 3 to 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average in my college, with almost basic things available like a gym, library, and student activities center. There are eight hostels in my college. The maintenance of the seven boys & one girls hostel is very bad. In the hostel, a few washrooms are broken and damaged. Wi-Fi is available in all hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent infrastructure and facilities; there are proper working labs.

content.Placements: We got the highest placement of CTC 15 LPA for a senior in the electrical branch. As a tier 3 college, we don't expect too much, but having an average placement of 6 LPA is quite a good option. I mean, what could we expect from low ranks? The college placement is decent.
content.Infrastructure: The college's academic buildings and the admin buildings have perfect infrastructure. Hostels are good. The rooms are cleaner, and we get the sweeper three times a week. There are a total of 7 hostels if we count 1 girls' hostel and 6 boys' hostels. We get a different hostel in the first and second years; in the first and second years, we get the three-seater. In the third year, two options are available: a single seater and a double seater, as well. In the final year, we get a single room.

cut_off.college_name: Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar Cutoff 2025: Check UPTAC Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 152465 and 398037 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Inform

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Information Technology was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 152465 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 161285 in 2023 and 107616 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Information Technology demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar.

As the Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top two most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with the closing ranks of 411728 and 598741, respectively.

For admission to Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar.

Students who want to know the UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for various rounds can refer to the table below. Candidates also have the option to view the cutoff data for the previous two years, i.e., 2024 and 2023. These cutoff lists can also be downloaded for later use.

hostel_campus.college_name: Rajkiya Engineering College

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Ambedkar Nagar.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is average in my college, with almost basic things available like a gym, library, and student activities center. There are eight hostels in my college. The maintenance of the seven boys & one girls hostel
 is very bad. In the hostel, a few washrooms are broken and damaged. Wi-Fi is available in all hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure and facilities; there are proper working labs.
reviews.review_text: The college's academic buildings and the admin buildings have perfect infrastructure. Hostels are good. The rooms are cleaner, and we get the sweeper three times a week. There are a total of 7 hostels if we count 1 girls' hostel and 6 boys' hostels. We get a different hostel in the first and second years; in the first and second years, we get the three-seater. In the third year, two options are available: a single seater and a double seater, as well. In the final year, we get a single room.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good value for money and has low fees.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average compared to other colleges. There are 8 hostels in my college, but they are average and lack cleanliness. The bathrooms are in poor condition and damaged. There is a lack of grounds for cricket, football, and other sports, and no sports facilities are available in the college recreation area.

reviews.review_heading: Take it only if you do not have the option to drop out or not get any better colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostels is even better than some of the old Tier 1 colleges since we get single occupancy rooms in 3rd year and final year which have 24/7 LAN facilities. College infrastructure is just like a school classroom and not fancy like what we would expect from Tier 1 or Tier 2 colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkarnagar.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average in my college. Almost all basic things are available, like gym, library, and student activity centre. The maintenance system is very bad; few things are broken and damaged, but they are not repaired. Wi-Fi is available in all buildings with average internet speed.

reviews.review_heading: REC Ambedkar Nagar at a glance.
reviews.review_text:
Hostels are plus points here; there are separate hostels for each year, one for girls , one for lateral entry students and the third year has two hostels .
All hostels are 3 - seater except for the hostel for final-year boys, which is the Atal boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, in my opinion, you can opt for this college.
reviews.review_text: Campus: Not a very large campus, but being a state government college, it is the best. Wi-Fi is available; labs are not as good as top colleges, but sufficient labs are available. Mess facilities are available in every hostel, and there are sports and other councils where you can explore. Medical facility: Around 500 m near to Government City Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Labs are good. Classrooms are well-maintained. Our college has many labs and their materials. The campus is small. The hostel facility is good. There are separate hostels for every year's students.

reviews.review_heading: Its an average college and absolutely in your budget.
reviews.review_text:
1. The infrastructure of the academic building is good. In academic block there is a good facility of labs as Machine learning lab, autocat lab and also different labs are there for civil department also. 
2. Second, if we talk about campus there is a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Rajkiya Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi labs are awesome in all way. Facilities and faculty are literally awesome in all way. Medical facility, sports, games and mess canteen are so well. We can interact to all the facility easily and they are more easily accessible. I like my college a lot in all the manners.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed Information about Rajkiya Engineering College Ambedkar Nagar .
reviews.review_text: There are three courses are available in the college that is IT, CIVIL, AND electrical. In the hostel you got 1 B.Ed with table and a chair and almirah. The food quality is good but do not expect the food that you eat in your home but it is decent enough hostel fee is 31k.

reviews.review_heading: All Information about REC Ambedkar Nagar.
reviews.review_text: My college have three branch IT, Electrical and Civil. Our course syllabus is fully updated according to the recent AICTE and AKTU syllabus guidelines, for industrial experience their are organized industrial tool and seminar of the industry expert.

reviews.review_heading: All Details about the Rajkiya Engineering College Ambedkar Nagar.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum is all based on the Aktu syllabus I've chosen IT because of my interest. The faculty ratio is good you'll get enough time to interact with your professors. Class tests are very frequent they are generally held after 4 weeks of teaching.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, you get a bed with a table, a chair, and an almirah. The quality of the food in the mess is good. The hostel fee is Rs. 31,000 per annum. If you do not want to stay in a hostel, you can rent a room.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajkiya Engineering College, Ambedkar Nagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Students get fresh air on campus. Our campus is surrounded by lush green fields. We can see the sunrise in the dawn and sunset in the dusk. Wi-Fi is available with a secured password, but you'll be able to access it. Students get fresh air on campus. Our labs are good. Students can do practicals of every experiment. The library is one of the most fascinating places in our college. I am residing in the Abdul Kalam hostel, which is the best hostel in our ...

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal courses range between INR 38,250 to 2,52,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance (i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc.) duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto.
Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis.
Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A value for money school in face of college.

review_content.Placements: Placements were average as per current market conditions, about 50-60% were placed. Highest on-campus package was of 23 LPA by Zscalar, while lowest package was 2.5 LPA. Top companies that came for placements were mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, and Cognizant, while some good companies came as well, including Zscalar, EPAM, and Deutsche Bank. Most common roles offered were associate software engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the college are above average, but still have some problems as well. Buildings are too old, washrooms are not really clean, and drinking water is always available, while classrooms are really clean with Wi-Fi available in libraries and canteen, but campus uses jammers during class timings. Hostels are actually really good here, clean rooms, timely, proper cleanings by staff, 24-hour clean drinkable water, and unlimited Wi-Fi with some internal restrictions on certain websites and apps. Mess is really good except their food, don't have any expectations for it as it's going to be really disappointing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: Placement in the LNCT is good when we compare it to other colleges. There's a high chance that we will get placed, and the placement alumni connection is good at LNCT. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc., visit our college for placements, so the conclusion is that our college is good at placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not bad, but I would say it can be better because the buildings here are just classroom buildings no style, no design, just mere buildings. It can be improved for the number one private college in Bhopal; that's the issue with the hostels and buildings.

review_summary.college_name: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the highest placement rate.

content.Placements: Usually, 40% of students were selected from my course last year, and the highest package goes up to 20 LPA. The top companies that visited our college were Amazon, TCS, etc. Even more than 60% of students from my course got internships from different companies.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, there is very fast Gb/s Wi-Fi, full digital classroom rooms with CCTV cameras. I am a local person from my city, so I have not stayed in the hostel, but I have heard about it from my friends. They have told me that the message and canteen were very clean, and there were many sports that were conducted in their hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A silent engineering hub.

content.Placements: Out of 100 students, there are 80% chances of getting placed, so I suggest you take admission if you are planning to be settled in a safe and silent place for study. Bhopal is silent and safe. The top companies are Capgemini and Infosys. Approximately 60% of students get internships from our CSE course. Top roles offered are sales manager or software developer in companies.
content.Infrastructure: Awesome library and canteen food is mind-blowing. Sorry to say, but there is a huge problem with Wi-Fi and the internet on the campus. If you are using the 4G band, then you can't access anything. Talking about sports, various sports are available like basketball courts and bigger stadiums for matches and many games, so from my point of view, it's amazing. The quality of food at the mess is not very good, as many complain about oily food, but the canteen food is 5 out of 5.

individual_reviews.title: A value for money school in face of college.

content.Placements: Placements were average as per current market conditions, about 50-60% were placed. Highest on-campus package was of 23 LPA by Zscalar, while lowest package was 2.5 LPA. Top companies that came for placements were mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, and Cognizant, while some good companies came as well, including Zscalar, EPAM, and Deutsche Bank. Most common roles offered were associate software engineers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the college are above average, but still have some problems as well. Buildings are too old, washrooms are not really clean, and drinking water is always available, while classrooms are really clean with Wi-Fi available in libraries and canteen, but campus uses jammers during class timings. Hostels are actually really good here, clean rooms, timely, proper cleanings by staff, 24-hour clean drinkable water, and unlimited Wi-Fi with some internal restrictions on certain websites and apps. Mess is really good except their food, don't have any expectations for it as it's going to be really disappointing.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal.

content.Placements: Placement in the LNCT is good when we compare it to other colleges. There's a high chance that we will get placed, and the placement alumni connection is good at LNCT. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc., visit our college for placements, so the conclusion is that our college is good at placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not bad, but I would say it can be better because the buildings here are just classroom buildings no style, no design, just mere buildings. It can be improved for the number one private college in Bhopal; that's the issue with the hostels and buildings.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good private college with good management and good faculty members.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed this season. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3.5-4.5 LPA. The highest package is 23 LPA. Many MNCs like Amazon, Cisco, Infosys, Accenture, Google, etc., visit the college to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college fulfills all the requirements. The library is good. The computer lab, DSA classes, and project labs are available. The LNCT group of the college is continuously building new buildings and expanding the land areas. It also provides for other states' students.

paragraphs: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering and IT and Software.Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopaladmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and MPPET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 38,250 - 2,52,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the highest placement rate.
reviews.review_text: In our department, there is very fast Gb/s Wi-Fi, full digital classroom rooms with CCTV cameras. I am a local person from my city, so I have not stayed in the hostel, but I have heard about it from my friends. They have told me that the message and canteen were very clean, and there were many sports that were conducted in their hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A silent engineering hub.
reviews.review_text: Awesome library and canteen food is mind-blowing. Sorry to say, but there is a huge problem with Wi-Fi and the internet on the campus. If you are using the 4G band, then you can't access anything. Talking about sports, various sports are available like basketball courts and bigger stadiums for matches and many games, so from my point of view, it's amazing. The quality of food at the mess is not very good, as many complain about oily food, but the canteen food is 5 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: A value for money school in face of college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the college are above average, but still have some problems as well. Buildings are too old, washrooms are not really clean, and drinking water is always available, while classrooms are really clean with Wi-Fi available in libraries and canteen, but campus uses jammers during class timings. Hostels are actually really good here, clean rooms, timely, proper cleanings by staff, 24-hour clean drinkable water, and unlimited Wi-Fi with some internal restrictions on certain webs...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not bad, but I would say it can be better because the buildings here are just classroom buildings no style, no design, just mere buildings. It can be improved for the number one private college in Bhopal; that's the issue with the hostels and buildings.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good private college with good management and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college fulfills all the requirements. The library is good. The computer lab, DSA classes, and project labs are available. The LNCT group of the college is continuously building new buildings and expanding the land areas. It also provides for other states' students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good. But some faculty members are very rude.
reviews.review_text: There are many students in this course. Hostels are good. The mess food is okay, as my friends told me about it. Wardens are good in nature.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, teachers, and curriculum but the college location is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi is available on campus. The college has libraries, a canteen, and a hostel. Labs are also well and fully furnished with all accessories and important tools for lab experiments and practicals. The library is also full of books and air-conditioned with a vibe of study in silence.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology and Science, Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but not great and we can say that it has average buildings and infrastructure. The hostel feels good as compared to other hostels and the drawback is that you can hang out on the college campus only. Sunday is allowed but on all days except Sunday, you don't have permission.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good quality of education and placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilites are good enough at this price range with an effective placement percentage. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled and classrooms are neat and clean. The library has a wide range of books. The hostel and mess quality are pretty good enough and the food of the mess is satisfying.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied due to infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are top tier, libraries are AC functioning with all kinds of books with Wi-Fi for students. There are smart screens in the class for interactive learning and water coolers with hygienic washrooms. The classrooms are properly ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, LNCTS is a very disciplined college that provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are actually very nice, and there is free Wi-Fi, labs and a library are also available for hostel students In the hostel, 24 hours warden is available, and also one male guard. The food is average in mess, and for medical facilities, they have a free hospital there.

reviews.review_heading: Mixed feeling. College gives many chances but sometimes feels like a school.
reviews.review_text: Actually, I do not live in college hostel because it was already filled when I took admission. But few of my friends live there so according to them the hostel room is nice and the food quality is not good. In college buildings, there are jammers, you can not use the internet properly in classrooms. Projectors are provided in every classroom. Wi-Fi is available in canteens, libraries, and labs. Library is quite spacious, and you do not have to buy books for your semester. They provide you with b...

reviews.review_heading: 2024 passout LNCTS Cyber Security batch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was not good. Labs were very conjugated. Classrooms were good but no AC. You can live in the hostel only for the 1st year after that, you have to leave somewhere else outside. You can't access the internet on campus because of the jammer. There was a library, and for every semester, they will give you books for free. You have to submit them at the end of the semester.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best option in private colleges in city of Bhopal for local residents.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average, it's not bad but not good either. Classrooms and libraries are neat and clean with proper CCTV cameras and smart boards. The library has a good amount of book collection. Quality of food in the hostel is not good at all. There are no clubs and sports activities for first-year students, rest is good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and faculty members are helpful.
reviews.review_text: For coding, we have labs. In labs, we have systems so that we not only study theories but we practice and see them practically. There is a separate ground for different sports like basketball, football, and badminton. Cultural activities are often organized.

To get admission at the Amity University, Hyderabad, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process is conducted online. Students can check out the video given below for information about Amity Hyderabad: Read the following article to know more about the Amity University, Hyderabad course admission 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: Amity University, Hyderabad Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Amity University, Hyderabad, offers admission to candidates based on their merit and PI. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility criteria for the preferred course to apply for admission. Candidates are selected based on PI. Students securing more than 80% aggregate in Class 12 (CBSE/ISC 2023/2024) will be selected based on their application form and do not need to appear for the P.I (Not applicable for Architecture/ Design/Education/Fashion/Fine Arts/Law and Physical Education programmes). faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to Amity University, Hyderabad must fulfil the college's eligibility criteria. admission_process.title: Amity University, Hyderabad Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amity University, Hyderabad, admissionopens with the registration process. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Amity University, Hyderabad, is as per the steps below:
Step 1: DYPDPU SLA Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://portal.amity.edu/NewOnlineForm/Candidate/SignUp?1=1&CampusId=70. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website. The application fee is INR 1,500.
Step 2: Selection

college_info.college_name: Amity University, Hyderabad Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amity University, Hyderabad, is considered to be expensive due to its private ownership, high-quality infrastructure, and career-focused education with placement opportunities. The university offers UG and PG programmes across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Application, and others. The fee structure of the programme ranges between INR 2.88 lakh- INR 15.28 lakh. The fee structure includes tuition fee, security fee, caution fee, and others.

Amity University, Hyderabad, offers the Founding Batch Scholarship to support meritorious and deserving students. These scholarships are awarded for the entire duration of the programme. For Engineering and allied programmes, students can receive a 20% scholarship, while those who enrolled in Management and allied programmes are eligible for a 15% scholarship.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RR Institute of Technology - RRIT offers various programmes at UG level. Students can choose offline courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Architecture & Planning. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely the college faculty members are so good.

review_content.Placements: There are almost 20,000 people in our batch, but the packages are so bad. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. Companies will visit our college like TCS, Wipro, and IBM. Everyone will get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled campus. The campus is so clean. It has good environment, well built infrastructure, and library facilities are so nice. The labs are also good but the equipments in lab won't work properly, which makes lab exams difficult. Going to hostel, there are many options 2 sharing, 3 sharing, etc. Good and spacious but not too clean. As there are many outsiders, food is prepared according to their style, which makes it difficult for locals who stay in the hostel. They will conduct sports, our classmates are selected national kabaddi team.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students were placed in our ECE course. The highest package is 4-5 LPA offered in my course. 100% of students got internships from my course. The top roles offered in our course are managed, software developed, and hardware developed.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college is very good. Wi-Fi-enabled campus of 5G. Labs are very good. Classrooms are very good. In the library, we can find books related to any course. The hostel is very good. They will provide highly hygienic food. The college has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: RRIT is a very good institute.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good, and the campus is very good-looking. The college has two campuses, where the sports ground is in the first campus, and sports will be conducted very well. There will be a sports period in the academics. This college is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its education.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were very good for my course, and the whole college was also. This college has Wi-Fi Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The food in the canteen/hostel was very good. The quality of food is excellent. If anyone gets injured, there will also be medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the college faculty members are so good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled campus. The campus is so clean. It has good environment, well built infrastructure, and library facilities are so nice. The labs are also good but the equipments in lab won't work properly, which makes lab exams difficult. Going to hostel, there are many options 2 sharing, 3 sharing, etc. Good and spacious but not too clean. As there are many outsiders, food is prepared according to their style, which makes it difficult for locals who stay in the hostel. They will co...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: My college is very good. Wi-Fi-enabled campus of 5G. Labs are very good. Classrooms are very good. In the library, we can find books related to any course. The hostel is very good. They will provide highly hygienic food. The college has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: RR Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: RRIT is a Wi-Fi enabled campus, there are good labs, sufficient classrooms, and a good library. The food quality is very good in the mess and canteen. Construction is still going on in this college for Masters as well. All facilities are available in the hostel too.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: College provides free Wi-Fi, and labs are extremely good, especially the language lab, which is a very good place. Classrooms are above average, and labs are also good. In the canteen, food quality is very good and affordable. Hostel food is average. Medical facilities are available, and sports are conducted by the sports teacher.

reviews.review_heading: About my experience in RRIT college .
reviews.review_text: Our college is good; it meets the university level. There is good infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi. There are well-equipped computer labs, but a few of them are not in working condition. The campus environment is really too good. Hostels are maintained, hygiene is observed, and food is clean. Everything in the hostel is based on a QR code system.

reviews.review_heading: College with no heart. Good architecture and MBA programme.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in college are a library, a park, and well-designed information technology in a familiar environment. Other facilities, like online classes in English,. The college has its own hostel and canteen for national and international students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RRIT based on my experience.
reviews.review_text: The college buildings are well built, and many new building are under construction. The facilities are also good. Wi-Fi-enabled campus. Good library system. The labs are also good but the equipments in lab won't work properly, which makes lab exams difficult. Going to hostel, there are many options: 2 sharing 3 sharing, etc. Good and spacious but not too clean. As there are many outsiders, food is prepared according to their style, which makes difficult for locals who stay in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RR Institute of Technology - RRIT.
reviews.review_text: There is the lab, Wi-Fi, and library facilities here... but they are all so old, like they are using Windows 7 now. The hostel is so bad. The food is not good, neither is the security here. The faculty members are not so friendly too... they will do anything by their wish only.

reviews.review_heading: Average college according to a student's perspective.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have a library, 2 computer labs, a Chemistry lab, a Physics lab, a CAEG lab, and a States lab. The quality of the hostel is good, and the food provided here is also good in both the mess and the canteen. We have lots of sports and games, and we have 2 campuses: the degree campus and the pre-university campus, where pharmacy, nursing, and Polytechnic are also included.

reviews.review_heading: RR college is the best in studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college has more than 5 branches, each with the best infrastructure. The CSE department has the best facilities, such as AV in the classroom and high-speed Wi-Fi. The classroom is large and the labs are equipped with the latest software. The hostel also has the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Won't prefer this college .
reviews.review_text:
Faculty members are all good
Library is available 
I stay in PG its not soo good
3 star PG
Food is awesome here u2026but still the restrictions are overu2026college classrooms are neat and have cctv at all classesu2026the whole college campus is neat and clean u2026and it have labs tooo.

reviews.review_heading: Good for games and sports, but not good for placements.
reviews.review_text: Good food quality and Wi-Fi are available on campus. Sports and games are of high value. Fans are available in the classroom. Our college hospital helps for medical purposes. Everything in college depends on students, like how they study for exams, which are always tough.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members, a good placement percentage, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It was a good place to study. I liked it. Classrooms, the library, labs, and everything else was good. There was a big playground. There was a hospital in our institute that provided 24X7 facilities and free consultations for students.

college_info.intro:
Ganpat University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specialisation in Computer Science & Engineering, Cyber Security, Automobile, Biomedical, Electrical, Mechanical, Marine, Petrochemical, and others. Ganpat University Mehsana BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. Btech students can work as Automotive Engineers, Cyber Security Analysts, Forensic Analysts, Chief Research Managers, and others.
Ganpat University Kherva is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in Agribusiness, Financial Services, Pharmaceuticals, Business Analytics, Healthcare and Hospital, and others. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Agribusiness Marketing Officers, Financial Advisors, Development Managers, Health Administrators, and others. Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at Ganpat University in the following table:

The institution charges moderate tuition for these courses. The fee structure for all of Ganpat University's courses is stated below in the article. Students who want to apply for any UG, PG, Diploma, or Doctoral level study can find the complete list of Ganpat University Courses & Fees as well as the duration of the course here.The address of Ganpat University is Kherva, Mehsana, Gujarat, India. The Mehsana District Education Foundation manages it. Ganpat University is a private university that was founded in 2005 and is recognised by the UGC.The tuition at this university ranges from INR 12,000 to INR 7 lakh, depending on the course. This university selects students based on merit and the results of national level exams such as JEE, CAT, GATE, MAT, XMAT, CMAT, and so on.The tuition for Ganpat University Engineering degrees ranges from INR 2,00,000 to INR 5,24,823.The BA (Economics) Course fee is around INR 1,51,374, the BBA Course fee is approximately Rs. 1,80,000, the BCA Course fee is approximately Rs. 40,572, and the B.Pharma Course charge is approximately Rs. 3,56,000.Fees for UG and PG Business Administration programs will range from INR 97,000 and INR 1,89,110 per year.Ganpat University charges INR 40,040 for the M.Phil Course, and INR 1,90,000 for the MBA Course in various specialties.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It has average placements, good infrastructure, and a strong academic focus.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average, and about 65-70% of students get placed. Packages are often too low. We need to apply for jobs or internships on our own, as the college support is limited and the offered pay is generally low. I suggest students be independent when it comes to placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers average labs, classrooms, hostel facilities, and a library. Sports facilities are not up to the mark. The food quality can improve. The hotel's condition is very average. There is only 1 bathroom and 1 washroom for 8 people. Students have no choice.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review of life at Ganpat University.

review_content.Placements: When it comes to placements, the placement cell provides proper training through seminars, soft-skill sessions, and industry interactions. Many reputed companies visit the campus, especially for engineering streams, and the opportunities are increasing year by year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Ganpat University is one of its strongest points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained with modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, a central library with digital resources, sports grounds, and Wi-Fi facilities across the campus. The automobile engineering labs are equipped with the latest tools and machinery, which helps a lot in gaining practical knowledge.
