review_summary.college_name: Ganpat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Nice college, it is value for money.

content.Placements: The placement scene depends a bit on the course, but overall, the university puts in real effort. Big companies do come, and many students get placed or at least get internship opportunities that help them gain exposure.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and campus life are one of the highlights. The infrastructure is quite solid. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports grounds, everything is there and maintained decently. The hostel feels safe, the environment is student-friendly, and the mess food is, well, not perfect, but definitely manageable. The campus feels like a small town of its own, which makes college life more memorable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Microbiology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ganpat University (GUNI) Microbiology student.

content.Placements: Only a few placements are available in this course, which is why there are no placements after Microbiology. If anyone wants a job, they need to complete PG to get a job easily. There is no information about the highest package and average package. Many hospital and lab companies are interested in this field.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is not a good option. PG is better. Food in the mess is good, but there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are rules in the hostel, and security guards are strict. The quality of food is bad.
content.Faculty: Our faculty helps us before exams, and exams are very simple. We get 80% as well, and many students get 90 to 98%. We have three exams. The first is the mid-semester exam, which is offline. The second is the online mid exam. The third is the final exam, which is offline. Exams are nicely organized by the university with very good arrangements. Our faculty is very good and supports us everywhere.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has average placements, good infrastructure, and a strong academic focus.

content.Placements: Placements are average, and about 65-70% of students get placed. Packages are often too low. We need to apply for jobs or internships on our own, as the college support is limited and the offered pay is generally low. I suggest students be independent when it comes to placements.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers average labs, classrooms, hostel facilities, and a library. Sports facilities are not up to the mark. The food quality can improve. The hotel's condition is very average. There is only 1 bathroom and 1 washroom for 8 people. Students have no choice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of life at Ganpat University.

content.Placements: When it comes to placements, the placement cell provides proper training through seminars, soft-skill sessions, and industry interactions. Many reputed companies visit the campus, especially for engineering streams, and the opportunities are increasing year by year.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Ganpat University is one of its strongest points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained with modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, a central library with digital resources, sports grounds, and Wi-Fi facilities across the campus. The automobile engineering labs are equipped with the latest tools and machinery, which helps a lot in gaining practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma (IT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good, it teaches us so many things like studies, people, environment, and all.

content.Placements: 40% of students have been placed in our course. The highest package is 5 LPA, the lowest package is 1 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Reliance. 40% of students got internships in our course, with companies like TCS, Woot, and Infosys. Software developer, data analyst, and IT support specialist are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly, we have well-maintained classrooms, labs, and a library. We have students' personal Wi-Fi connections to connect it, but we have to enter our enrollment number. Hostels are well-maintained and give very energetic vibes. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is very hygienic. The college provides 24/7 medical support. Every semester, we have tournaments for sports activities and games.

admission_overview.college_name: Ganpat University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses, Fees

admission_process.title: Ganpat University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ganpat University admissionto courses is both merit-based and entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission can either get direct admission to their desired course or through any relevant national/ state-level entrance tests such as GUCET, CUET, CAT, MAT, JEE Main, etc. Apart from the aforementioned entrance exams, the University also accepts Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam scores for admission to all UG courses. For an MBA, the University conducts an additional selection round of personal interviews before shortlisting candidates for admission.

Ganpat University (GUNI)offers more than 171 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma levels. It also offers a range of certificate courses. Ganpat University has seven faculties focused onEngineering,Management,Pharmacy,Computer Applications,Sciences,Social Sciences,Architecture,Design and Planning, Law, and Maritime Studies.

The basic eligibility for admission to most courses at Ganpat University is merit in the last qualifying examination; however, the university accepts the scores of various entrance exams conducted at the national and state levels for admission to several courses.
The table below presents the application status of variousGanpat University coursesalong with the eligibility, and accepted entrance exams:
Eligibility
Class 12 with 45% aggregate in Science stream
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry
CUET/GUJCET
Class 10 and Class 12 50% marks (45% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category)
NATA/ Direct admission
Class 10 and Class 12 in any stream with 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category)
NATA,UCEED,GNUDAT
Bachelor's degree
CMAT,MAT,XAT,CAT,ATMA+ Personal Interview
Bachelor’s degree
GATE,GUJCET
Bachelor’s degree with 50% marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category)
Direct Admission
Make your selection here,to check the eligibility and selection criteria for other Ganpat University courses.

The Ganpat University admission process is conducted in multiple steps. The process begins with the release of application forms on the official website of the University, followed by the shortlisting of candidates based on their educational qualifications and scores in the entrance exam. The final step includes acceptance of the admission offer by the candidate. The candidates must check the eligibility criteria before applying to their desired course.
Interested candidates can read the detailed admission process below:
Step 1: Ganpat University Application Process
The Ganpat University application forms are released on the University's official website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria must fill out the application form before the deadline.
Step 2: Shortlisting of Candidates

Ganpat University admission criteria are both entrance-based and merit-based for all courses. The University accepts various entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, JEE, Pearson UG test, etc. to shortlist admission candidates.
Step 3: Final Admission
Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the admission fees and appear for the document verification process to secure their seats.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at Ganpat University cost?
faqs.answer: Ganpat University Fee Structure 2023: The official website lists the fees for UG, PG, and Ph.D. degree courses such as BBA, BCA, Bcom, Mtech with specialization, and many others. The institution charges moderate tuition for these courses. The fee structure for all of Ganpat University's courses is stated below in the article. Students who want to apply for any UG, PG, Diploma, or Doctoral level study can find the complete list of Ganpat University Courses & Fees as well as the duration of the course here. The address of Ganpat University is Kherva, Mehsana, Gujarat, India. The Mehsana District Education Foundation manages it. Ganpat University is a private university that was founded in 2005 and is recognised by the UGC. The tuition at this university ranges from INR 12,000 to INR 7 lakh, depending on the course. This university selects students based on merit and the results of national level exams such as JEE, CAT, GATE, MAT, XMAT, CMAT, and so on. The tuition for Ganpat University Engineering degrees ranges from INR 2,00,000 to INR 5,24,823. The BA (Economics) Course fee is around INR 1,51,374, the BBA Course fee is approximately Rs. 1,80,000, the BCA Course fee is approximately Rs. 40,572, and the B.Pharma Course charge is approximately Rs. 3,56,000. Fees for UG and PG Business Administration programs will range from INR 97,000 and INR 1,89,110 per year. Ganpat University charges INR 40,040 for the M.Phil Course, and INR 1,90,000 for the MBA Course in various specialties. At Ganpat University, the Ph.D. course costs approximately INR 75,200. Ganpat University charges INR 3,000 for the PhD entrance exam. The application cost for Ganpat University is INR 1,000.

faqs.question: When do I need to pay the first year fees for Ganpat University BPharma course?
faqs.answer: Once Ganpat University releases the admission letters for the BPharma course, students who are offered admission must pay the first installment of the first-year fees. In general, students are required to pay an admission fee and some part of the tuition fees. Students willing to know more can visit the university's official website.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nice college, it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and campus life are one of the highlights. The infrastructure is quite solid. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports grounds, everything is there and maintained decently. The hostel feels safe, the environment is student-friendly, and the mess food is, well, not perfect, but definitely manageable. The campus feels like a small town of its own, which makes college life more memorable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ganpat University (GUNI) Microbiology student.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not a good option. PG is better. Food in the mess is good, but there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are rules in the hostel, and security guards are strict. The quality of food is bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 12 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has average placements, good infrastructure, and a strong academic focus.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers average labs, classrooms, hostel facilities, and a library. Sports facilities are not up to the mark. The food quality can improve. The hotel's condition is very average. There is only 1 bathroom and 1 washroom for 8 people. Students have no choice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 20 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of life at Ganpat University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Ganpat University is one of its strongest points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained with modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, a central library with digital resources, sports grounds, and Wi-Fi facilities across the campus. The automobile engineering labs are equipped with the latest tools and machinery, which helps a lot in gaining practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, it teaches us so many things like studies, people, environment, and all.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, we have well-maintained classrooms, labs, and a library. We have students' personal Wi-Fi connections to connect it, but we have to enter our enrollment number. Hostels are well-maintained and give very energetic vibes. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is very hygienic. The college provides 24/7 medical support. Every semester, we have tournaments for sports activities and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 4 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, helpful faculty, relevant curriculum, but some facilities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Ganpat University offers well equipped labs Wi fi enabled classrooms and a modern library for academic needs. Hostel facilities are decent with hygienic food medical care and sports amenities providing a comfortable environment for students. However some facilities should be further improved to enhance students' comfort.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 10 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with everything except the classrooms.
reviews.review_text: College facilities are quite good, but the infrastructure is not so good. 24-hour high-speed Wi-Fi and high-tech laboratories are available. Classrooms are not so good, they are non-AC and not well managed. But the library is big, so all books are easily available. The hostel facility is the best, and the mess food is of good quality. Also, good quality medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: College batch 2023-25 in finance service.
reviews.review_text: Campus is very big. Sports activities are also included and they have good healthcare sector.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shree S.K. Patel College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 30 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied and there are good placements.
reviews.review_text: Campus is beautiful and green, and the atmosphere is also good. They also have a big library with AC classroom. Wi-Fi is available on all campus. Hostel facilities are good, but food is average in mess. Medical facilities are too good and sports are also too good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by A.M. Patel Institute of Computer Studies, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 21 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is great to be student of GUNI, it has good and healthy environment with lots of knowledge banks.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities are available on campus. Ganpat University offers a well-maintained infrastructure with modern labs and classrooms. The hostel is clean, and the mess food is good. The campus of Ganpat University is equipped with all types of facilities, from food and stationery to other essentials. It also includes a hospital on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 15 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college has a standard infrastructure with all the facilities available in it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. We are provided with full-time Wi-Fi service. Libraries are available all day long with many informative books. The hostel rooms are well-ventilated and have adequate furniture. Our mess provides nutritious meals to the students. The food quality is good. We also have a canteen inside our university campus. The medical facility is provided within the campus itself and it is available 24/7. The university campus has its own basketball court and football ground. It al...

reviews.review_heading: Life changing decision.
reviews.review_text: In my course, classrooms have good infrastructure with air-conditioning. There are Wi-Fi, computer labs, etc. In the case of Ahmedabad they don't have a hostel and canteen. For sports, they have indoor games like table tennis, carrom, chess, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 21 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All about college, infrastructure, placements, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Yes, we have the best infrastructure with on-campus hostels for boys and girls, including Wi-Fi and hot showers. We have shared rooms with good space, and we like the infrastructure. We get three meals a day and have access to a cricket ground, football ground, swimming pool, boxing ring, gym, and sports complex for extra-curricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Computer Technology, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 14 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall I will say Excellent in Faculty, Syllabus, etc. Absolutely satisfied with placement.
reviews.review_text: In our university, the facility is outstanding. There are sports grounds for all sports: tennis, football, cricket, running track, etc., a swimming pool, gym, classrooms with Wi-Fi, labs, and a library for all departments, etc. They have provided different hostels for different branches. The food quality is also very nice and not so costly. Also, for out-of-state students, there is a different canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by V.M. Patel College of Management Studies, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 18 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am from Ahmedabad and I don't recommend this college for pursuing BBA here.
reviews.review_text: I personally don't like the hostel facilities of this college, and I don't recommend it as there is only one university in a good spot; otherwise, there are only green fields around it, and I suggest that you should go to Ahmedabad as compared to here, and I personally don't recommend doing a BBA here.

college_info.college_name: Ganpat University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Ganpat University offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, and others. The university fee structure has been discussed below:

Once Ganpat University releases the admission letters for the BPharma course, students who are offered admission must pay the first installment of the first-year fees. In general, students are required to pay an admission fee and some part of the tuition fees. Students willing to know more can visit the university's official website.

Yes, Ganpat University (GUNI) offers 100% tuition waiver for students in certain programs, as well as scholarships for other students. Students must serve as researchers for GUNI for a minimum of two years after earning their Ph.D. to receive the 100% tuition waiver. Students in reserved categories, such as SC or ST, may also receive a scholarship. GUNI also offers the Merit Scholarship to undergraduate and postgraduate students who ranks first to third in their semester results. For female students, GUNI offers the PRAGATI Scholarship Scheme, which provides 50,000 rupees or 50% tuition fees, whichever is less, to two girls per family with an annual family income of less than 8 Lacs rupees.

Ganpat University Fee Structure 2023: The official website lists the fees for UG, PG, and Ph.D. degree courses such as BBA, BCA, Bcom, Mtech with specialization, and many others. The institution charges moderate tuition for these courses. The fee structure for all of Ganpat University's courses is stated below in the article. Students who want to apply for any UG, PG, Diploma, or Doctoral level study can find the complete list of Ganpat University Courses & Fees as well as the duration of the course here.

The address of Ganpat University is Kherva, Mehsana, Gujarat, India. The Mehsana District Education Foundation manages it. Ganpat University is a private university that was founded in 2005 and is recognised by the UGC.

The tuition at this university ranges from INR 12,000 to INR 7 lakh, depending on the course. This university selects students based on merit and the results of national level exams such as JEE, CAT, GATE, MAT, XMAT, CMAT, and so on.

The tuition for Ganpat University Engineering degrees ranges from INR 2,00,000 to INR 5,24,823.The BA (Economics) Course fee is around INR 1,51,374, the BBA Course fee is approximately Rs. 1,80,000, the BCA Course fee is approximately Rs. 40,572, and the B.Pharma Course charge is approximately Rs. 3,56,000.Fees for UG and PG Business Administration programs will range from INR 97,000 and INR 1,89,110 per year.Ganpat University charges INR 40,040 for the M.Phil Course, and INR 1,90,000 for the MBA Course in various specialties.At Ganpat University, the Ph.D. course costs approximately INR 75,200. Ganpat University charges INR 3,000 for the PhD entrance exam.The application cost for Ganpat University is INR 1,000.

reviews_list.review_title: It has terrible faculty members and management. It is a complete waste of time and money.

review_content.Placements: Only 10-20% of students get placed on campus. The highest package of all the years is 7 LPA in 2022. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting company of B.Teach CSE 2025 is Infosys. It offered a system engineer role with a salary of 3.65 LPA. Apart from Infosys, only Detlax came, which did not even select the students for round 2. so basically there is no hope of on-campus placement opportunities from here. Our college offers less than 4 LPA by major tech giants.

reviews_list.review_title: Good for study purpose and good teachers are there in this college. There is 100% campus.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Sharnbasva University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not a good college to be recommended. The college is average.

content.Placements: Don't expect placements from this college. The highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA-5 LPA. Capgemini is recruiting company. Students got internships in IBM and Infosys. Roles offered are of developers. Not a good college to be suggested to others, please take the CS branch if you want to take the course in this college it is better than other courses.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, no proper washrooms, and no proper systems are available. The hostels are not that bad but the food is good. No sports are conducted in this college. The classrooms are not that good. All projectors are not that visible. Labs are also not well-maintained, to be honest, not so good college to take admission.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Sharnbasava University as a 2025 batch pass-out.

content.Placements: From the 2024 pass-out batch, only 4 students got placed out of 180 students in TCS and Accenture. The highest package was 7 LPA, which was given to only one student rest of the three students got 3.6 LPA and 4 LPA. From our 2025 batch, 14 students got placed in Infosys, only girls in the month of January 2025, and yet no one got an offer letter till now.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clean and maintained daily, but most of the time, they are locked. Students are allowed in the class only during study hours, which are from 10 to 5. In some classes, the projector does not work. Labs are clean and well maintained, but in some systems, the software is not at all installed, and some systems are old. The library has been improved, and they have started maintaining books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has terrible faculty members and management. It is a complete waste of time and money.

content.Placements: Only 10-20% of students get placed on campus. The highest package of all the years is 7 LPA in 2022. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting company of B.Teach CSE 2025 is Infosys. It offered a system engineer role with a salary of 3.65 LPA. Only training companies are visiting our college which includes Excel, Qspyders, Tap Academy, Pentagonspace, and Vstand4U solutions. Apart from Infosys, only Detlax came, which did not even select the students for round 2. so basically there is no hope of on-campus placement opportunities from here. Our college offers less than 4 LPA by major tech giants.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good for study purpose and good teachers are there in this college. There is 100% campus.

content.Placements: 9.5% of students got placed from our college. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest package is 7 LPA. Recruiting company is IBM. 9.4% of students got placed in IBM. Roles offered are software developer, data scientist, marketing analyst, business analyst, project manager, UI/UX designer, web developer, cybersecurity analyst, cloud engineer, data engineer, and quality assurance tester.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for a course department include classrooms, laboratories, and libraries. The quality of facilities in a hostel can vary, but it can include high-quality food, medical care, and sports and games, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Quality education in a friendly manner.

content.Placements: Up to 50 students were placed from our university. The package was 2 LPA to 6 LPA. We got placement in companies like Infosys, Capgemini, Deloitte, and so on. 25 percent of students got internships in companies like Qspiders, Vstand4U, and so on. Software development roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in labs and also in well-mannered, neat, and clean classrooms. The library is the best part of our college. The hostel is not that good when it comes to rooms, but when it comes to security, it is well and good. The canteen and medical facilities are also good.

admission_process.title: Sharnbasva University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sharnbasva University admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. The institute accepts scores in GATE, KCET, and Karnataka PGCET. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of Sharnbasva University. The college offers programmes in Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Mass Communication and Media, Architecture and Planning, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science streams.
The college offers UG courses for 3 years - 5 years. For programmes at the PG level, the duration is 18 months - 2 years.

The total fee ofSharnbasva Universityincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.

description: Sharnbasva University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Sharnbasva University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 16414 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 18932 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Sharnbasva University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 16414 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2023, the cutoff rank for the same course was 32872.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good college to be recommended. The college is average.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, no proper washrooms, and no proper systems are available. The hostels are not that bad but the food is good. No sports are conducted in this college. The classrooms are not that good. All projectors are not that visible. Labs are also not well-maintained, to be honest, not so good college to take admission.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Sharnbasava University as a 2025 batch pass-out.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean and maintained daily, but most of the time, they are locked. Students are allowed in the class only during study hours, which are from 10 to 5. In some classes, the projector does not work. Labs are clean and well maintained, but in some systems, the software is not at all installed, and some systems are old. The library has been improved, and they have started maintaining books.

reviews.review_heading: It has terrible faculty members and management. It is a complete waste of time and money.
reviews.review_text: Few classes have AC, and some do not even work. The CSE department has AC. The rest of the departments like mechanical, civil, electronics, and electrical do not have AC. They have installed drinking water, but it is not cleaned regularly. Sometimes, washrooms do not have a water supply. Wi-Fi is poor. If 10-15 students start using the Wi-Fi LAN for downloading laboratory-related stuff, it gets too slow. Labs are cleaned regularly but systems and benches are dusty. The library is not well-organi...

reviews.review_heading: Good for study purpose and good teachers are there in this college. There is 100% campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for a course department include classrooms, laboratories, and libraries. The quality of facilities in a hostel can vary, but it can include high-quality food, medical care, and sports and games, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education in a friendly manner.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in labs and also in well-mannered, neat, and clean classrooms. The library is the best part of our college. The hostel is not that good when it comes to rooms, but when it comes to security, it is well and good. The canteen and medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gulbarga and nearby places.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and computer labs are always available. Classrooms are very spacious and have smart projector systems, which help students understand lessons more easily. Books are provided by the library. Food quality and hostel facilities are excellent. Sports and games are available. An auditorium is available. Labs with high-configured computers are available. Charges are very affordable.

reviews.review_heading: I feel that I have wasted 4 years of my life by studying at this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library facilities are provided. The hostel food is average for the amount we paid. The water facility is the worst. Students get water for 1-3 hours in the morning. We need to manage the entire day by filling the buckets which is very difficult for female students.

reviews.review_heading: Placement wise it's good and teaching quality is also good.
reviews.review_text: The food provided in the mess is decent, and the hostels are comfortable, with daily cleaning along with security available 24/7. There is a medical facility also available. The course area has decent classrooms along with Wi-Fi access campus.

reviews.review_heading: The atmosphere is more about learning.
reviews.review_text: We have a pretty good library that has a collection of books and journals. The classrooms are designed to support modern education with smart boards. The canteen and mess both provide good food. The hostel is in good condition with spacious and comfortable rooms, good wardens, and medical help.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. The college campus has Wi-Fi facility and there is more than five libraries. They also have huge projector classrooms, hygienic labs, etc. Overall, the infrastructure is good. Actually, I'm a day scholar student so I don't have any idea about hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sharnbasva University.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi facilities with good internet speed. We have 6 labs, and each lab has Wi-Fi, printers and scanners. There is a server room present which handles all machines present in 6 labs. Our college has projectors as well. A library is available. The campus environment is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for those who are looking for knowledge.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are good facilities for books and well-equipped labs with sufficient laptops. In our campus canteen, there are good facilities for quality food. Our college organised different games for students of every department on sports day.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided are of A1 quality and the best. Every class has its projector and well-equipped labs with Wi-Fi connections or LAN connections. There are bundles of books in our library. The quality of food in the canteen is perfect and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average university with good infrastructure and less extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: We have the Wi-Fi facility in most of the labs. There are two libraries at our college. Our college conducts a sports event every year. I am a day scholar. The canteens in our college are good, and the food is delicious. There is a huge football pitch, a basketball court, a park, and a gym too.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, well management, with safe education system. With high quality education.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are well experienced in their respective subjects, laptops are provided to each student personally, Wi-Fi connection is available for all students within the campus, there are separate computer labs for. Bachelor of computer application course, library books are provided by the faculty.
